Sir Edward Coke summarized the court’s decision by emphasizing that one’s home is his “castle,” “fortress,” and “surest refuge”: That the house of everyone is to him as his castle and fortress, as well for his defence against injury and violence, as for his repose; and although the life of man is a thing precious and favored in law; so that although a man kills another in his defence, or kills one per infortun’, without any intent, yet it is felony, and in such case he shall forfeit his goods and chattels, for the great regard which the law has to a man’s life; but if thieves come to a man’s house to rob him, or murder, and the owner of his servants kill any of the thieves in defence of himself and his house, it is not felony, and he shall lose nothing, and therewith agree . . . every one may assemble his friends and neighbours to defend his house against violence . . . because domus sua cuique est tutissimum refugium [to everyone his house is his surest refuge]. Semayne’s Case , 77 Eng. Rep. 195, 5 Coke Rep. 91a (K.B. 1604). The home secures its residents from all forms of injustice by government or society. As William Pitt the Elder (Prime Minister from 1766–68, whose son William Pitt the Younger was Prime Minister who worked with William Wilberforce in banning slavery in the United Kingdom) famously explained in 1763, The poorest man may in his cottage bid defiance to all the forces of the Crown. It may be frail—its roof may shake—the wind may blow through it—the storm may enter—the rain may enter—but the King of England cannot enter!— all his force dares not cross the threshold of the ruined tenement! William Pittenger, ORATORY SACRED AND SECULAR 146 (1878).[5] The poorest man may in his cottage bid defiance to all the forces of the Crown. It may be frail—its roof may shake—the wind may blow through it—the storm may enter—the rain may enter—but the King of England cannot enter!— all his force dares not cross the threshold of the ruined tenement! - William Pitt the Elder, Prime Minister, 1763 Restoring the Common Law and Our Constitutional Principles Can Save our Republic The common law and our Constitution, if enforced by Congress against the Biden administration for instance, would immediately halt the illegal collapsing of our Borders and the weaponization of the Biden administration’s agencies against conservatives and President Trump. Joe Biden is not permitted to be a dictator, yet that is what he is doing and every federal agency official who goes along with his bitter attack against Americans who believe America should be great again are each acting completely outside their constitutional, statutory and common law authority. Judges can also end this tomorrow – the Judiciary can still help save America – if they begin to enforce the Constitution against this tyrannical regime which is presently sending in federal agents to target peaceful Americans who Joe Biden wishes to silence. Peaceful law-abiding Americans such as your local gun shop owners, sheriffs, and Catholics and protestant Christians who are pro-life. These words by William Pitt were also of inspiration to me in fighting the tyrannical lockdowns and “mandates” of 2020-21 because of a similar right – the right to leave one’s home and obtain work, earn money to live and buy food, to speak and engage in societal association, all without harassment from any absolutist “ruler” misusing emergencies and arrogating to himself authority that does not exist under the rule of law. For after all, what does a right in one’s home matter at all if one has no right to live in it, and such right to live necessitates the right to work, to earn money to eat and feed one’s family, and to engage in association and society. Equal justice means equality at law, and this is the essence of the historic common law. But these principles have not always been upheld nor followed by civilized “law abiding” nations. On June 15, 1215 the people of England convened in several rag-tag armies on the Fields of Runnymede near the banks of the Thames River and surrounded by force the King pro tempore, King John, and established a lasting guarantee of constitutional rights for its citizens upon the laws of nature and nature’s God. That document, the Magna Carta, is known worldwide as the guardian of justice; its principles are laid down in the English Common Law, a treatise on which I possess, study and cite by Blackstone, titled “The Commentaries on the Laws of England.” Maryland enacted the Magna Carta as part of its supreme law of the land in its Constitution and Declaration of Rights. Article 5 sets it down along with all those rights in existence in England “on July 4, 1776.” One of the more famous phrases from the Magna Carta is recited word for word or in similar principles in our Declaration of Rights, such as no suspending of laws except by the Legislature itself (Art. 9), free speech (Arts. 2 & 10), jury trials (art. 5), requirement of warrants (Art. 26), and in Article 24 a near word-for-word rendition of the Magna Carta’s most famous lines guaranteeing due process: That no man ought to be taken or imprisoned or disseized of his freehold, liberties or privileges, or outlawed, or exiled, or, in any manner, destroyed, or deprived of his life, liberty or property, but by the judgment of his peers, or by the Law of the land. Const. of Md., Decl. Rights, art. 24, amend. by Chapter 681, Acts of 1977, ratified Nov. 7, 1978. The ancient Scottish maxim, Lex Rex , meaning the Law is King, was merely a recitation of the fact that Rex Lex , or, the King is Law, is self-defeating and circular in logic; no one may invent to themselves their own law, for laws that change by emergencies or by dictate of men and not by due process before a Legislature not departing from the common law and its maxims, are therefore not law at all. This is why we have checks and balances in our government: so that if the Legislature were to make laws contrary to the constitution or common law, the courts must overrule it as not law and nullify the same. Similarly, no Executive authority may violate such constitutional law or the common law, for any reason, even in times of war. This is not a new concept; our Founders said the same and it is enshrined in our constitution in Maryland at this very moment: That the provisions of the Constitution of the United States, and of this State, apply, as well in time of war, as in time of peace; and any departure therefrom, or violation thereof, under the plea of necessity, or any other plea, is subversive of good Government, and tends to anarchy and despotism. Const. of Md., Decl. Rights, art. 44, amend. by Chapter 681, Acts of 1977, ratified Nov. 7, 1978.[6] Socialism Threatens Civilization by Eliminating Natural Rights to Property The sad rising embrace by the West and the Biden administration of socialism and the bloody tenets of communism – those ideas ignorantly displayed in Marx’s Communist Manifesto that our institutions and families are evil and must be toppled and as Obama said “permanently changed” – are not only self-defeating as they always have been, but are evil and must be opposed as the medieval demons of injustice that they are. Take, for instance, the recently announced fleecing of Maryland real property owners with the 30-50% rise in property taxes, all while the liberal newspapers lie to Marylanders that the current administration has “not raised taxes.” Lies like this will destroy our freedom. Like the horror where a “doctor” claims to be helping his patients only to be discovered that he is killing them, lies that undermine the rule of law as to our property rights are evil because that impacts our ability to live, to raise a family, to enjoy the fruits of our labor as God designed us to do. All of this is also subject to the terrifying fact that reckless spending by wealthy and out-of-touch politicians have put our country in financial peril, with an over 130% unsustainable national debt-to-GDP output ratio. Our nation is nearly $34 trillion dollars in debt and that number is growing daily by millions, much of this being owed to Communist China. That is over $100,000 per person born at this time owed in their lifetime to government debt. Justice is never capricious; it is settled, stable, unchangeable and sure. The rule of law means the rule of the unchanging principles of justice. This is what brings peace and happiness to the civil society. No society is perfect, but the rule of law allows change according to the principles of justice and peace. Case in point is William Wilberforce’s triumphant victory over slavery in England as depicted in the movie Amazing Grace without firing a shot but according to the rule of law. Contrast that with the bloody and horrific French Revolution, which was so outside of law and justice that the end resulted in the guillotine for the man who put so many to the same death. Until recently in America, we have tended to take for granted the principles of justice. For instance, it seems that not many Americans understand that we are in a fight for the very life of our country and the rule of law. Everyone, even many Members of Congress, seem to not have a sense of urgency about our unstable legal and economic condition. Possibly because they are not “poking the bear” by speaking up in their communities against the injustice occurring, they may wish to ignore what is happening because they are not yet feeling the personal power of it. But President Trump is dead-on when he says we need to “Save America.” President Reagan said the same over and over again as well, that without work to preserve our principles of law, we will “descend into 1000 years of darkness.” And this is not new: the prophet Jeremiah said nearly 2,700 years ago that we must “work for the peace of the City... and pray unto the LORD for it: for in the peace thereof shall ye have peace.” (Jeremiah 29:7 (AV)). The way back is for every American to begin enforcement of the common law and the constitution through challenging every lawless behavior that rears its ugly head toward us. If they overtax you, appeal it. If everyone does this, they may get the message. If they threaten you, expose it publicly; darkness is not overcome unless brought into the light. If they fire you from your job because of your faith or disability, sue them for discrimination. If they require you to sign something against your better judgment, or demand to track your healthcare information at your doctor’s office, refuse. If a government-paid social worker or healthcare “worker” comes into your private medical appointment to sit in with your doctor or nurse, reject them and demand they leave (this has happened in Maryland). You have a right to medical privacy. If they require you to submit to masking or injections of any kind, tell them where their evil mandates can go – back to hell where they belong. Above all else, do not be silent. Now is the time to speak publicly. “Silence in the face of evil, is evil” wrote Dietrich Bonhoeffer. Americans may not realize how close we could be to this darkness at this moment. But this is why we must act, it is why we must be involved, and it is why we must vote. To not do so would be to hold God in contempt of the liberties our forefathers bequeathed to us. To not do so would be to spit on the graves of those brave men and women buried at Arlington. To not do so would be to surrender our children to the Devil’s tyranny. God forbid, and long live freedom and victory. This article is educational and does not constitute either legal or medical advice and may not be relied upon as such. This disclaimer is required by the Bar of Maryland and the government Boards of Medicine and Nursing. [1] Such as religious intolerance and banning Christmas, among other wrongs. [2] Cuddihy, William J., 'The English Law of Search and Seizure, 1485–1642', The Fourth Amendment: Origins and Original Meaning 602 - 1791 (New York, 2009; online edn, Oxford Academic, 1 Jan. 2009), , accessed 20 Jan. 2024. [3] William Lambarde, EIRENAR- CHA 257 (1591); cited by, Firearms Policy Coalition in its Amici Curiae brief filed with the Supreme Court in the case Caniglia v. Strom, no. 20-157. [4] Id. , Firearms Policy Coalition in its Amici Curiae brief filed with the Supreme Court in the case Caniglia v. Strom, no. 20-157, pgs. 6-7. [5] Id. [6] Const. of Maryland, adopted by the Convention of 1867. Official Md. name: Lucas
subject: January 6th coward Josh Hawley wants you to buy his “Manhood” book
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
I’m not kidding.
#
Peter — Josh Hawley, the guy who made himself famous for raising his fist and then skittering out the back door at the Capitol on January 6th, wants you to buy his weird book about “Manhood.”
I’m not kidding.

I know my team has sent more emails than usual this week, folks. **[I hope you’ll give me a few minutes to explain why your donation today would be so impactful for my re-election campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77448764/450468796/-1374307457?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_RES_NO_20240120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzE0NzZlNi0wM2I4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LR9HilWRgW81J906UoIGyCrx-P7WM9CEaB_T9jCOvM8=)** **My new multi-millionaire challenger has already flooded New Mexico’s U.S. Senate race with half a million of her personal fortune. That’s only the beginning.** She has a long career as a hedge fund executive and is the daughter of the last Republican elected to the U.S. Senate in New Mexico. My parents weren’t politicians — my dad was a union lineman with the local utility company, and my mom was a seamstress and an automobile tire factory worker. I was a mechanical engineer before I went into politics, not the former CFO of the largest hedge fund in the world. I’m not in this fight to prop up Wall Street. I’m running for re-election to continue delivering meaningful change for New Mexico, like protecting reproductive rights, passing more common-sense gun safety legislation, and taking action on climate change. **But my Republican challenger already has the support of Mitch McConnell’s allies, who are dead-set on flipping New Mexico, taking back the Senate, and enacting an extreme agenda.** **[Will you help my team prepare to face off against a Republican opponent who has already started self-funding her campaign to defeat me? subject: Schumer is setting his sights

body:
Chuck Schumer’s dark money groups are launching 700k in attack ads against Tim Sheehy on top of the $2.6 million already spent. | Peter- **Chuck Schumer has set his sights on my home state.**

He believes Montanans can’t distinguish between a corrupt career politician who votes with Joe Biden 91% of the time (Jon Tester) or a political outsider, a veteran who will serve us with distinction like Tim Sheehy.

I can tell the difference, and I know Montanans can as well.

Montanans also know how to spot when something is off... and something is off with Chuck Schumer flooding our state with MILLIONS in dark money early in the campaign.

**Tim Sheehy is the Democrats’ number one target. Outside, dark money, liberal Super PACs are spending more this cycle to smear the good name of a good man than in any other race in the country.**

Chuck Schumer and Jon Tester think Montanans will fall for their false advertising and political games. [**Well, I don’t.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bbccf66e45064efab2351fe9a98bbda7&_e=GBd9Ugl9QUGGK1nCEoEsMLVNJV2R1mnbVEc6AZKZL8JmEBGYPZan3xyG2ayoQkUyzI8yt07dVrNtjhiyWEENLMZOrPRvJPQkeLmoexUcbqtFJ1SvU6CFEOmxwHPBf-cGr5XHNzfY4u-wBH-2OY2ShNmnLiptEmgnJjd6IKIWfeN6np1H9yGMwltxlufgd5pUOmQZZA0XqGatNtrOimBYT9Fwk_Lfy4g3CwI_3_4hvpx6pMiOojNVyECErRWjq70eu7I1MoeWRJDnBsYYpojkpOIxXESFeYqy_6jaxQSFUuuN4upwL6NXKCGHuu3ayIRsA_044z1rsOhrDPTnPjwvhrZinAMeO7kgx8Ov8NFZMhghnvEIdhKkdZFWXj_WreLHxUtEzb-14VA9Wbpetq9LrfqX7ZwOEgTbDTotHskcd7WMv_A5oRD70icSQ3irie_x55bJSJgtzB3jz1UJdBqlVQNCxHwIFjnLl2Zf0XD_n-g%3D)

clean_body: Chuck Schumer’s dark money groups are launching 700k in attack ads against Tim Sheehy on top of the $2.6 million already spent. | Peter- Chuck Schumer has set his sights on my home state. He believes Montanans can’t distinguish between a corrupt career politician who votes with Joe Biden 91% of the time (Jon Tester) or a political outsider, a veteran who will serve us with distinction like Tim Sheehy. I can tell the difference, and I know Montanans can as well. Montanans also know how to spot when something is off... and something is off with Chuck Schumer flooding our state with MILLIONS in dark money early in the campaign. Tim Sheehy is the Democrats’ number one target. Outside, dark money, liberal Super PACs are spending more this cycle to smear the good name of a good man than in any other race in the country. Chuck Schumer and Jon Tester think Montanans will fall for their false advertising and political games. Peter, I’m requesting your support for Tim Sheehy for the U.S. Senate. Tim is a proud conservative, a military veteran, a family man, and a father, and he is our best bet to represent Montana in the United States Senate. Tim needs your support because, unlike career politicians Chuck Schumer and Jon Tester, Tim is a political outsider with no dark money donors to lean on. Tim is relying on the hundreds of thousands of conservative patriots like you With Democrats already on the attack, Tim has no time to lose raising money for his ads to fight back. I hope you’ll support this America First fighter and conservative patriot for the U.S. Senate with your most generous gift today. Thank you very much, Jason Thielman 4th Generation Montanan Executive Director, National Republican Senatorial Committee If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The truth is, no one knows for certain
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38372%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J%2bsPZeXlSNY0wd5nhp%2bpkA&sysid=1)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. name: Dave McCormick
subject: I lift up my eyes to the mountains
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
_["I lift my eyes to the mountains- where does my help come from? My help comes from the Lord, the maker of heaven and earth." Psalm 121](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6gvaohab2k9sh049857b98oiplrnt9li3ulpr7g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j62o72c5h2bs)_
Friend,
When I arrived at West Point as a new cadet, I had no idea how much it would transform my life. During my first plebe summer, after a long day of training, a sermon on Psalm 121 made an imprint on my soul, strengthened my faith, and sustained me through difficult times.
I'm Dave McCormick. I'm a West Point grad, combat veteran who served in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, and running in the #1 battleground race that WILL decide the Senate majority.
I believe in the power of grassroots support from patriots like you. [That's why I'm taking a risk to ask if you'll consider donating any amount to my campaign.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z50ljnbka7v6ab468q3sg6a1af9j2h67r8gbjcpo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j62o72c5h2bs)
We need leaders in DC with the strength, the will, and the moral clarity to meet the challenges we face. **[So, if you're looking to continue the status quo, I'm not your guy.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zons9i8n77bk8htctclnedkgmjlk65e820u44cng_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j62o72c5h2bs)**
But if you want to change the way things are done in DC, I need your support. Our average online donation is $17.78, and [I would be so grateful if you would generously give that amount today.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zss38imjnl4f27dmdt5dso9lelug7a875q0jvtso_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j62o72c5h2bs)
******************************************************[DONATE](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjr68dakou4ei9gtencbrhk90bnh7d3kmc18hprg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j62o72c5h2bs)******************************************************
**[This race is winnable, but it will be difficult and test the strength and resolve of the simple virtues that make America exceptional: liberty, opportunity, and patriotism.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm1revub4lbjvsqmk7ccp7pv2q098ch3o0ahcd88_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j62o72c5h2bs)**
Please, join me today to fix our broken government & save what makes America worth fighting for.
Dave McCormick
Army Veteran, USMA '87

body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681945%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7jXO788K8Cj7J12HwZLsdA&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681946%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Z%2bGF0q7bs%2foUFAeHGqyQ9Q&sysid=1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681947%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XQUYNrUdhbxByVRJuQWMIg&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681948%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YSQtuXpi7wfc7FOkmMu%2bGg&sysid=1)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z43fle19kj6k61doimk6283c28v9v046dor38m4g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j62p75cjh2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf36roqvg6j876kr6ssnh1gtdu5lpoh5mle8piao_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j62p75cjh2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh9upkhqq15olatim7c6u9216kb8jp2343v42hfg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j62p75cjh2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

GOP Presidential
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z830b6l8cvodmk0c4lfok9o2u42pc28stpka9h48_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp32cpg61pr1c8gq48bi4bh28pr0clgecob4slie49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfbo5vopf6rcbji906rdlba5ro8dmenitn9rmbuo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j62p75cjh2bs)_

body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zupl8d923n35gf3n61crdigmja9okeim9tnskkng_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j62p75cdh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zte6r7h9baencq22veibveq6slv9ptmtgjhjutgo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j62p75cdh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsev686il0nv7djdlkqt2br5np7pm3jvlqdhcm70_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j62p75cdh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk9eum40cp1mqj10fckgne47j2jrfqf963evhj5g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j62p75cdh2bs)

body:

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0q2t5m0d62v3presu184d8t04766pqge3pickq8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j62o73c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've got two quick questions for you:
## 1\. Are you concerned about the American economy right now?
[YES](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9crtunsdk6hqgln537t7vhnsqmrf87hra5anqr0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j62o73c5h2bs) [NO](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh6seuh5a8b23t6c9p6sj5hrrqtb785m8h0lnjmg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j62o73c5h2bs)
## 2\. Are you curious to learn how private citizens drive the economy?
[YES](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z061lh92hbjifsmb4ptiamcqbh670676stutuk0o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j62o73c5h2bs) [NO](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs8lr17shh69frdbn9i74gcgpnrg37i7n9clrbpg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j62o73c5h2bs) If you answered YES to either of these questions, I hope you'll support our free online series, "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

In this series, viewers learn about the role freedom and incentives play in innovation, new jobs, and increased wealth and security. It promises to be an engaging and educational course--perhaps you'll even want to watch it with friends or family.

Friend, remember that this series--like every online course from Hillsdale College--is absolutely free to you, with no obligation or expectation on our part other than that you'll learn from us.

Because of this, we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you a beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the secure link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zde9loih8qb0pe9sen41oli6a6mpqrvm3jf6oqh8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j62o73c5h2bs)

Bill Gray, '01

Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38383%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Qg5Eh37G4WSBXUsDNb4jJw&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38384%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vjF4xryJb5hco1lOiDmjVg&sysid=1)

name: Hillsdale College via American Briefing
subject: Learn economics with Art Laffer
body:
I’ve got two quick questions for you:

| | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf8chpha53jjh00i333a4a6ccd1r03cu41g8ck60_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've got two quick questions for you:
## 1\. Are you concerned about the American economy right now?
[YES](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuf9s4qsetm7q36dgb9rq2ujsr0mkau6sc5re1o0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs) [NO](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6cekmhqv9bi57mfd1hod6q08bkbl5kniqorbrh8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs)
## 2\. Are you curious to learn how private citizens drive the economy?
[YES](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8d6lbv954t2u5g5j9ikjqojh1usu42jklsdra38_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs) [NO](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqj68f2n1246b2rr2ftrhigqq3mda6a1qtj4etn8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs) If you answered YES to either of these questions, I hope you'll support our free online series, "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

In this series, viewers learn about the role freedom and incentives play in innovation, new jobs, and increased wealth and security. It promises to be an engaging and educational course--perhaps you'll even want to watch it with friends or family.

Friend, remember that this series--like every online course from Hillsdale College--is absolutely free to you, with no obligation or expectation on our part other than that you'll learn from us.

Because of this, we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you a beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the secure link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zot886s6r17oud3fp8ndaqcbif6egfv8tkltblao_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs)

So, if you said YES to either of those questions above, I hope you'll say "YES" again to supporting this course. Thank you so much for learning with us--we deeply appreciate you!

Gratefully,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---

American Briefing
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zue1as17npn858i7s9svpo6m74ekek1i46vaik08_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c9j60o77c3h238h1e8he4937c1im1pj0s5h62oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgeaotj1he2kmhvcj6sq95blm41fmne0rk2pvvao_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9r4q1psafphmpggq3eene5dfrqo7rge9iu55rtg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr0clgeco71c9gm49fg)

name: Nikki Haley
subject: This question needs to be answered.
body:
Let me explain what I mean

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm7lk2qpa8n0bv33rsta5rh754t7p3ola8c8qsr8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs)
---

Friend,
_Do you want more of the same, or do you want a new generation of conservative leadership?_

Let me explain what I mean by **" more of the same..."**

Donald Trump and Joe Biden are both politicians of the past and they have more in common than you think.

_-> Seventy percent of Americans don't want another Trump-Biden rematch.
-> Most Americans disapprove of both.
-> Trump and Biden are both about 80 years old.
-> Trump and Biden both put our country trillions of dollars deeper in debt.
-> And Trump and Biden both lack a vision for our country's future . . . because both are consumed by the past, by investigations, and by vendettas and grievances._

**[So I'm asking, do you want to stay stuck in the past or move into a better future?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze6vjseb8neda0or7236b1obqpsmt5qsqipv3rlg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs "So I’m asking, do you want to stay stuck in the past or move into a better future?")**

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3665rnli8aup44jt5eju9suqc1qcdovqnsgrel8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs)
---
| | [SUPPORT A NEW GENERATIONAL LEADER](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4ijam57h165rkbjd3a33ehigni10vrokaqhiukg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs)
---

**America deserves better!**

We deserve a new direction under new conservative leadership.

We deserve a president who will focus on the needs of our people, not on themselves.

We deserve a president who will rebuild our economy, close our border, and stand up to our enemies.

**_And most importantly, we deserve a president who will stop our self-loathing, end the division and fear, and make America strong and proud!_

Our campaign is the last best hope of stopping another Trump-Biden nightmare. **I am committed to the fight, but I cannot do it alone.

**[Will you join me in the fight to save our future?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze4uhfubp930h0ud8bsdct40p8nksh5cvvjvakn0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs "Will you join me in the fight to save our future?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zprva5tj8dg6tgibrfp1gsj6obfa2bvjkepj1g3g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs)
---

Republicans have lost the popular vote in seven of the last eight presidential elections. That is nothing to be proud of. We should want to earn the support of a majority of Americans.

All the evidence shows that if it's a Trump-Biden rematch, it's going to be another tossup election. It could go either way. We could have more disputes over election interference. And Joe Biden could win again, with Kamala Harris waiting in the wings.

Every recent poll shows that when I go head-to-head against Biden, we win in a landslide. **It 's not even close. **

_That means no recounts, no lawsuits, and no doubts._ It means no more Chuck Schumer leading the Senate. No more endless votes for House Speaker because we'll have a huge House majority. We'll term limit the do-nothing Washington politicians. We'll rebuild our economy and secure our border. And make no mistake, we will restore our national pride.

**We are blessed to live in America, and it 's time we remember that.**

As we head into tonight's New Hampshire event, the stakes are high with less than **5 DAYS** out from votes taking place.

But I have one more thing to say before I take the stage for my event... _**" Underestimate Me. That's Always Fun."**_

I am in this to win, and I hope that I can count on having you by my side.

**[Please chip in whatever you can today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr81jidu3dg6tr6s1jnk6q3uirc2c0fcfh4rb9h0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs "Please chip in whatever you can today.")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7ghs5b05j68t2h0qgij4ij9hg9q26lemtr3mav8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs)
---

Together, we will make America strong and proud!

Let's do this!

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3q4dhsmi13gjravq1g8k3d2k33fb67imnrpgri0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs)
---
Nikki Haley

---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfu7ggvpgh0o3scr2qiq236fvn06bntm3fs13gs8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zburoomp0j9hg5ds9g0jsh4h2h768vagfc8s708o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0k9doakugfugn5v56jgk3o4q1vee3alnv55h69o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z47kq7bvmlid045drqk7uu3l2cdu1p33atsiobko_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zha3p9jn25lvae7kdmc6r8bblr8eohsl56vgvbn8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs "DONATE")
---
| | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc.

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrj9poq3du8qedlvb8qlcs6i86p5p2nql9rrcolo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs)
---

**By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. [Terms and conditions](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk8a5guvtk8l032n5e8audcbv20bdf3025sqak8g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs) and [Privacy Policy](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc7tsj7c18tmghd128v1qcua65fn8fu2t4vuhg6o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs).apply. You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. [Privacy Policy](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zijokt42lrvpr3dstid6qfa2c5shpc5ououire60_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs). [Terms and conditions](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd0c1c1te05ucejnf7027shlavukapb60geqajc0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs).

Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals.

186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401
Daniel Island, SC 29492

[Privacy Policy](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z985l0v1dmr00f5su4ojrf7vvlo1fm0neb1i1ld0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs)

GOP Presidential
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zljdcgrif72r0b128n6kd7fr7ngsigk0m8klnb4g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshh6co30stie49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp5ttuel2cv4hmqdgdl9bd07ts2iom67r1k0ohdg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs)_

At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Why are Americans not alarmed by this?
body:
It’s nearly election season.

| [ ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6tjdf385jh8l3gomp5mef9r3b4u5ft5ofofmkd0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs)
---
Fellow American,

It's nearly election season. We hear promises from both sides of the aisle and commitments made to causes the American people rarely agree on.

Surprisingly, however, 7 in 10 Americans agree on this one thing:

**Across our nation, unborn babies should be protected by at least the point when they can feel pain. The latest science proves that unborn babies can feel pain by as early as 15 weeks.**

72% of voters agree on this issue but the American people are still being bombarded with lies and misinformation from Big Abortion and its allies. These "pro-choice" organizations are committed to using misleading information to manipulate women and destroy innocent children for their own gain in this billion-dollar industry.

In their own materials, Planned Parenthood states abortion is "one of the safest medical procedures performed in the United States" and "abortion has over a 99 percent safety record."

But how can this be true when a child's life is snatched from its mother's womb because it's purposefully put to death? Who is telling the American people the truth here?

_**What do you think about this?**_

[My team and I would love to know your opinion about abortion in America.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcim2n2j40ohhcg521i1q57f7vrh36lmcr3usu40_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs) We want to know your answers to questions like these:

Do you believe life begins at conception?

Do you believe abortion is harmful to women?

Do you believe that unborn babies have a right to life?

We want to hear what the American people think and invite you to take our [**Abortion in America Survey**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqionr9rs6o0ka53e73l8rdb43h0qp1t2f86uqoo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs) so we know where you stand.

Take the survey today and let us know if the majority of Americans are being lied to by a deadly industry. Help us find the truth by taking the survey today at the link below. We really want to get 10,000 responses from people just like you!

[https://action.sbaprolife.org/abortion-in-america](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdgl1ntucjiumu0ubv0688elrke1975ip656lv00_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob2c5h2bs)

For _LIFE,
_ Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd4keoo70evljbmu3q5fpeoppag1tk5o354fdbrg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob5c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2ha6j86o7nfoaekmqe5ktkd0i79apbkmmi675i0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob5c9h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrbnm7d34rkefnbk9ie1ltm8u8ittsmi65hrqg58_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob5c9h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpa5h41vcdbdofj3kc0d251qn1ekv36597uibq8o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob5c9h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

---

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I’ve got two quick questions for you:

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8urieu0qe1p01flcj4sgl8plo3gdjvjishj17p0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob4cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've got two quick questions for you:
## 1\. Are you concerned about the American economy right now?
[YES](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4mur9ma1hpt8sssukji27ivf10sg3bppg896stg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob4cph2bs) [NO](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zng88qdsk6c8mo3a0jc8erq6okukljgq401b9vh8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob4cph2bs)
## 2\. Are you curious to learn how private citizens drive the economy?
[YES](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7ejququqh7c5d3b54tl9j5j9vgrgbn9rjeo78p0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob4cph2bs) [NO](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0fptvbfiroo9l7u0rqqsdldioevkhrm745tr5u8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob4cph2bs) If you answered YES to either of these questions, I hope you'll support our free online series, "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

In this series, viewers learn about the role freedom and incentives play in innovation, new jobs, and increased wealth and security. It promises to be an engaging and educational course--perhaps you'll even want to watch it with friends or family.

Friend, remember that this series--like every online course from Hillsdale College--is absolutely free to you, with no obligation or expectation on our part other than that you'll learn from us.

Because of this, we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you a beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the secure link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk2qmjo4icbq8cq0i2de3ip5n0ndi8fn2ckc1g8g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3j61ob4cph2bs)

So, if you said YES to either of those questions above, I hope you'll say "YES" again to supporting this course. Thank you so much for learning with us--we deeply appreciate you!

Gratefully,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College

1600 Daily

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Two Emails! Three Texts! And NO response???
body:
I still haven’t seen your name come through on my petition to require Voter ID in all 50 states.

| |
---
| | | |
**Petition ID: JV839 - Friend
Attempt 1: FAILED TO RESPOND
Attempt 2: RESPONSE PENDING

_[FINAL CALL: Do you support enforcing voter ID laws in all 50 states?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681944%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4Ac8%2bQXTIVTEVKJjfjcydg&sysid=1 "FINAL CALL: Do you support
enforcing voter ID laws in all 50 states?")_**

| | | [ADD YOUR NAME NOW >>](https://secure.winred.com/btvf/voter-id-petition/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20240110_WG-AUN2.103067_t1433116-1043&ex_tid=20240110_WG-AUN2.103067_t1433116-1043&utm_content=tv-au-20240121&xunv=tv-au-20240121 "ADD YOUR NAME NOW >>")
---

Friend,

I’ve emailed you TWICE. And I know my team has sent you at least 3 texts about this!

But I still haven’t seen your name come through on my petition to require Voter ID in all 50 states.

Weeks ago, I began collecting signatures on my petition to enforce voter ID laws in all 50 states. Conservatives across the country stepped up and signed their name to protect our democracy.

But if I don’t receive another 147 signatures before January 31st, I won’t have the grassroots support necessary to protect our democracy and save the integrity of our elections from the Democrats' electioneering scheme.

Friend, four other Republicans in your zip code have already signed their name to secure our elections. _**[Will you add your name now before I pull an updated count first thing tomorrow morning?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681055%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o%2fu7TlRuQ28jSyveW6AzoA&sysid=1 "Will you add your name now
before I pull an updated count first thing tomorrow morning?")**_

Thank you in advance for your attention to this urgent matter!

name: Nikki Haley
subject: You caught my attention, Friend.
body:
I want to extend an invitation to you

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn8ossnukk3ce45auqmsehmv1pernatbgd4p1jt8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o36c9h2bs)
---

_Friend, I'd be honored to have you by my side._

**With just 5 days left before the first-in-the-nation New Hampshire primary,** my team and I are recruiting strong conservatives to join my Ambassador's Circle.

You've proven to be a freedom-loving conservative who is dedicated to fighting for our country's future, and that is exactly the type of person I want by my side!

So, I have an important question to ask you.

**[Will you please join my team as a 2024 Ambassador's Circle Member ahead of the first-in-the-nation New Hampshire primary on January 23?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8ttgea861bcne4o58p574sfl0emqvkhid6s5trg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o36c9h2bs "Will you please join my team as a 2024 Ambassador’s Circle Member ahead of the first-in-the-nation New Hampshire primary on January 23?")**

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd8qn721odo5gtafpblulaprmsgjk63abot5tv2g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o36c9h2bs)
---

All it takes is **[$15 to activate your membership](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5af1ogq9tpv00ba9719leh3lpqtb1bqc8ntqin8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o36c9h2bs "$15 to activate your membership")** and join my exclusive team of patriots who are helping pave the way for a brighter future.

---
| | [ACTIVATE YOUR MEMBERSHIP TODAY](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4gm3h8q8akrlun7q4bkfafh0r0ipeucu2vd4kog_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o36c9h2bs)
---

As an Ambassador's Circle member, you will be unlocking access to:
* **Your very own personalized membership card**
* **Access to exclusive news and updates**
* **Special offers on discounted campaign merchandise**
* **Insider glimpses with behind-the-scenes footage from the campaign trail**
* **And much more...**

It would mean the world to know you are a part of my Ambassador's Circle as I gear up for this critical campaign milestone. Each new member that joins my team will help us build momentum ahead of the first-in-the-nation New Hampshire primary, fuel our fight, and win the battle for our country's future.

---
| | [ACTIVATE YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4hgfgb7t4r7hskmq0437u23liui1utrgdnr81og_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o36c9h2bs)
---

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgvli2k61gsj061s3h0ann7pv917hdsk2699ta60_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o36c9h2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z12ikrji4nb60ahjmob176r4jsb054et420mg2a8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o36c9h2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr74gpntvg64bv898nnfdh9o61m8bimsh8mjk8vo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o36c9h2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zubt6vjuqv414ap4mnva7jg63nenshovts6u3n98_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o36c9h2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zooqf4tf7f5gh73ihmoico2kflv1b9fsgp80rhto_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o36c9h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Ever wonder how transgender children’s books get into schools?
body:
Please forgive me for sending you these images, but you must know what we’re up against.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbrtld9c0e8eaq226r7tqcjlndcjbg2f2hsqtl8g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o32clh2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

Please forgive me for sending you these images, but you must know what we're up against.

Here's how all those morally disgusting books get into our children's schools - Scholastic Book Fairs.

Like me, you probably have fond memories of Scholastic Book Fairs. They were always a day I looked forward to as a child. It was something fun and new and different at school. And even better, I could find a new book.

**But please realize radical leftists have hijacked Scholastic.**

Here are images from the Scholastic book called _Welcome to St. Hell_ , which promotes trans ideology to kids.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zal15qkn0i8bu9aqfhbfu0t83q69pujgp1mifmsg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o32clh2bs)[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7m3gseuoj0nova5q7uu7ka8s9nsichf25jsuuj8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o32clh2bs)

I have a solution. Let's get rid of Scholastic and start a new book fair organization.

SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[Please help us promote new book fairs in schools to replace Scholastic. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward SkyTree? I am hoping to raise $50,000. Click here to donate any amount today >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdebl6gs9pbv9j0df5do7fq839k5e5k3uj2i8890_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o32clh2bs)

[Donate](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9h50qt4a1fhkeanr5866e2l7u6pro9oofin188g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o32clh2bs)

Here's the GOOD news!

We've already started hosting book fairs with SkyTree. We hosted a recent one at a Virginia public school, and it was a huge success! There's no reason our schools need to choose Scholastic when there's a wholesome alternative like SkyTree.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2tr4rbdgdsltu7f94m1ohbge1poaaav9rhuq120_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o32clh2bs)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

SkyTree will bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

It's not complicated!

It's what we grew up with.

Please help us host more book fairs this semester. My goal is to raise $50,000 this month to bring school fairs to more public schools across the country. It costs roughly $4,500 for SkyTree to host a book fair.

[Donate $10 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpe2i5aj4f7kupkjc23ntb1enjhri06aat80l4uo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o32clh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcrkjr3fris853jlo91db3fg9srad8284020765g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o32clh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6tkr9dbevm7v6o0ggjqm0km2t60a8dmk8rkb20g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o32clh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8upnr33dnfhp8sijeim8cjakkcecps44nlcjgo0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o32clh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zofdd5cun3t9ssl6bf71c686ah988lei6jadr06g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o32clh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh6ur8vd9ipoopjkld2qp3q32293dhbnian84neo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o32clh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpn75o8n7hhpggcorpbu80j99licu8m0fj8rt7j8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o32clh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhocnu9rl2adebk7mtu58nc50u64ihq9v7asob2g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35c3gm4o32clh2bs)

Thank you for your continued support as we build institutions promoting our values.

God bless you,

Kirk Cameron

American Action News

subject: Reminder: Put On Your Walking Shoes and Help Mark Distribute His Campaign Literature!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
Keeping You Posted on Mark's Campaign for U.S. Congress
| | | |
---
VOLUNTEER NEWSLETTER

Dear Peter,
Just a reminder about an important date: June 11 is the Nevada Primary, which is only 145 days away. Less than five months. We are hard at work getting Mark's name and what he stands for to as many voters as we can.
As we approach the primary on June 11, we will be doing "lit drops" around CD-1. As you can imagine, we need some help with this big job of delivering Mark's campaign materials to the doorsteps of voters in your neighborhood and all around CD-1. Is this something you might be able to help Mark with? Just click on the reply button and send us your name and phone or email, whichever you prefer, and someone from Mark's campaign will be in touch.
If you have any questions or suggestions or would like to become more active in Mark's campaign in some other way, please feel free to call me, Beth Weddle, Communications Director, 702-526-5934, or just reply to this message. You can also schedule a time to speak with Mark by clicking the link below.
Thanks for reading!
We need your help to beat Dina Titus and make Mark our Congressman from District 1 in 2024.

---

clean_body: Keeping You Posted on Mark's Campaign for U.S. Congress | | | | VOLUNTEER NEWSLETTER Dear Peter, Just a reminder about an important date: June 11 is the Nevada Primary, which is only 145 days away. Less than five months. We are hard at work getting Mark's name and what he stands for to as many voters as we can. As we approach the primary on June 11, we will be doing "lit drops" around CD-1. As you can imagine, we need some help with this big job of delivering Mark's campaign materials to the doorsteps of voters in your neighborhood and all around CD-1. Is this something you might be able to help Mark with? Just click on the reply button and send us your name and phone or email, whichever you prefer, and someone from Mark's campaign will be in touch. If you have any questions or suggestions or would like to become more active in Mark's campaign in some other way, please feel free to call me, Beth Weddle, Communications Director, 702-526-5934, or just reply to this message. You can also schedule a time to speak with Mark by clicking the link below. Thanks for reading! We need your help to beat Dina Titus and make Mark our Congressman from District 1 in 2024. | == | == | == *Mark Robertson retired from the Army. Use of his rank does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Military.* | | | | | | | Robertson For Congress | PO Box 750433, Las Vegas, NV 89136 | | Sent by mailto:mark@robertsonforcongress.com

subject: We need Jacky to win this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
This is important:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T790bf491-cda8-46b6-889b-4101b50350ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

But instead of celebrating this landmark anniversary, we're living with the aftermath of the Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe v. Wade. Since the Court took away this fundamental right, Republicans have banned and restricted abortion in states across the country, and threatened to pass a nationwide abortion ban if they regain Senate control. They've even indicated they plan to go after birth control. In other words, there's a whole lot riding on what happens in Nevada this November. And I can tell you this: My friend Sen. Jacky Rosen is exactly who we want in the Senate to keep fighting for reproductive freedom. Right now, CNN analysts are calling Jacky one of the most vulnerable senators in the race that will likely decide Senate control, and a shady billionaire has already poured $2 million into Nevada to flip her seat for Republicans. Jacky's strong stance on reproductive rights is one of the reasons why the GOP has made her a top target for defeat – and that’s exactly why we need to do everything we possibly can to help her win in Nevada and defend our Democratic Senate majority this year. [So please, Peter, will you join me in supporting Jacky today by making a gift of $10 or more to her and Blue Amp Action now to keep Nevada and the Senate blue and help restore reproductive freedom in America?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T70068656-433e-410e-b34e-248181a3c4dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
