| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tca2d9555-d354-4c67-93b5-3631a6069dce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Dave McCormick
subject: I lift up my eyes to the mountains
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
_[“I lift my eyes to the mountains- where does my help come from? My help comes from the Lord, the maker of heaven and earth.” Psalm 121](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38390%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3AGbga%2ftJ9yJRO2%2f86TqkA&sysid=1)_
Friend,
When I arrived at West Point as a new cadet, I had no idea how much it would transform my life. During my first plebe summer, after a long day of training, a sermon on Psalm 121 made an imprint on my soul, strengthened my faith, and sustained me through difficult times.
I’m Dave McCormick. I’m a West Point grad, combat veteran who served in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, and running in the #1 battleground race that WILL decide the Senate majority.
I believe in the power of grassroots support from patriots like you. [That’s why I’m taking a risk to ask if you’ll consider donating any amount to my campaign.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38391%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aEdSizIt%2bMJFdOMzNBzRig&sysid=1)
We need leaders in DC with the strength, the will, and the moral clarity to meet the challenges we face. **[So, if you’re looking to continue the status quo, I’m not your guy.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38392%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vonodefTcXj3CbHXRd%2bmzA&sysid=1)**
But if you want to change the way things are done in DC, I need your support. Our average online donation is $17.78, and [I would be so grateful if you would generously give that amount today.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38393%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f3ZJVwTsJ7g8Sgb%2blaRqmw&sysid=1)
******************************************************[DONATE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38394%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=es51OQthcg00JibM9OPtXQ&sysid=1)******************************************************
**[This race is winnable, but it will be difficult and test the strength and resolve of the simple virtues that make America exceptional: liberty, opportunity, and patriotism.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38305%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rKkcJQUWeuJHj%2fVVv06gow&sysid=1)**
Please, join me today to fix our broken government & save what makes America worth fighting for.
Dave McCormick
Army Veteran, USMA ‘87

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: South Bay CRA
subject: Jan 22nd meeting New Speaker
body:
Jan 22nd Meeting News Friends, As we stand on the threshold of the 2024 election cycle, the pivotal moment we find ourselves in demands our attenti
| |
---
|
---
# Jan 22nd Meeting
---
---
|
---
# News
Friends,
As we stand on the threshold of the 2024 election cycle, the pivotal moment we find ourselves in demands our attention and active participation. The forthcoming weeks mark the commencement of a journey that will shape the course of our community's future.
In just a matter of weeks, ballots will be distributed, empowering each of us to exercise our fundamental democratic right. To enhance your decision-making process, we invite you to a critical event on the 22nd of this month, where local and state-wide candidates will gather to share their visions, values, and commitments.
This is not just an event; it is an opportunity for you to engage directly with those who aspire to lead and represent us. Your presence at this candidate event is paramount. Don't miss this chance to become an informed and active participant in the democratic process that defines our shared future.
Let us unite in the pursuit of a community strengthened by the collective voice of its constituents. Your attendance on the 22nd will play a crucial role in shaping the narrative of the upcoming election.
We look forward to your participation and the vibrant exchange of ideas that will undoubtedly ensue.
Sincerely,
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com
We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
Door opens at 6:30pm Meeting starts at 6:45
In addition please see the press release statement from my husband Derrick Gates below.
## These Candidates and More! If you are a Candidate you can come and meet and greet the people. Also email us if you want on the schedule for Feb. meeting. People from all over the South Bay attend this meeting.
---
|
---
## We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA Door opens at 6:30pm Meeting starts at 6:45
---
## A message from Derrick Gates
---
Dear friends and fellow Conservatives, I am thrilled to announce that I am running for an official seat on the 66th Assembly District Central Committee. As some of you may know, I have been serving as an alternate on the committee for some time now. Over the past two years, I have also been actively involved in multiple posts within the party. I am proud to have been elected to the California Republican Assembly state board of directors as the Senate director for the 24th District, chaired the Faith Outreach committee for the CRA, and served as a delegate for the California State Party. These experiences have given me a deep understanding of the values and principles that are important to our party and have prepared me to effectively represent our district on the central committee. As a member of the central committee, I will work tirelessly to ensure that conservative values remain at the forefront of our party's agenda. I believe that my position on the LAGOP, which is the largest Republican party office in the nation, will allow me to have a greater impact on decisions that affect our party and our community. I have already been able to influence many decisions as an alternate, and I am confident that I can make an even greater impact as an elected member. While some have urged me to run for the congressional seat of the 36th district, I believe that my calling is to bring balance to the party for the next few years. This will not only benefit the party but also other candidates and myself in the long run. Federal races can be expensive to operate, and I have learned from my previous run for Congress that it takes time to build relationships and secure the support needed to win. My goal is to help fix the foundation of the party while building relationships with those who can help me in the future. I am asking for your prayers and support as I take this important step on my journey. Please look for me on the primary ballot on March 5, 2024. Early voting begins on February 24, 2024. Your vote for me, Derrick R. Gates, for the 66th Assembly Central Committee, will help ensure that our conservative values continue to be represented in our district and beyond. Thank you for your support and dedication to our party. Sincerely,
Derrick R. Gates
[Click for officialderrickgates.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/4872?id=67412.119.1.caedd5371a79896959b176873f264f11)
---
|
---
|
---

clean_body: Jan 22nd Meeting News Friends, As we stand on the threshold of the 2024 election cycle, the pivotal moment we find ourselves in demands our attenti | | | Jan 22nd Meeting | News Friends, As we stand on the threshold of the 2024 election cycle, the pivotal moment we find ourselves in demands our attention and active participation. The forthcoming weeks mark the commencement of a journey that will shape the course of our community's future. In just a matter of weeks, ballots will be distributed, empowering each of us to exercise our fundamental democratic right. To enhance your decision-making process, we invite you to a critical event on the 22nd of this month, where local and state-wide candidates will gather to share their visions, values, and commitments. This is not just an event; it is an opportunity for you to engage directly with those who aspire to lead and represent us. Your presence at this candidate event is paramount. Don't miss this chance to become an informed and active participant in the democratic process that defines our shared future. Let us unite in the pursuit of a community strengthened by the collective voice of its constituents. Your attendance on the 22nd will play a crucial role in shaping the narrative of the upcoming election. We look forward to your participation and the vibrant exchange of ideas that will undoubtedly ensue. Sincerely, Nena Gates President nenarenae2@gmail.com We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA Door opens at 6:30pm Meeting starts at 6:45 In addition please see the press release statement from my husband Derrick Gates below. These Candidates and More! If you are a Candidate you can come and meet and greet the people. Also email us if you want on the schedule for Feb. meeting. People from all over the South Bay attend this meeting. | We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA Door opens at 6:30pm Meeting starts at 6:45 A message from Derrick Gates Dear friends and fellow Conservatives, I am thrilled to announce that I am running for an official seat on the 66th Assembly District Central Committee. As some of you may know, I have been serving as an alternate on the committee for some time now. Over the past two years, I have also been actively involved in multiple posts within the party. I am proud to have been elected to the California Republican Assembly state board of directors as the Senate director for the 24th District, chaired the Faith Outreach committee for the CRA, and served as a delegate for the California State Party. These experiences have given me a deep understanding of the values and principles that are important to our party and have prepared me to effectively represent our district on the central committee. As a member of the central committee, I will work tirelessly to ensure that conservative values remain at the forefront of our party's agenda. I believe that my position on the LAGOP, which is the largest Republican party office in the nation, will allow me to have a greater impact on decisions that affect our party and our community. I have already been able to influence many decisions as an alternate, and I am confident that I can make an even greater impact as an elected member. While some have urged me to run for the congressional seat of the 36th district, I believe that my calling is to bring balance to the party for the next few years. This will not only benefit the party but also other candidates and myself in the long run. Federal races can be expensive to operate, and I have learned from my previous run for Congress that it takes time to build relationships and secure the support needed to win. My goal is to help fix the foundation of the party while building relationships with those who can help me in the future. I am asking for your prayers and support as I take this important step on my journey. Please look for me on the primary ballot on March 5, 2024. Early voting begins on February 24, 2024. Your vote for me, Derrick R. Gates, for the 66th Assembly Central Committee, will help ensure that our conservative values continue to be represented in our district and beyond. Thank you for your support and dedication to our party. Sincerely, Derrick R. Gates | | JOIN THE SBCRA TODAY If you want to Join the fight, you can get started at this link! subject: Jan 22nd New Speaker
body:
News and CRA Endorsment I hope this message finds you well. Building on the recent triumph of our amazing President Donald Trump in the Iowa Caucus,

## News and CRA Endorsment
---
|
---
I hope this message finds you well. Building on the recent triumph of our amazing President Donald Trump in the Iowa Caucus, I am thrilled to share the news of securing the highly esteemed endorsement from the California Republican Assembly.
It is indeed an honor to be aligned with like-minded conservative Republicans who share our mission to Save the Nation. Our commitment extends to restoring the nucleus family, preserving parental rights, safeguarding the right to life, and securing our borders for a stronger future.
Amidst the overwhelming support, I am delighted to announce the upcoming release of my own Voter Guide. As individuals from all corners of the nation seek guidance on their voting decisions, this guide aims to provide clarity and insight into the candidates who resonate with our shared values.
For a more interactive engagement, I invite you to connect with me on social media through the links below. Your active participation and support are crucial as we work together to preserve the principles that define our beautiful nation.
Additionally, if you are in the South Bay, I extend a warm invitation to a candidate event on January 22nd. This gathering will provide an opportunity for meaningful dialogue and collaboration. Further details are outlined below.
Thank you for your continued support. Together, let us actively participate and contribute to the betterment of our great nation.
Best regards,
Instagram: [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=134264.153.1.e0a2b5213165c1b49f9cfcd4297f6d62)
X (Twitter): [X (Twitter)](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=134264.154.1.9aea092eadb687a761ffc4bd0b818e63)
Facebook: [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=134264.155.1.296eb9c94afdd2910148ef7fe21abf91)
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/officialderrickgates/
X (Twitter): https://twitter.com/iamderrickgates
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/derrickgatesforcongress
## Jan 22nd CRA Event
---
|
---
I trust this message finds you well. I am excited to announce my participation, alongside numerous local and state candidates, in an upcoming event at the El Segundo Library on January 22nd.
As we stand on the brink of the 2024 election, the urgency of the times cannot be overstated. In just a matter of weeks, the primary election ballots will be distributed, marking the commencement of a crucial chapter in our democratic journey.
This event serves as a unique opportunity for you to engage directly with the candidates who seek to represent you at various levels of government. Your presence is not merely requested; it is imperative. Don't miss this chance to witness firsthand the perspectives and visions that will shape our community's trajectory.
Join us at the El Segundo Library on January 22nd as we collectively embark on a journey towards a future defined by informed and active civic participation. Together, let us contribute to the vitality of our democratic process.
I am looking forward to your attendance at this significant event.
We are currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
The door opens at 6:30 pm Meeting starts at 6:45
To sow into this please pick one of the below
Paypal www.paypal.me/derrickgates
Cash App $derrickgatesmin
Venmo @Derrick-Gates-4
Zelle 424-244-5206 (Nena Gates)
|
---
## 66th Assembly Central Committee
---
|
---
Dear friends and fellow Conservatives,
I am thrilled to announce that I am running for an official seat on the 66th Assembly District Central Committee. As some of you may know, I have been serving as an alternate on the committee for some time now. Over the past two years, I have also been actively involved in multiple posts within the party. I am proud to have been elected to the California Republican Assembly state board of directors as the Senate director for the 24th District, chaired the Faith Outreach committee for the CRA, and served as a delegate for the California State party. These experiences have given me a deep understanding of the values and principles that are important to our party and have prepared me to effectively represent our district on the central committee.
As a member of the central committee, I will work tirelessly to ensure that conservative values remain at the forefront of our party's agenda. I believe that my position on the LAGOP, which is the largest Republican party office in the nation, will allow me to have a greater impact on decisions that affect our party and our community. I have already been able to influence many decisions as an alternate, and I am confident that I can make an even greater impact as an elected member.
While some have urged me to run for the congressional seat of the 36th district, I believe that my calling is to bring balance to the party for the next few years. This will not only benefit the party but also other candidates and myself in the long run. Federal races can be expensive to operate, and I have learned from my previous run for Congress that it takes time to build relationships and secure the support needed to win. My goal is to help fix the foundation of the party while building relationships with those who can help me in the future.
I am asking for your prayers and support as I take this important step on my journey. Please look for me on the primary ballot on March 5, 2024. Early voting begins on February 24, 2024. Your vote for me, Derrick R. Gates, for the 66th Assembly Central Committee, will help ensure that our conservative values continue to be represented in our district and beyond.
Thank you for your support and dedication to our party.
Sincerely,
Derrick R. Gates
[officialderrickgates.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=134264.156.1.497b2f0801ad655165bcddd65a7edbdf)
---

We are currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA The door opens at 6:30 pm Meeting starts at 6:45 To sow into this please pick one of the below Paypal www.paypal.me/derrickgates Cash App $derrickgatesmin Venmo @Derrick-Gates-4 Zelle 424-244-5206 (Nena Gates) | 66th Assembly Central Committee | Dear friends and fellow Conservatives, I am thrilled to announce that I am running for an official seat on the 66th Assembly District Central Committee. As some of you may know, I have been serving as an alternate on the committee for some time now. Over the past two years, I have also been actively involved in multiple posts within the party. I am proud to have been elected to the California Republican Assembly state board of directors as the Senate director for the 24th District, chaired the Faith Outreach committee for the CRA, and served as a delegate for the California State party. These experiences have given me a deep understanding of the values and principles that are important to our party and have prepared me to effectively represent our district on the central committee. As a member of the central committee, I will work tirelessly to ensure that conservative values remain at the forefront of our party's agenda. I believe that my position on the LAGOP, which is the largest Republican party office in the nation, will allow me to have a greater impact on decisions that affect our party and our community. I have already been able to influence many decisions as an alternate, and I am confident that I can make an even greater impact as an elected member. While some have urged me to run for the congressional seat of the 36th district, I believe that my calling is to bring balance to the party for the next few years. This will not only benefit the party but also other candidates and myself in the long run. Federal races can be expensive to operate, and I have learned from my previous run for Congress that it takes time to build relationships and secure the support needed to win. My goal is to help fix the foundation of the party while building relationships with those who can help me in the future. I am asking for your prayers and support as I take this important step on my journey. Please look for me on the primary ballot on March 5, 2024. Early voting begins on February 24, 2024. Your vote for me, Derrick R. Gates, for the 66th Assembly Central Committee, will help ensure that our conservative values continue to be represented in our district and beyond. Thank you for your support and dedication to our party. Sincerely, Derrick R. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d1c836950d0e4d4a96c4a57afd26d88e&_e=h61MAfuGe30sF9boYu9HsiGmBJDjxdZ3x4nR89RhfG5Vt5he32gQJLlAGSJCrs1L-C75q5KoWB7GOjy_LRVXBkkIMBGxdMEwEDAI-GrfVgSOYRpMCddFt2tfm9YBenfJbdGjRjFPmTH3VpFuru--PYUAlN_cncpLpFur8p7Ja_jkB7phjai7ezfTwuQo6NS__IAgDLK1mtVakRKQfoUeIsdoIDJWVMQNUrK2DerjYam2Q6VeX6HaN4pR_ZAaDTphnGXNEs0zJCPQFzqqYihF8Om8WU12Zzmal-gDEoG3bwt2cgVnp_eks3CXbgDeWknvGQcuh99Qf-svYmBIBnlEOyjCzyR1GpJq1vD0JL0M8nWIJE-_BMDuQOqnwUc-Z-J3Or8nxoaO5rUzZJYRc_ecKr6dCB9j70B9arW1c_Kk1TvRFvrnYmWWGkO-SwhxaNXa)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d1c836950d0e4d4a96c4a57afd26d88e&_e=h61MAfuGe30sF9boYu9HsiGmBJDjxdZ3x4nR89RhfG5Vt5he32gQJLlAGSJCrs1L-C75q5KoWB7GOjy_LRVXBkkIMBGxdMEwEDAI-GrfVgSOYRpMCddFt2tfm9YBenfJbdGjRjFPmTH3VpFuru--PYUAlN_cncpLpFur8p7Ja_jkB7phjai7ezfTwuQo6NS__IAgDLK1mtVakRKQfoUeIsdoIDJWVMQNUrK2DerjYam2Q6VeX6HaN4pR_ZAaDTphnGXNEs0zJCPQFzqqYihF8Om8WU12Zzmal-gDEoG3bwvSLgVbqzMcyKf3sdVUARXspzIMCernNAu0S7eNv6A4L1PrIp6yQ11MES1VCqoV4ESgR8N6KYEXwiuLRw-2mcPUCf-Lp8wJPVlJAppYWemLstBpsI50eJCqlScGDSTEd-aPj0S4d5JBgd8k_uu81eHJ)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d1c836950d0e4d4a96c4a57afd26d88e&_e=h61MAfuGe30sF9boYu9HsiGmBJDjxdZ3x4nR89RhfG5Vt5he32gQJLlAGSJCrs1L-C75q5KoWB7GOjy_LRVXBkkIMBGxdMEwEDAI-GrfVgSOYRpMCddFt2tfm9YBenfJbdGjRjFPmTH3VpFuru--PYUAlN_cncpLpFur8p7Ja_jkB7phjai7ezfTwuQo6NS__IAgDLK1mtVakRKQfoUeIsdoIDJWVMQNUrK2DerjYam2Q6VeX6HaN4pR_ZAaDTphnGXNEs0zJCPQFzqqYihF8Om8WU12Zzmal-gDEoG3bwubXEN3SsoiyrI7jZiCQD1_851X0QbnjGJETCyx3BaBqAKTi4FQBG19GJHWVQ0-KlBX4cGhee1Ux1hCdn-fARs2W9o45ROXhDImKDY1AkHaq9tAjOnaO3fLmHh8P8ZD5wIe941oKCVxaUx45XARFU5g)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d1c836950d0e4d4a96c4a57afd26d88e&_e=h61MAfuGe30sF9boYu9HsiGmBJDjxdZ3x4nR89RhfG5Vt5he32gQJLlAGSJCrs1L-C75q5KoWB7GOjy_LRVXBkkIMBGxdMEwEDAI-GrfVgSOYRpMCddFt2tfm9YBenfJbdGjRjFPmTH3VpFuru--PYUAlN_cncpLpFur8p7Ja_jkB7phjai7ezfTwuQo6NS__IAgDLK1mtVakRKQfoUeIsdoIDJWVMQNUrK2DerjYam2Q6VeX6HaN4pR_ZAaDTphnGXNEs0zJCPQFzqqYihF8Om8WU12Zzmal-gDEoG3bwvu415KIp4gzC0CXhSACUXNJ42qC4htmaNUx9icRuinGxUEsRqJ-YdARte33i57-EOrjtDDgeUtqiqWKhGvi7MTOp2_0uIHzIqWAUabcZdvWeCU8s_UFQfT4sbE-MW30mMUXISKQ0vGG04klGblsiYE).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

name: Dave McCormick
subject: I lift up my eyes to the mountains
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
_["I lift my eyes to the mountains- where does my help come from? My help comes from the Lord, the maker of heaven and earth." Psalm 121](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=880650c2c01c4b06b39e884c70cbecd6&_e=vacSHml31Asa_PAz-R_xf3lSRg9pRAide7fl0SZhxoalQOS8g2Sft38nDisoBZEGzzG00i7_zmDTaxIXCAOKz8Cy4S1qbc-t8GFm0iaVxSMg8bL7geOK_eMC24VDfeKZHzsrYqm37p7VUcAon5AAhXfx9UaDBhItdQ0N9HejzArJiUwkkVNemdqWTbpakEhv4EZkJj99mz__Fmy7f0rrIna3Z8-xMY3yguClTMo6epRY2B1p5szSRk9JzMpz2yjdaYQw6Ecl6b1DAga4SrHoAmdM3digayYKUSTc6TNSgSWhA5a87yr6sqGc0RDACgu5CUybohi93RFxMu8IgHuYXjd6ZRONn9OXvzxuf1myPBzpMzJ6sAP_cidVSkbh8WXe0jeWag8Ac2LKX3MX_lB2AhhAKYviecXqngy6ioUus4ts22gL9ljjp44DBaJymzuA)_
Friend,
When I arrived at West Point as a new cadet, I had no idea how much it would transform my life. During my first plebe summer, after a long day of training, a sermon on Psalm 121 made an imprint on my soul, strengthened my faith, and sustained me through difficult times.
I'm Dave McCormick. I'm a West Point grad, combat veteran who served in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, and running in the #1 battleground race that WILL decide the Senate majority.
I believe in the power of grassroots support from patriots like you. [That's why I'm taking a risk to ask if you'll consider donating any amount to my campaign.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=880650c2c01c4b06b39e884c70cbecd6&_e=vacSHml31Asa_PAz-R_xf3lSRg9pRAide7fl0SZhxoalQOS8g2Sft38nDisoBZEGzzG00i7_zmDTaxIXCAOKz8Cy4S1qbc-t8GFm0iaVxSMg8bL7geOK_eMC24VDfeKZHzsrYqm37p7VUcAon5AAhXfx9UaDBhItdQ0N9HejzArJiUwkkVNemdqWTbpakEhv4EZkJj99mz__Fmy7f0rrIna3Z8-xMY3yguClTMo6epRY2B1p5szSRk9JzMpz2yjdaYQw6Ecl6b1DAga4SrHoAmdM3digayYKUSTc6TNSgSV-T5377G208OrBPbrAPMhKUwerKNUlDsTQxbZojzqsswslDKlZsD--I3OcIxV9pfyTPcnZc0xww_c7a5chcEBvqGQuKvKTcrjeuSVweWls9sbMULqFMwBCEPIcz_7LT_Ify_dYmnzrt6w9ISQ7asKn)
We need leaders in DC with the strength, the will, and the moral clarity to meet the challenges we face. **[So, if you're looking to continue the status quo, I'm not your guy.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=880650c2c01c4b06b39e884c70cbecd6&_e=vacSHml31Asa_PAz-R_xf3lSRg9pRAide7fl0SZhxoalQOS8g2Sft38nDisoBZEGzzG00i7_zmDTaxIXCAOKz8Cy4S1qbc-t8GFm0iaVxSMg8bL7geOK_eMC24VDfeKZHzsrYqm37p7VUcAon5AAhXfx9UaDBhItdQ0N9HejzArJiUwkkVNemdqWTbpakEhv4EZkJj99mz__Fmy7f0rrIna3Z8-xMY3yguClTMo6epRY2B1p5szSRk9JzMpz2yjdaYQw6Ecl6b1DAga4SrHoAmdM3digayYKUSTc6TNSgSW0llPupgwWYZ2Rn008WOiJO8W19SmV14YNWxleDRrVJ6rbT7lTUB9o5CSpQ0YHxNx8Ti9VoUnD_OkzfWM-lDt_l1-_0geUb7nlK66aLgtY87ibIaRxVP2y4sv1vvZ0omdu7MdvmELiyw5aPkUFad6M)**
But if you want to change the way things are done in DC, I need your support. Our average online donation is $17.78, and [I would be so grateful if you would generously give that amount today.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=880650c2c01c4b06b39e884c70cbecd6&_e=vacSHml31Asa_PAz-R_xf3lSRg9pRAide7fl0SZhxoalQOS8g2Sft38nDisoBZEGzzG00i7_zmDTaxIXCAOKz8Cy4S1qbc-t8GFm0iaVxSMg8bL7geOK_eMC24VDfeKZHzsrYqm37p7VUcAon5AAhXfx9UaDBhItdQ0N9HejzArJiUwkkVNemdqWTbpakEhv4EZkJj99mz__Fmy7f0rrIna3Z8-xMY3yguClTMo6epRY2B1p5szSRk9JzMpz2yjdaYQw6Ecl6b1DAga4SrHoAmdM3digayYKUSTc6TNSgSUrzGZnaRTam-WFzze5am061zw6Ny8T1xdgEN8qOYABwrq6gvnLSO_pSUVdsuPdmCUju4qFiX5pwV5HlCOVZACrXblRH-FoQ_ZVlZ5dXSOwpSaxHQ8MG7N3WcY75ShOk65xX7AedU1AE3k6oB4IiHal)
******************************************************[DONATE](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=880650c2c01c4b06b39e884c70cbecd6&_e=vacSHml31Asa_PAz-R_xf3lSRg9pRAide7fl0SZhxoalQOS8g2Sft38nDisoBZEGzzG00i7_zmDTaxIXCAOKz8Cy4S1qbc-t8GFm0iaVxSMg8bL7geOK_eMC24VDfeKZHzsrYqm37p7VUcAon5AAhXfx9UaDBhItdQ0N9HejzArJiUwkkVNemdqWTbpakEhv4EZkJj99mz__Fmy7f0rrIna3Z8-xMY3yguClTMo6epRY2B1p5szSRk9JzMpz2yjdaYQw6Ecl6b1DAga4SrHoAmdM3digayYKUSTc6TNSgSUBlGTlprUZ0GYqepAJALwDwJ8f5W7yYPAmUlgJnrgZTRN3YR66s8BHQ-AxXVYr4oB24RNca1UMIaDCTp4oj-snHZiIeIU8qHtExheeAlA9KMo2PwCHWN4KQgCMDszbnocDQBvh-c0Mcm1ou98eXtRo)******************************************************
**[This race is winnable, but it will be difficult and test the strength and resolve of the simple virtues that make America exceptional: liberty, opportunity, and patriotism.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=880650c2c01c4b06b39e884c70cbecd6&_e=vacSHml31Asa_PAz-R_xf3lSRg9pRAide7fl0SZhxoalQOS8g2Sft38nDisoBZEGzzG00i7_zmDTaxIXCAOKz8Cy4S1qbc-t8GFm0iaVxSMg8bL7geOK_eMC24VDfeKZHzsrYqm37p7VUcAon5AAhXfx9UaDBhItdQ0N9HejzArJiUwkkVNemdqWTbpakEhv4EZkJj99mz__Fmy7f0rrIna3Z8-xMY3yguClTMo6epRY2B1p5szSRk9JzMpz2yjdaYQw6Ecl6b1DAga4SrHoAmdM3digayYKUSTc6TNSgSUdqR4d2pln00vkgl2TheXKR7pAgkRJsajjONBFD5eU1-fRwzd3qLmQYqbh_iFOfC7qxQOCUhR958uVsP8aF5X8pEz91V0clzIR1B5ECkTw5yelfvdf4fr9FLJo63Jyv6_5R71JRzEZghkS7wtzUm6t)**

Dave McCormick

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6fd10e2cfda340b0a7f6cb2db1d3a1c1&_e=mxdvOMANXoa3oq9fp9JgDWEeYuEZg8cHXVBPsGd5eV-HCu7kpJmn2kbQvX5kHPvyLgvDS83iYO2qimmT8mgGN9Ckkz9TAqrjQ8PYm26Wv5WgIJ_prl7kkIRRPVTUXbPYLbN1AoYfNKRDosDN7QFugukw-_acqFkPwh1Jo4Q-WKhVQ4ezkE0oaZRGQLo39a0ot9HQqqcR6fj5mZLyNJwxCqEOSdyW7ty_4YPimNhq6NolTF6PNYlRS9PDvC06ISxmUiFJYqLSKjoMY3j_0WbUnqC3Rsvf5HUuRhhO_qVt_ORgZ9Z8ka9165itzwS3oCB1FVaMMbomjyIHjGXvhBX0ncWzaAx7xVgBKPEMXSsFpIHFFl_WzrXjxl_bVygM85ClUewsIrytu3u3GSwMwzNP3qby6xzE678Ouysn9weHkxmM5xJr-290UXTUk2IMzlBG)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6fd10e2cfda340b0a7f6cb2db1d3a1c1&_e=mxdvOMANXoa3oq9fp9JgDWEeYuEZg8cHXVBPsGd5eV-HCu7kpJmn2kbQvX5kHPvyLgvDS83iYO2qimmT8mgGN9Ckkz9TAqrjQ8PYm26Wv5WgIJ_prl7kkIRRPVTUXbPYLbN1AoYfNKRDosDN7QFugukw-_acqFkPwh1Jo4Q-WKhVQ4ezkE0oaZRGQLo39a0ot9HQqqcR6fj5mZLyNJwxCqEOSdyW7ty_4YPimNhq6NolTF6PNYlRS9PDvC06ISxmUiFJYqLSKjoMY3j_0WbUnl1ZrNN-XJdKihdUzQfytAdFd-mYljXj6EvlD8Ca8uQgNbjbLcZtsTTz44oL69UKY6QXtplZ11cOvpUdq_fJsMmquuP2KwZRzUjSvYkx7CGYu1Tk3jitVAbQZJkE56IHTLcwKzWYml0zWc0tQmPAlwrs0BZoBqt2HU8GPYB1JTk0)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6fd10e2cfda340b0a7f6cb2db1d3a1c1&_e=mxdvOMANXoa3oq9fp9JgDWEeYuEZg8cHXVBPsGd5eV-HCu7kpJmn2kbQvX5kHPvyLgvDS83iYO2qimmT8mgGN9Ckkz9TAqrjQ8PYm26Wv5WgIJ_prl7kkIRRPVTUXbPYLbN1AoYfNKRDosDN7QFugukw-_acqFkPwh1Jo4Q-WKhVQ4ezkE0oaZRGQLo39a0ot9HQqqcR6fj5mZLyNJwxCqEOSdyW7ty_4YPimNhq6NolTF6PNYlRS9PDvC06ISxmUiFJYqLSKjoMY3j_0WbUnkAy3rdL9LyMzGKfHqMe0SF1zOf1_36gWwoaTCSKB-Mbz6L8UH6pffZZdOvmXJJXrGTixgM5gr4uv68iTbNwXCt28ETv8xeFi2LITDPnfPYxGn-l4c7WrYSu7dixDbzQQce-5UJG22EBQHCCeUw8-IeYv12U38qEhEMYEJZj-SZR)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____

| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**

The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3ab457b9d2784bbe81c046c393b8995e&_e=WSMmJDS2LrNNMUu9t18a4bmd4VJ7LtX1BOunRE7Dl5oijuuvegSf3TtwXagnKIFivSkn9xZPJCcW7tRe9FaGIfQab4dhz7WBz5KTtW5KdslQjluBbSLTJ1vMnskageMVIDqA-2jcYbLaI5m4EPFUMutlOvUBS1zzpj2C-p7bsorHQuQ0AL-4HFU27QYwNffEJO6-XBft0CNZJGN_4l5kgQ_8SIN-tclXTdRCoXXeugQ-WnE1zoLgRxWASZj_9RhE3yT66L54UiogsFWBN3WUsKLesHrsTnNI0WC_JSWVhHOMCdFgkgxq084KV4i9s2dm) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3ab457b9d2784bbe81c046c393b8995e&_e=WSMmJDS2LrNNMUu9t18a4bmd4VJ7LtX1BOunRE7Dl5oijuuvegSf3TtwXagnKIFivSkn9xZPJCcW7tRe9FaGIfQab4dhz7WBz5KTtW5KdslQjluBbSLTJ1vMnskageMVIDqA-2jcYbLaI5m4EPFUMoredV7NSyun_rwEwcmkv1y1EcdCsC1bQlrVwNUW7LheaxXZTSHhAZ5u8l0griZqw_wJBoTtwPVU7bluF0XvcOe7gVgWz4svY45xVS8HYGsld45pjb1ahlwnhZoA8QtXLxs9VHEOQRWIf9V48u2maCzirPBi8uB-NRNnPYhCgGnc) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3ab457b9d2784bbe81c046c393b8995e&_e=WSMmJDS2LrNNMUu9t18a4bmd4VJ7LtX1BOunRE7Dl5oijuuvegSf3TtwXagnKIFivSkn9xZPJCcW7tRe9FaGIfQab4dhz7WBz5KTtW5KdslQjluBbSLTJ1vMnskageMVIDqA-2jcYbLaI5m4EPFUMnzTfyd6yF-acL4i7fOZXfhIVdrkKgbWD3npOsyI9CtThHgRGo2EQmvD1myces-6zvncgZNAkC1Log-awKxSlS8UwCJ8aEDfMZt3JbjCz9miGUlK2dog46EEMqgVyIp0Ar_xbmy6WyqTHZNEvdD5dzgPhFT5T5gNdkHjWUVYCeJg). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3ab457b9d2784bbe81c046c393b8995e&_e=WSMmJDS2LrNNMUu9t18a4bmd4VJ7LtX1BOunRE7Dl5oijuuvegSf3TtwXagnKIFivSkn9xZPJCcW7tRe9FaGIfQab4dhz7WBz5KTtW5KdslQjluBbSLTJ1vMnskageMVIDqA-2jcYbLaI5m4EPFUMsOPMur37yjLlKxSSloT2lYawIZzHGWVnIZJw7hyBIIl4hVj2hZGglzsvEFzJ1QhDgqRCG-swFRzuPijtnpCpPUuo_kBBaCfKfeHKGjyDAC9ppriZ-EIWYLdbWw2ZVIAFFX2mbTXJtWTVOurpQInX1d_U-wJQnC7fHRbF8PIPDf8)

clean_body: Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs... FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs... FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. And then BOOM! Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out. Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. But that's not why this generator is going viral... National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months! Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Despite this clear and present danger... Our Government is Woefully Unprepared They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the . THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever. And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on Fox & Friends... And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now. Demand is surging... "It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE." Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aae4e45987704faa8f2962c1fafc3336&_e=_rh0ppXbgOUZTjl8UDY2Q5JARh75lfZZaHfrn369TVL7SHpuhNCN9dc4wtVl28mkKZFWrMvHC8YSUbOBnY9FiJbNL7U6jgHwt8dLG1uB_z9MWZqUzX5-y4OrQT9AVGcDXKzXslSrJRIeLlFY6eER5P7VDaTzplcbKtcgvnhoaY65vdeZ8aHo3zb7WekJGpsUnDtIxVwFzc2BgY7NU-aSDbGBnw7DeE7YgzHm_uOi9zjUWhfuvV2266Ym4di_6skPbPd299Cmq2wt6uXo4wbIfFMkWwA7-L7nzEwggp1bxHgXRpIrcNBhIRGofSVTGWSSuOU-MkioNHR2D7j8JanSwhpqsh-x8E27msHkhMgCXGBgZR1i3RWUiwRRJ4n7pHrli7H0yDool6VCJZkV1RumEh7CdqM22Cv1QYGXTlskFJms3FK56dQ8fgz1VeNeACNn)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aae4e45987704faa8f2962c1fafc3336&_e=_rh0ppXbgOUZTjl8UDY2Q5JARh75lfZZaHfrn369TVL7SHpuhNCN9dc4wtVl28mkKZFWrMvHC8YSUbOBnY9FiJbNL7U6jgHwt8dLG1uB_z9MWZqUzX5-y4OrQT9AVGcDXKzXslSrJRIeLlFY6eER5P7VDaTzplcbKtcgvnhoaY65vdeZ8aHo3zb7WekJGpsUnDtIxVwFzc2BgY7NU-aSDbGBnw7DeE7YgzHm_uOi9zjUWhfuvV2266Ym4di_6skPbPd299Cmq2wt6uXo4wbIfFMkWwA7-L7nzEwggp1bxHijlO2xfW-dhRpDznyhiVwsiuG-b5Ywod0iIESTkJfvBbrsHdeAc8Aylz9vdWBAoGp53475PrmGPgRXt07_FeBP-d4de1vVJsZhKgTSNpv9V6l83u_MUuoNZLyivYoQMJzFj_RrBkttVFwT4Ltowhfj)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aae4e45987704faa8f2962c1fafc3336&_e=_rh0ppXbgOUZTjl8UDY2Q5JARh75lfZZaHfrn369TVL7SHpuhNCN9dc4wtVl28mkKZFWrMvHC8YSUbOBnY9FiJbNL7U6jgHwt8dLG1uB_z9MWZqUzX5-y4OrQT9AVGcDXKzXslSrJRIeLlFY6eER5P7VDaTzplcbKtcgvnhoaY65vdeZ8aHo3zb7WekJGpsUnDtIxVwFzc2BgY7NU-aSDbGBnw7DeE7YgzHm_uOi9zjUWhfuvV2266Ym4di_6skPbPd299Cmq2wt6uXo4wbIfFMkWwA7-L7nzEwggp1bxHhEGEr0TYQvnTmgW_wm3h-IeFuIoq_VOqqgF0pKwvbyz9veoNXhYdVQc8cy7NjPZz5jv3vi2nLK2QbKNIBPVFnd_U-BxlLyknG0br1Hd3pWitb03gdqURQBQyhSdl2axqwcq0atWAr2ovhjNb7M58O5)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____

| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=71ea347027744e4db4786b240e1908ce&_e=8xL-2Tay-dv4KvP8XRpB9aJn4L5hpeE5oeneE6uRZut5UsEnvQLGktSNs8TiOrrkf8KRPA4cb4RpFStWMkZu4oL-ZBdWLnLi8YP1Yxdbve_8qRwPrT8rIc8h3abwxh3sfK_X5XdroXDvOAO0Z5YaC8_It8n7GHaLMK4eDo_gjgvUGKdb0YujdFwBAbSsigEuw_eR7t5bOzdUqVnGP2dNr1fCj94Z8iTL-Gy9ERNzjUZICKb2HksWU7hYfKfzxwQHbm8ZEL-Q18CTeWuLOiBd4j4EYgzcpM2J--IL8QMoEt8KqdDTpySbpca1W6eDsUQc) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=71ea347027744e4db4786b240e1908ce&_e=8xL-2Tay-dv4KvP8XRpB9aJn4L5hpeE5oeneE6uRZut5UsEnvQLGktSNs8TiOrrkf8KRPA4cb4RpFStWMkZu4oL-ZBdWLnLi8YP1Yxdbve_8qRwPrT8rIc8h3abwxh3sfK_X5XdroXDvOAO0Z5YaC0Yxuq-bcolKMXSb28AdEjDYbcApa5dov7rx3HN5dBHVpM4VJh7LsbIVDqYu_hRIhREPlR1PlHzO0KVxSj3HdS5Ob348o7u8RPGw3glB5EfkgcJ4oKVoQOwUAeo3PpK5invaAy5WGpgJw6DWP8KmT73iIU8YOUsCTJ10f4XvUr-7) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=71ea347027744e4db4786b240e1908ce&_e=8xL-2Tay-dv4KvP8XRpB9aJn4L5hpeE5oeneE6uRZut5UsEnvQLGktSNs8TiOrrkf8KRPA4cb4RpFStWMkZu4oL-ZBdWLnLi8YP1Yxdbve_8qRwPrT8rIc8h3abwxh3sfK_X5XdroXDvOAO0Z5YaC0udFVnLiF4tD449YJfHqAVRKIIwQnKlRdRg1V3a-S5C-5WDU5LKO-bM82XHpVYOTsLuS_mgT5zV3TLamTp0qt_hpmFt9Q-f7QmO5QdjSkOimsfbKV1eTtfEoemP_jVnFPyN1JbW84bbT0mTJQN3Lo-G-oHULR0Tpu7s9S7jOE-w). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=71ea347027744e4db4786b240e1908ce&_e=8xL-2Tay-dv4KvP8XRpB9aJn4L5hpeE5oeneE6uRZut5UsEnvQLGktSNs8TiOrrkf8KRPA4cb4RpFStWMkZu4oL-ZBdWLnLi8YP1Yxdbve_8qRwPrT8rIc8h3abwxh3sfK_X5XdroXDvOAO0Z5YaC8GjIABOiejORH792VADgi6dLvd1CItXhScletrJbXEiyAByGK-9YGZQGhX8tl4HARCDMKhllS9CPFlJGTjoXto0THRhWNTWJozTcQxVCK2Kb8aizf25FTInOZpGLDIZDfCuTXYRPQiIcZQda2JgRp4KqkTMVjWsg8z3V0km240A)

name: Dave McCormick
subject: I lift up my eyes to the mountains
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
_["I lift my eyes to the mountains- where does my help come from? My help comes from the Lord, the maker of heaven and earth." Psalm 121](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=28ab82184e7d4a65bb9ae1f381e0664e&_e=TZhwHgeL6hV40yoAKhcFVpfuiVTqAKd-611jsGkWx8-vug3VEhyHR9VA8jQ2Okr1t0UesiQsVJmPzqp3zgkUWVUGTCLx-eQ4U9iUqoBCs6-LCrGtAF-f1nAizMHJWRmlcCE_IuUDGmliVcD5V9wdXc650XizQI0bN9UEXIE9o7uqEZm94XCVU7KYXVoEacN3ivco0BRr88ca64ms-uA5u7ecydQtFBHswPo-6ZuWQYw9YSzEILMe7eOsyuktbK4btOriJOIWOF83J-pS-ysbz_x-zZcsV_CofSI-mxDhw14cyqGCbg7xJFpGZripDPWhjTJRb9T0QteyB2e9nJ9Q3wqO4idA1nL4EsNlAA9OEPNXH0A_FaAkXNG4tGSzAFwabBpLVObMOkRoi0JXszWvEyZdTu8IfFgLAeynTYzHo-D5Dphk2Nqu0AxbROGV47-f)_
Friend,
When I arrived at West Point as a new cadet, I had no idea how much it would transform my life. During my first plebe summer, after a long day of training, a sermon on Psalm 121 made an imprint on my soul, strengthened my faith, and sustained me through difficult times.
I'm Dave McCormick. I'm a West Point grad, combat veteran who served in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, and running in the #1 battleground race that WILL decide the Senate majority.
I believe in the power of grassroots support from patriots like you. [That's why I'm taking a risk to ask if you'll consider donating any amount to my campaign.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=28ab82184e7d4a65bb9ae1f381e0664e&_e=TZhwHgeL6hV40yoAKhcFVpfuiVTqAKd-611jsGkWx8-vug3VEhyHR9VA8jQ2Okr1t0UesiQsVJmPzqp3zgkUWVUGTCLx-eQ4U9iUqoBCs6-LCrGtAF-f1nAizMHJWRmlcCE_IuUDGmliVcD5V9wdXc650XizQI0bN9UEXIE9o7uqEZm94XCVU7KYXVoEacN3ivco0BRr88ca64ms-uA5u7ecydQtFBHswPo-6ZuWQYw9YSzEILMe7eOsyuktbK4btOriJOIWOF83J-pS-ysbz_x-zZcsV_CofSI-mxDhw16s_8i5EsMt9MUX7R7JmiiE4rNepy-fpoZDDUH6CVamWhEHtwH9AJg9GQWz7jLpyTN6sHGFN0p609dx59uycZRrVM7Kn0xKXj6rMUV6TQ3xQ4aIP9D2wj7om0y590vsantxY4rIEvl2QUZtSPoh0gqn)

name: David Hogg
subject: You don’t have to be obsessed with politics to know our country is in a bad place.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Hey Peter, can I get minute of your time today for something important?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3aa60e6c-32d8-4735-aae1-4811e2b80781/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | Hey, Peter, thanks for opening this email. I know a lot is going on, so I appreciate it. It’s a little long, but it’s from the heart, and it’s important. You don’t have to be obsessed with politics or watching the news 24/7 to know our country is in a bad place. Horrific violence in the Middle East. A Republican Party that has gone so far off the rails they could barely elect a Speaker. The leading Republican candidate for president is Donald Trump! And then we have unspeakable atrocities like the mass shooting in Maine because our “leaders” refuse to act. And many people talk about how Trump is a major threat to democracy and he is — but I believe there is an even greater and more long-term threat \- hopelessness. When I was knocking doors for Leaders We Deserve-endorsed candidate Nadarius Clark for the Virginia elections, the most concerning answer I got when I asked if people were voting was, “No, I don’t believe in voting” or “No all politics is corrupt and my vote doesn’t matter.” This scares me because things can never get better if we continue electing people who say “government doesn't work” who then get elected and make it not work. I’m deeply worried about us. And it’s not because I’m anti-America. It’s because I love this country and I desperately want to see us do better. We’re not going to fix this mess overnight. But we do have a plan. A group of us just launched Leaders We Deserve. We started it because we know that young progressive leaders can change the future of this country for the better by giving us what we need most to get through this moment of democratic backsliding, HOPE. We can elect more young leaders like Nadarius Clark, but we can ONLY do it if enough of us get behind them. For us to give the school shooting generation the hope it needs to secure the future of our democracy and build a more perfect union, we must get to work electing the next generation of morally just leaders who put kids first and the NRA out of business. The truth is that young progressive candidates who are running for office face huge barriers. The average age of our elected officials is astronomical. That’s because our election system favors those who are older, wealthy, and white. In 2020, Millennial and Gen-Z individuals only held 21% of State Legislative seats despite representing 45% of the electorate. We launched Leaders We Deserve specifically to coalesce support from millions of Americans who believe in the promise of this younger generation. Here’s our plan:
* Find young progressives who are willing to run for Congress and state legislatures.
* Equip their campaigns with messaging, scheduling, and budget tools they need to win.
* And most importantly, raise funds from our massive national network (hey, that’s you!) to allow them to go toe-to-toe with their opponents and WIN.

Peter, if we succeed, ten years from now we’ll have shifted the politics of this nation dramatically. Young, progressive leaders will make up their fair share of the legislative and congressional seats, allowing us to right the ship and build the future we deserve. But what we do right now will determine whether or not that vision comes to pass. We can’t just muddle along raising a couple hundred thousand dollars here and there. We’ll actually have to raise tens of millions of dollars from grassroots donors like you to get the breadth and scale we need to win in all corners of the country. Here’s what I need from you for our plan to work. – If you are blessed with the financial ability to make a really big donation (like $500 or more), please do so right now to help us make this vision a reality. [Click here if you are fortunate enough to give $500 or more.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta78c749c-41e7-43fc-9cc9-37dbc9d810c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) – If you can give a small donation each month, that makes a big impact too. [Click here if you think you can commit to a $25 monthly donation (or something like that).](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6cee41c8-b436-4465-8ca2-a2c7d0d88b32/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) – If you can’t give big and you can’t give monthly, that’s totally OK (most people can’t). [Click here to just give a one time donation of whatever you can afford.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te0d63479-a86f-470c-9d9c-372decdd5ae4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) – Last but not least, if you can’t chip in at all, I completely understand. All I ask is that you forward this email to three friends who might be aligned with our cause. I hope this fundraiser is as successful as I know it can be. I hope that we look back at this moment in ten years and say THIS is when everything started to change. If you have any questions at all about Leaders We Deserve, please check out our website or get in touch with us on social media. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for reading today. \- David Hogg
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T32abf263-9beb-4559-bd71-c363151a8ec7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208

body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd92833feb894060bb03a72fd5012a55&_e=8BBYHElu4QNBaKrR3lG8r0ARL4sgRmDD18AuQFULD46sAxIBtyJAaOR23UnZWOujlqUnHyCRBR-Few36c5pkRwSA0AKPxlt1xUi6De1ouspohFC0JJYnX99VWYrUIEry4wdDgVGJRU-D0LrSJlq7uJEasklCkLW9DfjDtl4MRAMeO7vKAJ45F09u5VmLEINOCQIGyTH3Jo6p_r4PVCjTO4VRykojc44YsO7vfi27nyc9IqodrDnORMmY5UY0_Zj7SelHd7I88AqsXo6QuUtv4_Pv-i7cHkX-ol_6I4DNI7Z3pwZ9Wo_YuFMVNrbYQtdy) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd92833feb894060bb03a72fd5012a55&_e=8BBYHElu4QNBaKrR3lG8r0ARL4sgRmDD18AuQFULD46sAxIBtyJAaOR23UnZWOujlqUnHyCRBR-Few36c5pkRwSA0AKPxlt1xUi6De1ouspohFC0JJYnX99VWYrUIEry4wdDgVGJRU-D0LrSJlq7uB4dWP-AsRAUdoeYcOns6-YZ7oQuiujzjGJJ0cUHJwlNs_pzY0lfURVUoQqc9pw1EKJ8yFooWf_8QpBihbcmmQIkdX8aznSJ0-YStybKq7875GfWt8taYvucJP7JbhcdzDoJw7f18zDvmpD3A-TuPKHaFklwVjpqzz3BTNkGGbYW) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd92833feb894060bb03a72fd5012a55&_e=8BBYHElu4QNBaKrR3lG8r0ARL4sgRmDD18AuQFULD46sAxIBtyJAaOR23UnZWOujlqUnHyCRBR-Few36c5pkRwSA0AKPxlt1xUi6De1ouspohFC0JJYnX99VWYrUIEry4wdDgVGJRU-D0LrSJlq7uF8vhuw84NrDYhYI7D2QdiAMkDwm7mcfJnhI2-K9DXSEP7250NtOF6N4zMxF6q13csEG4Iejt6ywQM1VkMlAEb5pk2zhdrwM9KolfpzXoM-AxQm0-8D4yctOeT73YYmWo4t75FRtWTGOBYdiY0pQGJVma0shpMDhnkREWK-j99V_). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd92833feb894060bb03a72fd5012a55&_e=8BBYHElu4QNBaKrR3lG8r0ARL4sgRmDD18AuQFULD46sAxIBtyJAaOR23UnZWOujlqUnHyCRBR-Few36c5pkRwSA0AKPxlt1xUi6De1ouspohFC0JJYnX99VWYrUIEry4wdDgVGJRU-D0LrSJlq7uC1D1uBcEXByaI9DlZypbJCwL7dHPDn_nBCO1qUtJfCfAtQ4Z6jzpOLShCZVDwenoYeE0Jw4Vgd8txrClDZdwjM3DrB1v7YlKfsSjFU4V_QZTvcFPAt1WSNjm9PXuFZL3ncyD56T5mlSV7XDhcUvoPUt84Lka5qXkqc5oYsIJPln)

I've got two quick questions for you:
## 1\. Are you concerned about the American economy right now?
[YES](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9ee12894619b4a08998dfea934bad731&_e=e37lmc5d3fcuwUfiM-vVO3Weq-k5uG2o4Ir0OAOm1KTE-uTs99AbZk0b5AJ-3yIdbW__mjedsYLmBII-K_lnQyTrVgtlHRDqLi1jXV5noPeYXvsX3s96ICZCQE0AjVuw79bLQetAzAcA8U5YRnP4_4I6CfyKY4ThcNQKsf52tYZOIDFkPvZ7e-lFA89teX3dvZeviRyz6lnTv1KXHGdBkDuIgLEmVQOchZkys1-Ij2WSGv7KLixTlY4yyO_Hl3QDzjYCLdINmFC4xrgBKW2nuNi0TEQPLi7JLtMcMTCdIc3tzAvBh4U38Vh3e5zbfUTAt4BRwXC7mJ14YzGde0gf7vOTjZxzPTGaHJbBH5L1IFpQh4elgq5sutIzDWIs2_Yt0b1xdK7ZnKk6lTQMZdePG-ytcdY1EqCS78GY4mvWKUX95Bc9ic1AVkJIE13ZHPWt) [NO](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9ee12894619b4a08998dfea934bad731&_e=e37lmc5d3fcuwUfiM-vVO3Weq-k5uG2o4Ir0OAOm1KTE-uTs99AbZk0b5AJ-3yIdbW__mjedsYLmBII-K_lnQyTrVgtlHRDqLi1jXV5noPeYXvsX3s96ICZCQE0AjVuw79bLQetAzAcA8U5YRnP4_4I6CfyKY4ThcNQKsf52tYZOIDFkPvZ7e-lFA89teX3dvZeviRyz6lnTv1KXHGdBkDuIgLEmVQOchZkys1-Ij2WSGv7KLixTlY4yyO_Hl3QDzjYCLdINmFC4xrgBKW2nuNi0TEQPLi7JLtMcMTCdIc2EFYgN3jhrUDPKHGhws_aRJ90rRz9eOht2WvCqs1xmvAopRUMDMQhyAgrsqz6-qDykq2FdLWq9knL2C6xcFRu_QlD-i7RtU22LBbfY_FqLcFJytkOt1Gv48J8zvthmps6-rTvBdmUBd5ELv49gk5VH)
## 2\. Are you curious to learn how private citizens drive the economy?

In this series, viewers learn about the role freedom and incentives play in innovation, new jobs, and increased wealth and security. It promises to be an engaging and educational course--perhaps you'll even want to watch it with friends or family.

Friend, remember that this series--like every online course from Hillsdale College--is absolutely free to you, with no obligation or expectation on our part other than that you'll learn from us.

Because of this, we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you a beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the secure link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9ee12894619b4a08998dfea934bad731&_e=e37lmc5d3fcuwUfiM-vVO3Weq-k5uG2o4Ir0OAOm1KTE-uTs99AbZk0b5AJ-3yIdbW__mjedsYLmBII-K_lnQyTrVgtlHRDqLi1jXV5noPeYXvsX3s96ICZCQE0AjVuw79bLQetAzAcA8U5YRnP4_4I6CfyKY4ThcNQKsf52tYZOIDFkPvZ7e-lFA89teX3dvZeviRyz6lnTv1KXHGdBkDuIgLEmVQOchZkys1-Ij2WSGv7KLixTlY4yyO_Hl3QDzjYCLdINmFC4xrgBKW2nuNi0TEQPLi7JLtMcMTCdIc05dW-MCl5tgPG7d7Jik7OmZ12QeFxHJ0uukkpuUAMMJ7X6DkJJapWQRpG2RKyYeyAkNLmnatCZON-vkqKgHvD4neJgfiTyfE9HyCkTjh3IfnmABUSGV2930sfzVrhDsf7pCTF2Ne_lBBylNe0IGzo-)

So, if you said YES to either of those questions above, I hope you'll say "YES" again to supporting this course. Thank you so much for learning with us--we deeply appreciate you!

Gratefully,

Bill Gray, '01

body:
It’s nearly election season.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb

| [ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/dMEm1pV6Je7_Q05hn0Wb6g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnj62IP0S3aHR0cHM6Ly9hY3Rpb24uc2JhcHJvbGlmZS5vcmcvYWJvcnRpb24taW4tYW1lcmljYT91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249YWJvcnRpb25faW5fYW1lcmljYSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmYXBwZWFsX2lkPTEwMTgmcGFja2FnZV9pZD0yNTE5NSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1ST04zLTIwMjQwMTIxVwNzcGNCCmWiMxKtZRw_j1FSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

Fellow American,

It's nearly election season. We hear promises from both sides of the aisle and commitments made to causes the American people rarely agree on.

Surprisingly, however, 7 in 10 Americans agree on this one thing:

**Across our nation, unborn babies should be protected by at least the point when they can feel pain. The latest science proves that unborn babies can feel pain by as early as 15 weeks.**

72% of voters agree on this issue but the American people are still being bombarded with lies and misinformation from Big Abortion and its allies. These "pro-choice" organizations are committed to using misleading information to manipulate women and destroy innocent children for their own gain in this billion-dollar industry.

In their own materials, Planned Parenthood states abortion is "one of the safest medical procedures performed in the United States" and "abortion has over a 99 percent safety record."

But how can this be true when a child's life is snatched from its mother's womb because it's purposefully put to death? Who is telling the American people the truth here?

_**What do you think about this?**_

[My team and I would love to know your opinion about abortion in America.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/dMEm1pV6Je7_Q05hn0Wb6g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnj62IP0S3aHR0cHM6Ly9hY3Rpb24uc2JhcHJvbGlmZS5vcmcvYWJvcnRpb24taW4tYW1lcmljYT91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249YWJvcnRpb25faW5fYW1lcmljYSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmYXBwZWFsX2lkPTEwMTgmcGFja2FnZV9pZD0yNTE5NSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1ST04zLTIwMjQwMTIxVwNzcGNCCmWiMxKtZRw_j1FSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) We want to know your answers to questions like these:

Do you believe life begins at conception?

Do you believe abortion is harmful to women?

Do you believe that unborn babies have a right to life?

We want to hear what the American people think and invite you to take our [**Abortion in America Survey**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/dMEm1pV6Je7_Q05hn0Wb6g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnj62IP0S3aHR0cHM6Ly9hY3Rpb24uc2JhcHJvbGlmZS5vcmcvYWJvcnRpb24taW4tYW1lcmljYT91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249YWJvcnRpb25faW5fYW1lcmljYSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmYXBwZWFsX2lkPTEwMTgmcGFja2FnZV9pZD0yNTE5NSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1ST04zLTIwMjQwMTIxVwNzcGNCCmWiMxKtZRw_j1FSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) so we know where you stand.

Take the survey today and let us know if the majority of Americans are being lied to by a deadly industry. Help us find the truth by taking the survey today at the link below. We really want to get 10,000 responses from people just like you!

[https://action.sbaprolife.org/abortion-in-america](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/dMEm1pV6Je7_Q05hn0Wb6g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnj62IP0S3aHR0cHM6Ly9hY3Rpb24uc2JhcHJvbGlmZS5vcmcvYWJvcnRpb24taW4tYW1lcmljYT91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249YWJvcnRpb25faW5fYW1lcmljYSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmYXBwZWFsX2lkPTEwMTgmcGFja2FnZV9pZD0yNTE5NSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1ST04zLTIwMjQwMTIxVwNzcGNCCmWiMxKtZRw_j1FSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

For _LIFE,
_ Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.

Arlington, VA, 22206
