name: Dave McCormick
subject: I lift up my eyes to the mountains
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
_["I lift my eyes to the mountains- where does my help come from? My help comes from the Lord, the maker of heaven and earth." Psalm 121](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fee41f0fe17a4e1a9f21bd5b820ebaa5&_e=V2xzcyPr_DAgvAIOqgreclB2BTHcRoQ0WB8MKLnZTxRcB01VCKk--ox8SzOZ_WrTkdNq_OsiIkDU1k4rOes0IZQ0TBQsbBjod1H0APFEv94KIA7FLeE5VN5JiSsC87n3L8B4YPc8BNN1V23pnCF7w3n89YOSGU5_V4lmkqvv-yfn17-HaoJTyzPklTGVBvlKT6M0dL3tZeyPqYYXmBG8VN3HLs47uCuUPTCMqsL-QopH7A_0WyjgblehAD4n_2zRNastPPRKm_D2BUJk0GOl06kzkUrW3RKBIGJWOzOdqPdhqJLggNhH77i9VyIQUyI5icf3dSMsakGm5Acdp_vdg6AjIxXiLM6p-uiTQk2khIpM_r04n0BgZ9OHMDm1dlftyp6uRPrLbK_nwXzGB01mRNnYcFANyOxFJnE3RIKqb1FtyPVpTh0V90GBRl6tlihK)_
Friend,
When I arrived at West Point as a new cadet, I had no idea how much it would transform my life. During my first plebe summer, after a long day of training, a sermon on Psalm 121 made an imprint on my soul, strengthened my faith, and sustained me through difficult times.
I'm Dave McCormick. I'm a West Point grad, combat veteran who served in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, and running in the #1 battleground race that WILL decide the Senate majority.
I believe in the power of grassroots support from patriots like you. [That's why I'm taking a risk to ask if you'll consider donating any amount to my campaign.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fee41f0fe17a4e1a9f21bd5b820ebaa5&_e=V2xzcyPr_DAgvAIOqgreclB2BTHcRoQ0WB8MKLnZTxRcB01VCKk--ox8SzOZ_WrTkdNq_OsiIkDU1k4rOes0IZQ0TBQsbBjod1H0APFEv94KIA7FLeE5VN5JiSsC87n3L8B4YPc8BNN1V23pnCF7w3n89YOSGU5_V4lmkqvv-yfn17-HaoJTyzPklTGVBvlKT6M0dL3tZeyPqYYXmBG8VN3HLs47uCuUPTCMqsL-QopH7A_0WyjgblehAD4n_2zRNastPPRKm_D2BUJk0GOl06kzkUrW3RKBIGJWOzOdqPdRo_p2sjOsfFNowCdsDqiwXgwAwf27o2rVQTo_eP5v3OSDthlKPj9mciH73R921ERgXyTjoQB_bI0k6w3LHKv18hEd4EcT5fsxtt5xNFQ3KNFb1i60sC4C9VvBHa_xaaOdktpb1jJMYLTDGAGLZBim)
We need leaders in DC with the strength, the will, and the moral clarity to meet the challenges we face. **[So, if you're looking to continue the status quo, I'm not your guy.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fee41f0fe17a4e1a9f21bd5b820ebaa5&_e=V2xzcyPr_DAgvAIOqgreclB2BTHcRoQ0WB8MKLnZTxRcB01VCKk--ox8SzOZ_WrTkdNq_OsiIkDU1k4rOes0IZQ0TBQsbBjod1H0APFEv94KIA7FLeE5VN5JiSsC87n3L8B4YPc8BNN1V23pnCF7w3n89YOSGU5_V4lmkqvv-yfn17-HaoJTyzPklTGVBvlKT6M0dL3tZeyPqYYXmBG8VN3HLs47uCuUPTCMqsL-QopH7A_0WyjgblehAD4n_2zRNastPPRKm_D2BUJk0GOl06kzkUrW3RKBIGJWOzOdqPe9L73GFlsNKnZRiNxb3NJO4b5vmOD1BGl9zugXsbRq1q5jp5ryK4SbNPG9ARFU7MVHl-HwT1T1G9TE-nS-NaqnXfpkf38LmPSvej7U-KayCH1A-3xj1U0C9INAhq5dZ9RC78DVwaAfIVTnXvEL-PGm)**
But if you want to change the way things are done in DC, I need your support. Our average online donation is $17.78, and [I would be so grateful if you would generously give that amount today.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fee41f0fe17a4e1a9f21bd5b820ebaa5&_e=V2xzcyPr_DAgvAIOqgreclB2BTHcRoQ0WB8MKLnZTxRcB01VCKk--ox8SzOZ_WrTkdNq_OsiIkDU1k4rOes0IZQ0TBQsbBjod1H0APFEv94KIA7FLeE5VN5JiSsC87n3L8B4YPc8BNN1V23pnCF7w3n89YOSGU5_V4lmkqvv-yfn17-HaoJTyzPklTGVBvlKT6M0dL3tZeyPqYYXmBG8VN3HLs47uCuUPTCMqsL-QopH7A_0WyjgblehAD4n_2zRNastPPRKm_D2BUJk0GOl06kzkUrW3RKBIGJWOzOdqPdSBCy9NUdu24qB8Bi3okXwkkM-B7BrWK-8xazDW-6IXTlfZwDodofBxk1rQr5Ec0a82lVPMef6VXOdibO5oaPnBm-CbafUn93EPMkIQ8eJBCw16ryFsHmeu9BlH9iJ-ZJ_2H3DSo4woSR9j7TT0ibl)

clean_body: Friend, When I arrived at West Point as a new cadet, I had no idea how much it would transform my life. During my first plebe summer, after a long day of training, a sermon on Psalm 121 made an imprint on my soul, strengthened my faith, and sustained me through difficult times. I'm Dave McCormick. I'm a West Point grad, combat veteran who served in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, and running in the #1 battleground race that WILL decide the Senate majority. I believe in the power of grassroots support from patriots like you. We need leaders in DC with the strength, the will, and the moral clarity to meet the challenges we face. But if you want to change the way things are done in DC, I need your support. Our average online donation is $17.78, and ****************************************************************************************************** ** Please, join me today to fix our broken government & save what makes America worth fighting for. Dave McCormick Army Veteran, USMA '87 | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

body:
I’ve got two quick questions for you:

| | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6f992abe8ac478e81d2b06dd8183fe0&_e=MjttBtbQD5uXC1ski1Wdl6DwSev5W2vXhLlqEwOGapEfIfXxry52-8PdlrkLrUYs1y1jzpD_cAnrCXs4EM5Ln_kmtIDDChvYRShGcU8dj-0fEyEXx__J8qkhq6n1douKvMN-roVkKPQ3vbM0cbpo_dv7EvAiFbSugrn0hIiw5uF49v0CYDJN-EFrNKx9_y6RBFq3ML-iavvNW-C78R8kFm9qyEU_mGT76POf-zyBf31ioV2DY46CGe9zJ8gWPmCThzihMqv-hgw6NZsorczUKHdPK8FNN3wCkPy12dH9TBgmYmYQuw2qXKX_fSR4jAcMiBOj2qwdt_rPtIyUvRdzRhV4pGBGJt2tUGPg8h9y5vA37vEJIc6nSIhnsa2jUMI8yElNGnj8RmgZelqMk9UcZJ38qVqnvGTL1bzDD3VjH5lUTmf5WK1ixotg-sg2JDU6)

| | Dear Friend,

I've got two quick questions for you:
## 1\. Are you concerned about the American economy right now?
[YES](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6f992abe8ac478e81d2b06dd8183fe0&_e=MjttBtbQD5uXC1ski1Wdl6DwSev5W2vXhLlqEwOGapEfIfXxry52-8PdlrkLrUYs1y1jzpD_cAnrCXs4EM5Ln_kmtIDDChvYRShGcU8dj-0fEyEXx__J8qkhq6n1douKvMN-roVkKPQ3vbM0cbpo_dv7EvAiFbSugrn0hIiw5uF49v0CYDJN-EFrNKx9_y6RBFq3ML-iavvNW-C78R8kFm9qyEU_mGT76POf-zyBf31ioV2DY46CGe9zJ8gWPmCThzihMqv-hgw6NZsorczUKHdPK8FNN3wCkPy12dH9TBjRUZSCEsGBMgR7wq84OK69_xINCnnBtg_vZIx6nBp7lSpZc2dI3MAl6IWi2CqEFu5iIr5kM8TVpB9QMw1I1zg7HIYASCWDdSzhrBEN_VrqCMqSm_9jO746BJVUGDrjm0F42kqlAnAdIxcXNhvg8EDB) [NO](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6f992abe8ac478e81d2b06dd8183fe0&_e=MjttBtbQD5uXC1ski1Wdl6DwSev5W2vXhLlqEwOGapEfIfXxry52-8PdlrkLrUYs1y1jzpD_cAnrCXs4EM5Ln_kmtIDDChvYRShGcU8dj-0fEyEXx__J8qkhq6n1douKvMN-roVkKPQ3vbM0cbpo_dv7EvAiFbSugrn0hIiw5uF49v0CYDJN-EFrNKx9_y6RBFq3ML-iavvNW-C78R8kFm9qyEU_mGT76POf-zyBf31ioV2DY46CGe9zJ8gWPmCThzihMqv-hgw6NZsorczUKHdPK8FNN3wCkPy12dH9TBinbWsi2bm3JhjY2VIrBnb3DrREAxKLGTl0S6zmJQAoKSIt_HYM0uhj0qJZ0C_P7ZwJt1EDlRrRsFwjNzWqDq2lDIMRRySwl7X7fOQoctACldBY2xSpYwAGcOryz8ogB0Lcagjjg43HmVDBtfBi8NRy)
## 2\. Are you curious to learn how private citizens drive the economy?
[YES](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6f992abe8ac478e81d2b06dd8183fe0&_e=MjttBtbQD5uXC1ski1Wdl6DwSev5W2vXhLlqEwOGapEfIfXxry52-8PdlrkLrUYs1y1jzpD_cAnrCXs4EM5Ln_kmtIDDChvYRShGcU8dj-0fEyEXx__J8qkhq6n1douKvMN-roVkKPQ3vbM0cbpo_dv7EvAiFbSugrn0hIiw5uF49v0CYDJN-EFrNKx9_y6RBFq3ML-iavvNW-C78R8kFm9qyEU_mGT76POf-zyBf31ioV2DY46CGe9zJ8gWPmCThzihMqv-hgw6NZsorczUKHdPK8FNN3wCkPy12dH9TBigq4e_44qlmZUoRPaFWLZc_0WsRdXv4oiQ36cnlEXGCDQSWFqOuMhIDYlHYTSY2G3cb9lqUjtG7st-CuP1LMvJsWO8dt8gdRZiaFB1bPPdLWSouy53cc3oI8vid5sxkEbjdRkpzqSz9JHzffLCe5zm) [NO](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6f992abe8ac478e81d2b06dd8183fe0&_e=MjttBtbQD5uXC1ski1Wdl6DwSev5W2vXhLlqEwOGapEfIfXxry52-8PdlrkLrUYs1y1jzpD_cAnrCXs4EM5Ln_kmtIDDChvYRShGcU8dj-0fEyEXx__J8qkhq6n1douKvMN-roVkKPQ3vbM0cbpo_dv7EvAiFbSugrn0hIiw5uF49v0CYDJN-EFrNKx9_y6RBFq3ML-iavvNW-C78R8kFm9qyEU_mGT76POf-zyBf31ioV2DY46CGe9zJ8gWPmCThzihMqv-hgw6NZsorczUKHdPK8FNN3wCkPy12dH9TBh5tU1A7gfL5ycrGmUd70YzVQN8oULquKxXR5JWquuEchlXD6mQ2TTz2NIgnoMD0kw01pHw5HwmbkoPmn6mDUmJJ1qDqJV5Fy20fwx3KWaWebq5RpXWMsQu84R8qnIniN7pzw9kWsU4Dz-8YUoJJ0Bj) If you answered YES to either of these questions, I hope you'll support our free online series, "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

In this series, viewers learn about the role freedom and incentives play in innovation, new jobs, and increased wealth and security. It promises to be an engaging and educational course--perhaps you'll even want to watch it with friends or family.

Friend, remember that this series--like every online course from Hillsdale College--is absolutely free to you, with no obligation or expectation on our part other than that you'll learn from us.

Because of this, we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you a beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the secure link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6f992abe8ac478e81d2b06dd8183fe0&_e=MjttBtbQD5uXC1ski1Wdl6DwSev5W2vXhLlqEwOGapEfIfXxry52-8PdlrkLrUYs1y1jzpD_cAnrCXs4EM5Ln_kmtIDDChvYRShGcU8dj-0fEyEXx__J8qkhq6n1douKvMN-roVkKPQ3vbM0cbpo_dv7EvAiFbSugrn0hIiw5uF49v0CYDJN-EFrNKx9_y6RBFq3ML-iavvNW-C78R8kFm9qyEU_mGT76POf-zyBf31ioV2DY46CGe9zJ8gWPmCThzihMqv-hgw6NZsorczUKHdPK8FNN3wCkPy12dH9TBhlSxWVmYvtFNHfyTNYoc1jq6hABD01jdRkHwqlvBVPXMeeXvuur4XmISlyUJEcLHUMYsCsa5zdL5Nyvzbx0gmQDSKDDwSbjNoFKaRo7S8jSD4HjlBOPlb2jpcGoQz1ZLrsav6MxCi-b5G_z8ahKbmh)

So, if you said YES to either of those questions above, I hope you'll say "YES" again to supporting this course. Thank you so much for learning with us--we deeply appreciate you!

Gratefully,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Free Speech Decided by Court
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
The United States of America is sick and in need of a miracle cure.

|
---
| | | **The United States of America is sick and in need of a miracle cure.
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=speech_1_21_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
The breaking news that a Canadian Court is forcing psychiatrist Jordan Peterson to undergo state-sanctioned media training because of “demeaning” social media posts is an assault to the fundamental tenets of Democracy and Freedom.
Authoritarianism was tried by many nations in the 20th century, and it failed every single time—because people of the free world opposed those regimes that sought to terminate fundamental human rights.
That a Canadian court would force anyone to submit to their speech codes or else lose his or her ability to earn a living more resembles Communist-led China, not a free nation.
In fact, our campaign is currently facing mainstream media censorship, social media companies throttling down our news stories and events, and two hostile political parties who want us eliminated.
One party, the Democrats, have fully embraced censorship of those who don’t toe the line and hold to their narrative. Many Republicans also push back against those like Robert F. Kennedy Jr., who take on the military-iIndustrial Complex and never-ending wars.
_Both parties will stop at nothing to ensure their collective uniparty agenda is accomplished._
You and I simply do not count.
We the People are not on their agenda.
That the middle class is decimated, that the cost of housing is out of reach for most of us, that our jobs no longer pay us a living wage, that our test scores rank dead last among free nations and trap our children in perpetual mediocrity, that life expectancy is dropping, that drug use and the death rates from drug overdoses and suicide are at record highs...
**_...the politicians from both parties do not give a damn about you or me._**
The United States of America is sick and in need of a miracle cure.
The cure begins with honesty and a commitment to our shared American values: free speech, the Constitution, transparency, and accountability.
And each one of us has a unique opportunity, right now, to stand up for what we know is right. We can support one another, encourage one another, and stand alongside one another to see that a new vision, a new voice, and a new direction comes to fruition—centered first and foremost on We The People.
Benjamin Franklin, referring to the great risk our Founding Fathers took when they fought for their Independence, said: “Either we stand together or we hang separately.”
_This campaign is asking, and will continue to ask, a lot from each of you._ We need contributions, both large and small. We need volunteers, full-time and part-time. We need advocates. We need door knockers and people making phone calls.
The easiest part is donating. The maximum amount an individual can donate to Kennedy 24 is $6,000—$3,000 during the primary season and $3,000 during the general election season.
**Please consider making the maximum contribution to our effort during this primary season.**
[**Your maximum gift of $3,000 will propel this campaign into the mainstream news cycle, onto the debate stage, on your state ballot, and into the White House in 2025.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=speech_1_21_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=2)
If you are not in a position to give the maximum amount, know that every single penny our campaign raises will be spent very carefully and with the utmost honesty and transparency.
[**Gifts of $5, $10, $15, or even $25 or more will help us in this historic effort.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=speech_1_21_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=3)
**We’re currently behind our monthly goal, and we need your support to bridge the gap.** Any amount you can give will help us achieve the 100% participation we need to sustain the incredible momentum we’ve built together!
First and foremost, we must ensure RFK Jr.'s name is on the ballot in all 50 states.
While the candidates from the two major parties are automatically on the ballot, we face a different challenge. To secure our spot, we need to mobilize a 50-state ground game, _and this effort comes with a price tag of $18 million_.
Your financial support is the lifeblood of our campaign. Every dollar brings us closer to securing ballot access and reaching our monthly goal.

clean_body: The United States of America is sick and in need of a miracle cure. | | | | The United States of America is sick and in need of a miracle cure. | Dear Peter, The breaking news that a Canadian Court is forcing psychiatrist Jordan Peterson to undergo state-sanctioned media training because of “demeaning” social media posts is an assault to the fundamental tenets of Democracy and Freedom. Authoritarianism was tried by many nations in the 20th century, and it failed every single time—because people of the free world opposed those regimes that sought to terminate fundamental human rights. That a Canadian court would force anyone to submit to their speech codes or else lose his or her ability to earn a living more resembles Communist-led China, not a free nation. In fact, our campaign is currently facing mainstream media censorship, social media companies throttling down our news stories and events, and two hostile political parties who want us eliminated. One party, the Democrats, have fully embraced censorship of those who don’t toe the line and hold to their narrative. Many Republicans also push back against those like Robert F. Kennedy Jr., who take on the military-iIndustrial Complex and never-ending wars. Both parties will stop at nothing to ensure their collective uniparty agenda is accomplished. You and I simply do not count. We the People are not on their agenda. That the middle class is decimated, that the cost of housing is out of reach for most of us, that our jobs no longer pay us a living wage, that our test scores rank dead last among free nations and trap our children in perpetual mediocrity, that life expectancy is dropping, that drug use and the death rates from drug overdoses and suicide are at record highs... ...the politicians from both parties do not give a damn about you or me. The United States of America is sick and in need of a miracle cure. The cure begins with honesty and a commitment to our shared American values: free speech, the Constitution, transparency, and accountability. And each one of us has a unique opportunity, right now, to stand up for what we know is right. We can support one another, encourage one another, and stand alongside one another to see that a new vision, a new voice, and a new direction comes to fruition—centered first and foremost on We The People. Benjamin Franklin, referring to the great risk our Founding Fathers took when they fought for their Independence, said: “Either we stand together or we hang separately.” This campaign is asking, and will continue to ask, a lot from each of you. We need contributions, both large and small. We need volunteers, full-time and part-time. We need advocates. We need door knockers and people making phone calls. The easiest part is donating. The maximum amount an individual can donate to Kennedy 24 is $6,000—$3,000 during the primary season and $3,000 during the general election season. Please consider making the maximum contribution to our effort during this primary season. If you are not in a position to give the maximum amount, know that every single penny our campaign raises will be spent very carefully and with the utmost honesty and transparency. We’re currently behind our monthly goal, and we need your support to bridge the gap. Any amount you can give will help us achieve the 100% participation we need to sustain the incredible momentum we’ve built together! First and foremost, we must ensure RFK Jr.'s name is on the ballot in all 50 states. While the candidates from the two major parties are automatically on the ballot, we face a different challenge. To secure our spot, we need to mobilize a 50-state ground game, and this effort comes with a price tag of $18 million. Your financial support is the lifeblood of our campaign. Every dollar brings us closer to securing ballot access and reaching our monthly goal. Every dollar brings us closer to securing our spot on the ballot. Thank you for standing with us in this pivotal moment. Together, we can achieve greatness and usher in a new era of leadership. Team Kennedy | to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY

Multiple state legislatures debated bills regarding transgender issues in the few first weeks of 2024, with the focus being on restroom access, sex-change surgeries for minors and parental rights. name: Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: FBI arrests Babylon Bee actor, terrifies his pregnant wife
body:
Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

| [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6558024b8d2440c8aa6bb749f8640971&_e=vjQSQG-pXcGLB7GONApEN2R5R8iuSKorbrXLZGQJ43wcigTW-v5ut7RjXF3X7wOsvynUYpJBJ4bWG7Q38Al6ArIWzWdu0YIP8HBNDeIs5hRvM7lj2PAQzUfOiaOBXl8h3GzaJFHiKQtcVO2Z1ERRlB6pav_MCo6FM51oKm8N1hnddbwCpAzcGgdmSHBAfu7xV_2wQSwJIO8PAyHPVWvK6no45-KGkZF3hS9YoRmNksDlvqV-7UPED61CDeFlbF9IDpZcg40Hp2EbsiJFLGbRl00UdKbPIuD7ejR8njPumKhat55_NliRDFuoR9mFjzXJyUk44B-wAfKbl6WzFLgm6Z766oZ4SPudRRBy2tt7D4w%3D)
---
| |
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6558024b8d2440c8aa6bb749f8640971&_e=vjQSQG-pXcGLB7GONApEN2R5R8iuSKorbrXLZGQJ43wcigTW-v5ut7RjXF3X7wOsvynUYpJBJ4bWG7Q38Al6ArIWzWdu0YIP8HBNDeIs5hRvM7lj2PAQzUfOiaOBXl8h3GzaJFHiKQtcVO2Z1ERRlB6pav_MCo6FM51oKm8N1hnddbwCpAzcGgdmSHBAfu7xV_2wQSwJIO8PAyHPVWvK6sixgZQxwcHCFd-qONJ-zVJNpBnin4cWmRt-8SSM0W7tMGUmDhl3sU5k5SD45aPT-xLjRNWZctHnLI32cTVAyJRpv5Njt1tC0Qz3IkFTXV4fAzvJVHSNfAcVr7XL_1kK920NjW224TkllHIFfrVmzDU%3D)Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100 or more right now to help Babylon Bee actor and patriot, Siaka Massaquoi, fight back against Joe Biden's FBI.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6558024b8d2440c8aa6bb749f8640971&_e=vjQSQG-pXcGLB7GONApEN2R5R8iuSKorbrXLZGQJ43wcigTW-v5ut7RjXF3X7wOsvynUYpJBJ4bWG7Q38Al6ArIWzWdu0YIP8HBNDeIs5hRvM7lj2PAQzUfOiaOBXl8h3GzaJFHiKQtcVO2Z1ERRlB6pav_MCo6FM51oKm8N1hnddbwCpAzcGgdmSHBAfu7xV_2wQSwJIO8PAyHPVWvK6gro5bf-V0xIzP1FTjThBe5ZfidiOY2yqS2K0EhH6kmiFyKP5ccx4c3dBZxywQllQpZUn8q-PP3fMBIMEHwat12q-p7I8gm31IkNBHFVPhqWsuDbvPEFtHQL8adsiKYT-Ujk-l8u5ZpUlqf3zvbMC2s%3D)**

Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport.

He was traveling home with his wife, Charlotte, and their unborn baby, after they attended an event hosted by the conservative news site, Daily Wire.

The FBI refused to show Charlotte the arrest warrant.

**Siaka was arrested because he 's a black patriot who can persuade many Democrat voters to vote against Joe Biden on Election Day. **

You see, not only is Siaka a gifted actor (he's starred in Babylon Bee's funny series, "Californians Adjust to New Life In Texas") ...

... He's also the Vice Chair of the Los Angeles County GOP and a peaceful patriot who briefly appeared at the peaceful protest the stolen presidential election at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021.

Siaka is also bold as a lion about his faith in Jesus Christ, his love for his family, and his deep concern for our country.

Of course, all that makes him an enemy of Joe Biden's lawless administration.

**So the FBI arrested Siaka for spending 76 seconds inside the U.S. Capitol. And charged him with four misdemeanors! That 's right, MISDEMEANORS!**

What's more, this isn't the first time the FBI has stomped on Siaka's rights, either.

**Over twenty FBI agents raided Siaka 's home with drawn guns on June 10, 2021 at 5:45 AM, and handcuffed him, his best friend, and two other roommates. **

As you can imagine, his best friend's two little children, just three and seven years old, were _terrified._

And here's what happened next:

* The FBI agents refused to let Siaka speak to his lawyer
* The FBI agents refused to show him the arrest warrant
* The FBI agents grilled him and his friends for FIVE HOURS with no lawyers present!
* The FBI confiscated his cell phone, computer and his MAGA hat and has refused ever since to give them back!
* And we have reason to believe that Siaka and the other peaceful J-6 protesters were illegally and unconstitutionally surveilled!

**And because the FBI didn 't arrest or charge Siaka, he had no legal grounds to find out why they raided his home...terrorized him, his friends, his friend's little children... abused his Constitutionally protected rights...and stole his property.**

Can you imagine being abused like this... _as an American citizen in your own country?_

What the FBI did to my peaceful, innocent client in 2021 and just a short time ago is a CRIME.

**That 's why I've filed a crucial lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 46 years.

You've seen me on Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

I'm proud to say I won a court ruling that President Bill Clinton committed a crime when he illegally the White House files of Kathleen Willey. (I'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime)

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers during the impeachment of criminal Bill Clinton.

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Siaka wants to use this critically important lawsuit to speak up for other patriots, too, because he's alarmed at what Joe Biden and his friends are doing to our country.

He's deeply concerned that our country is going down a very dark road...and I agree.

I want to fix this horrifying situation peacefully and legally in the courts...before it's too late.

**[Patriot, I beg you to help me fight back for Siaka and ALL other January 6 peaceful protesters with your very best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right now.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6558024b8d2440c8aa6bb749f8640971&_e=vjQSQG-pXcGLB7GONApEN2R5R8iuSKorbrXLZGQJ43wcigTW-v5ut7RjXF3X7wOsvynUYpJBJ4bWG7Q38Al6ArIWzWdu0YIP8HBNDeIs5hRvM7lj2PAQzUfOiaOBXl8h3GzaJFHiKQtcVO2Z1ERRlB6pav_MCo6FM51oKm8N1hnddbwCpAzcGgdmSHBAfu7xV_2wQSwJIO8PAyHPVWvK6hozer4mJNVQLRt8c-_Ul_dMh0HTOEWD-lEUTBUFqH-k9D-4pMhix4X1XT0qMRZJK2hhAnp_kpJqCu0zw9bN5Cqcra6mj6RLa6caQ82-OoItvI5IPMwYwl-iu8zrcPMqb2jKvfojABJVdzs_WjEvHbk%3D)**

clean_body: Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport. | | | Patriot, Just a short time ago, four FBI agents arrested my friend and client, Siaka Massaquoi, at the airport. He was traveling home with his wife, Charlotte, and their unborn baby, after they attended an event hosted by the conservative news site, Daily Wire. The FBI refused to show Charlotte the arrest warrant. Siaka was arrested because he 's a black patriot who can persuade many Democrat voters to vote against Joe Biden on Election Day. You see, not only is Siaka a gifted actor (he's starred in Babylon Bee's funny series, "Californians Adjust to New Life In Texas") ... ... He's also the Vice Chair of the Los Angeles County GOP and a peaceful patriot who briefly appeared at the peaceful protest the stolen presidential election at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021. Siaka is also bold as a lion about his faith in Jesus Christ, his love for his family, and his deep concern for our country. Of course, all that makes him an enemy of Joe Biden's lawless administration. So the FBI arrested Siaka for spending 76 seconds inside the U.S. Capitol. And charged him with four misdemeanors! That 's right, MISDEMEANORS! What's more, this isn't the first time the FBI has stomped on Siaka's rights, either. Over twenty FBI agents raided Siaka 's home with drawn guns on June 10, 2021 at 5:45 AM, and handcuffed him, his best friend, and two other roommates. As you can imagine, his best friend's two little children, just three and seven years old, were terrified. And here's what happened next: The FBI agents refused to let Siaka speak to his lawyer The FBI agents refused to show him the arrest warrant The FBI agents grilled him and his friends for FIVE HOURS with no lawyers present! The FBI confiscated his cell phone, computer and his MAGA hat and has refused ever since to give them back! And we have reason to believe that Siaka and the other peaceful J-6 protesters were illegally and unconstitutionally surveilled! And because the FBI didn 't arrest or charge Siaka, he had no legal grounds to find out why they raided his home...terrorized him, his friends, his friend's little children... abused his Constitutionally protected rights...and stole his property. Can you imagine being abused like this... as an American citizen in your own country? What the FBI did to my peaceful, innocent client in 2021 and just a short time ago is a CRIME. That 's why I've filed a crucial lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP. I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch. I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 46 years. You've seen me on Fox News, and other cable news outlets. I'm proud to say I won a court ruling that President Bill Clinton committed a crime when he illegally the White House files of Kathleen Willey. (I'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime) I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers during the impeachment of criminal Bill Clinton. And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.**And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS! Siaka wants to use this critically important lawsuit to speak up for other patriots, too, because he's alarmed at what Joe Biden and his friends are doing to our country. He's deeply concerned that our country is going down a very dark road...and I agree. I want to fix this horrifying situation peacefully and legally in the courts...before it's too late. If Joe Biden 's FBI and DOJ get away with crushing the rights and freedoms of Siaka and all the other peaceful patriots of January 6, they WILL come for you, me, our families, and our friends. My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ea2cb628bb3f4a6a86761863b5411c04&_e=Pn-OpsVcYGjcDlXKulrxRPeTRccffKo_mcZqAUhVxJql7bSpI-ktcul_aq7xHHf8RV03GQ6y9vSoGhiUxlFrP0AY-ple3H3SVUMVPBAY4nNg3G8fct9Pmhvlax74wmfEaQHn5Q91zOyo7ZfhwaPvTMUiS-foQLjqGL4KTblsw0OqM10bmtESdpggkNHHQvgdMG7vnyImbKCcIxSg0EkYHTldqHlG14iG7sRku_QfzCTYyqn-R35SQlTEBAgWnc6KKU-EwoQ9tIdGiWZGsOBf65j1pm_ftgcRFq8xKi3pzgJRlnPKSbnXa5_tA48SIsQtxbCfQU9TCrtzBbsPYd0PbS1264MzH5SwPoh6IrO3pwqSCbonmcNXjwBJcN6zvY9u--FZIr8nHW098bonZDo4ZLV5PziBvRj1Jsv25bon07Vm9yzfnW4BHuPOcc3-PM45TH6rFn9nkLH1svs1TSUKuAzJdVuWp13vn2nX_YJKrBLkBdxbBy-iyIujZXv-RJ_mR4ERQbkohk22-ZOXvSdCiJfHY-b_UPsuN2lz2wVA0DIdnQzgLj-OAmOVuVzxh2VzDlRrk14PnuYGnk6YxRv0CEbfT1KSU4k_OysVwLfECZKWjumLFIhYKPRITr9jJWHPv5cFkB0GEYuifeYuWqd6wQ%3D%3D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: I want to extend an invitation to you | | | | | | Friend, I'd be honored to have you by my side. With just 5 days left before the first-in-the-nation New Hampshire primary, my team and I are recruiting strong conservatives to join my Ambassador's Circle. You've proven to be a freedom-loving conservative who is dedicated to fighting for our country's future, and that is exactly the type of person I want by my side! So, I have an important question to ask you. "Will you please join my team as a 2024 Ambassador’s Circle Member ahead of the first-in-the-nation New Hampshire primary on January 23?" | All it takes is "$15 to activate your membership" and join my exclusive team of patriots who are helping pave the way for a brighter future. | | As an Ambassador's Circle member, you will be unlocking access to: Your very own personalized membership card Access to exclusive news and updates Special offers on discounted campaign merchandise Insider glimpses with behind-the-scenes footage from the campaign trail And much more... It would mean the world to know you are a part of my Ambassador's Circle as I gear up for this critical campaign milestone. Each new member that joins my team will help us build momentum ahead of the first-in-the-nation New Hampshire primary, fuel our fight, and win the battle for our country's future. | | My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492 Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Sign Your Name (via Left Action)
subject: Sign: Nikki Haley is right. Trump must take a mental fitness test!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign: "Trump must take a mental fitness test!"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3ccaca9c-c68e-4826-9b45-57ed5adaa8a2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T580234ad-2726-446c-babe-fcdf8b718d01/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Donald Trump was bad enough to begin with, but now he is increasingly showing signs of dementia, most recently [confusing Nancy Pelosi and Nikki Haley](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf20970ac-610e-4752-a313-9c4bcbfdbc36/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) multiple times in a speech. And that is just the latest of many [examples](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e8173bb-0446-4948-8de1-5118f47b7cbf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). [**Add your name, and demand that Trump take a mental fitness test from a reliable, independent source, and release the results publicly. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc0eada35-6c94-4422-b1d3-f8803b754eea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The voters have a right to know whether the likely Republican nominee is growing dangerously unhinged from reality. And they need to know before the election. America can't afford to hand the nuclear launch codes to someone who is losing his mind. Nikki Haley has called for him to take such a test, and she is right to do so. [**Add your name, and demand that Trump take a mental fitness test from a reliable, independent source, and release the results publicly. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5dfc9c0d-cf2f-4367-9a0b-e062b4193785/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

subject: Get to Know Jesse James
body:
It's easy to stereotype our candidates by the Party letter next to their name (R), (D), get to know your candidate | | | | |
# Get to know your candidate
# Jesse James Mullen
---
It’s easy to put everyone in a box based on their political stances. The letter next to a candidate’s name gives you an idea of the kind of person they are, but it doesn’t tell the whole story.You might have gathered that Jesse is an avid reader based on his book club emails, but did you know he used to work in a secure underground vault cataloging rare books?
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=ba4fb86934&e=805e709ff8)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20Editors=20at=20Broad=20+=20Liberty?=
subject: B+L Weekly Reads: Delco Prison's So-Called "Reform" | Krasner's Failures Felt in Philly Suburbs + More ⚡🔔
body:
News + editorial to start your week. | | | |
---
| | |
### __Broad + Liberty's_ Weekly Reads:_
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bcfe249860&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| _**Delco's prison mismanagement continues.**_
---
| Democrats came to office in Delaware County government promising big changes for the county’s troubled George W. Hill Correctional Facility. But since kicking out the prison’s private operator in 2022, **things have only gotten worse**. **Todd Shepherd** wrote two stories this week on the problems there, one concerning the [troubling overdose death of an inmate](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=76d02a1101&e=b7b3eddce2), and another on the discontent among staff who are now compelled to work _[sixteen-hour shifts](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=77a9a8fc17&e=b7b3eddce2)_ when the staffing shortage demands it. So much for reform! [Read more at _Broad + Liberty._](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a7c54d9a7a&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### _Other Top Stories..._
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f82c8892c8&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
But crime in Delco and other suburban counties isn’t totally the fault of the governments there. As **Larry Miller** wrote for us this week, the [inner suburbs are continuing to feel the effects of Philadelphia’s lawlessness](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a4069723cd&e=b7b3eddce2) – encouraged by **DA Larry Krasner** ’s failure to prosecute criminals there. Miller writes of how suburban lawmakers are attempting to stem the criminal tide, but there is only so much they can do when the neighboring jurisdiction allows criminals to return to the streets.
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7e76a45b78&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
Even in Philly, lawmakers are starting to wake up to the problems of Krasner-style lack of enforcement. **Paul Davis** wrote on Friday about the wave of politicians — Republican and Democrat — who have [had enough of the shoplifting and quality-of-life crimes](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8999e86475&e=b7b3eddce2) that make our cities worse places to live. **Mayor Cherelle Parker** ’s call “to make our city safe for the people who live here, who work here and who come into our city from the suburbs” is welcome news for anyone in the region.
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d01c24ad06&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
And finally this week, education writer **Beth Ann Rosica** examines what is being taught in schools of education across the region and is forced to conclude that what ails schools is partly the fault of [far-left radicalism that would-be teachers are being taught in college](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f038243a4c&e=b7b3eddce2). “The academic decline in American public education is not surprising,” she writes, “when you look at the curricula taught in schools of education.”
---
|
---
| _**What We’re Reading...**_
---
| Every school board race last year seemed to be a battle about book-banning. But what’s really being banned? **James Fishback** at _The Free Press_ investigated and found that [most of the books missing from school libraries across the country are books by right-wing authors, not lefties](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f757dfa8a8&e=b7b3eddce2).********
---
|
---

clean_body: Ahead of 2024. Fellow American, The field of potential Republican nominees for president continues to dwindle, leaving only the strongest contenders left in the running to retire Joe Biden. As the race continues to tighten and the stakes get even higher, I want to know how YOU would rank the remaining candidates. | Thank you, Kellyanne Conway, Former Senior Advisor to President Trump P.S. I chose you to represent your city, so your response will be used to represent your friends and neighbors. Don't miss the chance to make your voice heard. Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

body:

---
| |
---|---
| [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0qGpwpXgoJxt9wxxr6-3NGYXQVGX5KfUB2QipDlOQqUHEqNdbcrmWW1P0PvLKqEX36kFh37GyVJzeAXDSdOnpzbyMBzdqQV1G5y8GrhPyNEjYGghE1eh9lmoma-XHe-zXZpW2mDe579Mabh-0UaIUZBFwx6daHdIDftIreDPQS0oUaKT5xvyVVxoMTAC6LL6uH5z3xr2M8BxOD1vLmZMQqL2sxDBYvxII4eDOIZxFSwumApJGHIZQ6GsVQ0SfQzRxyrk4U_uFD4YXzZgsrJJnSIhnaf1Ay7-2kfFDGWIpGel2sSOy14rG8d5RNRmzHD8VVwvrf8MFJasGov7lXihXK4BbDbLblzbhWt85gQO6AJWyp7bjcQG1b2bS_tS1muFxf8x8eEustcvkM_uSOxWbFHyHUXsX2YK7TL1V5QA2t-xpu9hcSmCNUoyzGOXTeCDI89mSomScojMmzfCoof8SH3wBbVzqoSkg9d-7JWVFDW2ut1K73FDQdj3kMDKtaTOUaU6oLBj8FmXk2fr59PWIOcf8UKmY3yc8NfgWkKwIQ1p/436/_dWEOYs8RViwN8C7MaT-Bg/h0/ybXGCvmX1m3Dc1DU5F3clE3XWb8pm_BHEZ4NIRiCE9Y)
---
1️⃣ **_Minnesota:_ New legislation provides universal free meals at public schools**
In Minnesota, a bill providing no-cost breakfast and lunch to students finally went into effect. [Since its rollout, schools have been able to provide over a million more meals this month alone. → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDLfuMssP84uvHwv0X_LB1vRVmJ_bp_uJrMU3abJO8m0-i5ov66FpA3z0fTN3cBzO9LVT23SUQfsQbXAasz-A2ejSojzX8D_fPB_klEG0HWne4CZZKDMZ3ITlE6ULZfBspH7DFOIb127V3z7lsqMhiZKKuqTkNgG4xIGF3bICSoIhIK7FdA3RZnRrLps1Ql59jW-Iv6TCk9YcqYg4kevK477DWnZmvyrH6eMUc2EZhhBnxEg1IbN6ABipUfmFfVC1yRqxAwKfBwJUkNJlB6r5gKAidi1swFWl3du9TohFGKoYOjj48uxxkptZpzJvf5o6HktGisErc9tGq2eibjZRYjvY9fT1pul7QInfRqzYzg7gam8HZRXA5JGx2aQDklwo56xi3bfbxvzUOrqgTbOpf3nHzDXstSALPj-XTyX2K506jRAKM9HvY46hKARWSlYgmYYVpxUDlcxaEjLX5JHPMBQif-mLg20CeZmFg4BmS69DFp9ya3c49HcfhjG0ou0NDa85kdHdirpYBWaYTgfn9tMvGFhSMKjX8GMy0dTOBgMknwO4ME2Fk5JCVUQToqdqzOsVwjJ0xSClo5p-vE6qtHWXobiG_oiyFcAdKeMimmt5eWyuvxrXxQF3IkXf1nQVfPMq16WjE5mZFPbsmrS82pg/436/_dWEOYs8RViwN8C7MaT-Bg/h1/zGnZZXxX_oPDygxZdGhLhjiByq56dGVIn6wxLeJU9w8)

2️⃣ **_Oklahoma:_ A state Republican proposes extreme anti-abortion constitutional amendment **
In Oklahoma, a GOP lawmaker wants voters to enshrine into the state constitution that life begins at conception. [**This marks another shameless Republican attempt to endanger lives, attack reproductive freedom, and limit access to abortion →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/BqA3LhzOFl92KwaVoz69N1WargNQWp8ylirK9V8W21xoitO7yqLDbH4jbpLZn3o2lAZ_eS2xD3dFxilM0g2XWSO0p5uueVKkMwd5Mr46GrHWjbSWOwLXIFxT5HOznJGVvGVKTm1cbkPflAM_7C7n8jNVkaYq4nPNZImq8DH4ttn1gkQbLUhgcDCikcwUDxrBkW6I9huZRhR9YKkU8TOiVIivezvC4TW6yMij7s5N3fwORWXdoQu6MUvg9jKat1ZTBQ_57lV5e21p8Frbj_to0ordvvP3zqZljhLTrsydm9i2XAsEFGz6RLMCa-YPle-im8a20Qwu8PHFydVWl9SS3R3_CjELs9z3qJe2LJndvXyBY_8t45xvWoU_LFvV-XDQYQRdDJzr0FF4VazLd_8tOk4laYPkd0n3cEKsrrRmPUZdPR6jSf6pv4w85ddl5TV8wkKZz49O92A4LxgINUv5dyU37ZIgitMziPW6tUND50b2HByGUjRU0hOt-EAqdJyKUGdoClMm3kFaqzXajXcJ7hdpV_ebKOsKjWVionJT-8L80xJa_5diISJFrYRjo1CNXxPFle9UCiUc6AC-ii6psAkS7rZWCok4XUMyaOaWSf2r-hedGcd9Q9HRyog98aAa_UAVYnQONOLZ70TGpyo3UG3bD87ht1yNaJ5E1AJyBW3gIj42MkT2KyLnlakh2Dde9yfAjc6Jy0zlSWqi6_vBfQ/436/_dWEOYs8RViwN8C7MaT-Bg/h2/G_dQsSe7fVhnibv-plTgyNvSI78srZCttxaIjVh3dRE)
3️⃣ **_New Mexico:_ Democrats work to secure paid family leave **
In New Mexico, Democrats are working to pass Paid Family and Medical Leave with a new bill that will be introduced in this upcoming session. [**If passed, the new iteration of this bill would also provide coverage for LGBTQ+ caretakers, extend leave for military families, provide leave to sexual assault victims to attend counseling, and so much more →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/c511-KAjM3jU_4OIFtitbdyboh-0RPCwAxvgnJ_UhXvGc4EnTR3zhRjwxDP8g8xtUsYgaXcEzXYTDMVkGRxh2ftoU81_vZUKGWrFV6698lF-hCg9HoBemzvvd2pTCPfe-3i-Wx-8DrFgtodd470tGbdUu7W-i0lPb8AVPVnSE2bHOpew6yK43x8e52DKlWteRITMlgiSHvIBaetfB3Znp9yhHD247Nmj4R63Gv7rqdaittYKgfXLMJ5tNvWhCvqLtQ5Z3GRWF1ckSZO6iGPr6Km2Tz5dc2MRHHfB9irFKsRXredOY5uMSeEpEJ1eZhBlTp-XCzqE6U536BZe2d5m3INGI-rO8ZD3U6M4qXx5RqxPds9Qh5zuPuiAy-xgLC1FYTBt8Y-jrKNnB2atahzDL4Gh58hskCWLh_PqfoejuvkSv7TqtsuTuDJ9ADdlPY0ZDlLpzEBWXPMVsr3BiTi9Opdw8zXviCRh74PjrcaieZVXJMAItM6hH46XFp5i87Zhs6cxWrhZdwqEIbKG_U3ZyEALIEqBYE35PLiCakg_LOc-Q4ci7Wk4DmHjmKhqLe2Z9Vp0qZHLKD3Lz8HBQwiW7mID2kk9lvt6_Ik1E1gFvHtdzEpmq_RVJL-EkibVTJpb_5DerqZOXzO72djN85BSx-PuXXaE-FF7yQ-mTYSHofuEXcYT3dDoX58YyihWxnWo/436/_dWEOYs8RViwN8C7MaT-Bg/h3/XCHJEmcZUgJJEqNE6P4LaAl85DM6MSQ107jIoCg2DTE)
4️⃣ **_North Carolina:_ A Republican candidate with alleged neo-Nazi connections is on the state legislative ballot **
In North Carolina, the Board of Elections unanimously ruled that a candidate with neo-Nazi and white supremacy ties could stay on the ballot. [**His alleged hateful rhetoric is sounding alarm bells nationwide →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/c511-KAjM3jU_4OIFtitbZDZ_zi9VdUqbVDo_GMkT7L_CySpEZLhfDe6kLQN4p62mdgDJjUaeE_skfpvui6OGxE6dcHy02-XWUyXmA9KE2qNZdvlOtHDPbEvrJphXiXedn6ik1CieDhcnN1FVwGsl4FVASydBPOEMQTdHuO6h0e5GIeT0ZSZAQ8pFVy-8_VoYhNQ_Aki0FEtmLkvcAsvqAJMQTHKJcp9kIC3q1q_FseVZKY0PUsbCJJJlbXo1U5toE3_NHnIElafqeGCKsMSdByr4Qa4aUwipsUJTapImP26q-VMmsoTy2IR7tKBxqtK0XhsEbQLYkPyDEqyf7cvzQEY_Mvp7Hrv0E-P8eoxEZ5svdK4yfj40JD1Ngu-sYePYvXV8ViKfYfAsnhafLl6ynpSYBVxtuFX6wTuH5O7SBnDhZZDqjYZO4Vp1-QOFnEprPMzo3TgL_JBIvgijyrD4VGw2j1TaOUR157VAvXTWcpCeEFiVTjORLjjXzQcmXQZ_L5Te-fSlrZMrseBRHVdK8xbTJXaV45_Biy7Tx2i0VQJSm7eVwo31Y-xph7dS1WHjAnNKW9rDCbQkyLMj-Q9GxR940I2WkWGXYRj6ePDoQEnYHH0qfMc_bUI7S37VpZ8FFy0_RbGEyfYRnYzW_uLsN7Q4IdZfke96QKabfn1gPM/436/_dWEOYs8RViwN8C7MaT-Bg/h4/wAjttEOMANCR3tLzY64j8du8zlSG1ANISmvhj_UpI1o)
**🗳️ _Special Elections:_ Over the next few months, Democrats are facing over a dozen special elections in key states like Michigan and Pennsylvania, so [**we’re calling on grassroots Dems to help power our candidates to victory →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgpl2gOxhUzXPMSwByOSES6PgaZrT7kl8dRQtI_OcOtR9HG77-LmoE-DPkDKH7gV-xfhG_SDQCWzhijcfDjv-TR0vdHu-CKIa1JA0BGrZV36uGlt_suIEvWqrxytfzMrwZyWgwLfwwOcLeTx44IM6ZmP87htDevx3RscOWB01FtmaCMwjkmLEcC9tgadO3Ya8WAOIv1aSuV_ZvUSrZTZgnx7Ot5E-TiVIF-0uStIRjUGAPFK2ffNdiWngoNbKtS_N0QqhfH0ton9TqaPXvYfxuac-xKi8figoB7iZO2vGjhkRrMx2QQdC3rzOCK851ZHOBTuZqDsp0PzRSZDaxF4cbiLuYmh0N1lbheMWlt-vm7v-FTtHZO5gHWcza9781PshamXvIG-dK0jMpq2AyAFisPiYlM6YNAU-L7UGfflRbOkdmqL-dvbDo6cK4qH9ZbTkAv5iVOgPrFTTQI5BWev5NWzYIZ50m5HMbJfoKqkGwYF-MHUXlsMPuOOF2WS2Waby0BP9I7Y41BhkUkBJkWFKaBUg/436/_dWEOYs8RViwN8C7MaT-Bg/h5/2dvsIErTzXOaADkjEtMlprPLfbKbpjsLqw0oXhqeGQc) **

name: J. Rosen
subject: a nationwide ban on abortion could become a reality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend, there is so much that this little girl couldn't have imagined – like becoming one of the first women to represent Nevada in the U.S. Senate.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77458664/450482417/-1853236879?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3356-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmZmZGJiZi02NmI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t2eAmUolVea1QEHFo8owYokr_4ABYVoxJjUQNuWVfQM=)
She especially never could have imagined that when she was all grown-up, she would be fighting to stop Republican extremists from taking away her most fundamental rights.
Here's the honest truth: **If** **the GOP retakes Senate control, their goal of a nationwide ban on abortion could become a reality. Which is why defending my Senate seat in Nevada is critical.**
With recent polling now showing me neck and neck, I urgently need your help to fight back, defend this seat, and protect reproductive rights from the GOP's attacks. **But right now, I'm falling way short of my $25,000 midnight goal.**
**So please, friend, I'm asking directly:[Will you please give $5 or more right now to help me keep Nevada and the Senate blue? Every dollar will help make sure I can continue fighting with everything I have to protect reproductive freedom for future generations.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77458665/450482418/-1853236879?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3356-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmZmZGJiZi02NmI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t2eAmUolVea1QEHFo8owYokr_4ABYVoxJjUQNuWVfQM=)**

Jacky Rosen:** Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But experts say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, and the GOP is zeroing in on me as a top target for defeat. That’s why I’m counting on your critical grassroots support to fight back and win. Senate control will all come down to Nevada – and I need to know you’re with me. Fellow American, I don’t have a lot of time, so I’ll get right to the point. My name is Pat Harrigan and I’m a retired Special Forces Green Beret running for Congress in the swing state of North Carolina. Joe Biden and the radical Left are determined to shut down my campaign because I’m not afraid to call them out on their socialist tyranny. To be honest, I’m being attacked on all fronts right now. The radical Left is going to spend MASSIVE amounts of money to try and silence me. **I’m not a career politician, Fellow American. I don’t have billionaire megadonors on deck._But I do have an incredible grassroots team, and I want YOU to be a part of it._** **[**Will you pitch in now and help me defend our freedom in Congress?**](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=99cfeef71f474811973ef197d35121ae&_e=QO5IyEO7LebO8rtjNJbokRW-LEWXRTeDcmEqLLcTyyCYVLUolRkfdNQGvYoNi1K-XeQ_ikRJBSTTl58KE35pKgTOIR2ev3rdduCsW14pfMpYP4ojFMsy1WVkEqFZ8woPeO86YgNoPCZicWMaT7GPUyfJcDAidzKbBlXd6QF0eixgLyFlvNGTqiJiZSkSJWLDTIGr0o9KmGPQOc8TxZ0qTySC3IPY6_ux1t1xWdTQ8TeqCrNQylngZikQKstRkC3Qe10UUlPjxepf6GpqQAx8J6d-CZgR1jA5Zz3SitMUR5mb-3qxyo_EzGCUmXZ1DD9y-ziq1YYwPryMFgzYrsHrPd6-p54L7UDv7yDzCuEVtL8_-CVk8Hxka_Ret04afCKvqZX4oThiG3ixOoD9djRxGA%3D%3D)**

When I was fighting as a Green Beret, I never could have imagined that I’d have to take on enemies just as dangerous to our democracy back on home soil. But the radical socialist Democrats are attacking our fundamental liberties every day and twisting reality to fit their woke narrative. I devoted my life to fighting for our country, and I wasn’t going to give up just because I wasn’t in combat anymore. America is worth fighting for, and I will NEVER give up on the values that make our country great. **[I hope you’ll support me today to STOP the radical Left. I’m counting on grassroots patriots like you, and every dollar will go DIRECTLY to making sure we have the resources to fight back against the radical Left. clean_body: | | | Fellow American, I don’t have a lot of time, so I’ll get right to the point. My name is Pat Harrigan and I’m a retired Special Forces Green Beret running for Congress in the swing state of North Carolina. Joe Biden and the radical Left are determined to shut down my campaign because I’m not afraid to call them out on their socialist tyranny. To be honest, I’m being attacked on all fronts right now. The radical Left is going to spend MASSIVE amounts of money to try and silence me. I’m not a career politician, Fellow American. I don’t have billionaire megadonors on deck.But I do have an incredible grassroots team, and I want YOU to be a part of it. When I was fighting as a Green Beret, I never could have imagined that I’d have to take on enemies just as dangerous to our democracy back on home soil. But the radical socialist Democrats are attacking our fundamental liberties every day and twisting reality to fit their woke narrative. I devoted my life to fighting for our country, and I wasn’t going to give up just because I wasn’t in combat anymore. America is worth fighting for, and I will NEVER give up on the values that make our country great. Thank you, Pat Harrigan | | Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee | | Pat Harrigan is a former member of the U.S. Army. name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: As a doctor, I focus on the facts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | As a doctor, I focus on the facts backed by science and data, and here's the truth, Peter: **In Texas, our healthcare outcomes are some of the worst in the nation.**

In 2021, nearly 20% of Texans were uninsured. Texas children were more than twice as likely as children in other states to be uninsured. Texas also ranks #49 in the nation for women’s healthcare.

From the frontlines in our hospitals, I've seen how our broken healthcare system fails so many in need — I’m determined to find solutions. That’s why I went to Congress to serve as a Health Policy Advisor where I fought alongside Speaker Pelosi to deliver better care and lower costs for all Americans. [**Before I share my plan, I’m asking for your help with a donation to my campaign >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77465662/450505340/-1417367329?refcode=em24_240121_HCFR_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240121_HCFR_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=&refcode2=2545e448-6eb8-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjU0NWU0NDgtNmViOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IXkLpN3EPkisBzE-VWTZJUQPMjbshfM2i7FhxgZBRd8=)

Texans deserve better. That's why in Congress, I will fight to:
* Offer a public option for health insurance so Americans will have expanded access and more choices in the marketplace.
* Lower prescription drug costs.
* Fight for expanding Medicaid and support legislation to help millions of Texans receive the coverage they need.

clean_body: | | As a doctor, I focus on the facts backed by science and data, and here's the truth, Peter: In Texas, our healthcare outcomes are some of the worst in the nation. In 2021, nearly 20% of Texans were uninsured. Texas children were more than twice as likely as children in other states to be uninsured. Texas also ranks #49 in the nation for women’s healthcare. From the frontlines in our hospitals, I've seen how our broken healthcare system fails so many in need — I’m determined to find solutions. That’s why I went to Congress to serve as a Health Policy Advisor where I fought alongside Speaker Pelosi to deliver better care and lower costs for all Americans. = Texans deserve better. That's why in Congress, I will fight to: Offer a public option for health insurance so Americans will have expanded access and more choices in the marketplace. Lower prescription drug costs. Fight for expanding Medicaid and support legislation to help millions of Texans receive the coverage they need. Increase transparency for patients in the healthcare system. Ensure women have the right to make decisions about their health – without the interference of politicians. In 2022, I worked with Democratic leaders in Washington on legislation to lower healthcare costs, improve diversity in clinical trials, and increase accessibility to quality healthcare. In my time in Congress, I found what’s most challenging is money in politics.

| | In my time in Congress, I found what's most challenging is money in politics. The truth is that it costs money to run for office, and it affects the kind of people who can step up and run for office. In the last three elections, I've run against three straight self-funding candidates who have spent a lot of their own money to try and win this seat. **And now, as I run for Senate, I'm up against two well-connected candidates who have endless war chests.** Thanks to the strength of our movement, we've won against three extremists who thought they could buy a seat in Congress. We've shown again and again that New Jersey isn't for sale. **_And we're going to do it again._** [**Will you donate now and help power our grassroots movement into the future?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77466343/450507573/-1197072038?refcode=2024-01-21-citu&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6a62d724-6fb8-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTYyZDcyNC02ZmI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5gP4fvmP-_oMth9iOLIl_wGaOAoo0mz7RPm6ismdqoQ=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77466345/450507574/-1197072038?refcode=2024-01-21-citu&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6a62d724-6fb8-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTYyZDcyNC02ZmI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5gP4fvmP-_oMth9iOLIl_wGaOAoo0mz7RPm6ismdqoQ=) I've been in the fight against corruption and big money in politics my entire career. I was there in 2019 when HR1 was introduced, a bill that would have decreased the influence of wealthy special interests in our political system. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77466347/450507575/-1197072038?refcode=2024-01-21-citu&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6a62d724-6fb8-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTYyZDcyNC02ZmI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5gP4fvmP-_oMth9iOLIl_wGaOAoo0mz7RPm6ismdqoQ=) **My family can't donate millions of dollars, but what we've always had is a powerful grassroots movement fueled by people like you. This time is no different.** I've seen the power of our grassroots movement already, and I know we're strong in the face of big money from shady Super PACs flooding our state to elect the same old well-connected politicians. clean_body: In my time in Congress, I found what’s most challenging is money in politics. | | | | In my time in Congress, I found what's most challenging is money in politics. The truth is that it costs money to run for office, and it affects the kind of people who can step up and run for office. In the last three elections, I've run against three straight self-funding candidates who have spent a lot of their own money to try and win this seat. And now, as I run for Senate, I'm up against two well-connected candidates who have endless war chests. Thanks to the strength of our movement, we've won against three extremists who thought they could buy a seat in Congress. We've shown again and again that New Jersey isn't for sale. And we're going to do it again. = = I've been in the fight against corruption and big money in politics my entire career. I was there in 2019 when HR1 was introduced, a bill that would have decreased the influence of wealthy special interests in our political system. = My family can't donate millions of dollars, but what we've always had is a powerful grassroots movement fueled by people like you. This time is no different. I've seen the power of our grassroots movement already, and I know we're strong in the face of big money from shady Super PACs flooding our state to elect the same old well-connected politicians. Now more than ever, New Jersey needs hard working, trustworthy leaders focused on the common good and injecting some integrity and civility back into our politics. That's why I'm running for Senate, and that's why we're confident in our campaign. = More soon, Andy ** | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by .** Andy Kim for New Jersey P.O. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

In the Biden Family

Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=76d8224c3e564b7da0b180027bdbe6c7&_e=HfpSsbFgefiMcva4VrMbRnR2SgWBti3J9oSKTZRe2yZL2mvubxZ495G5qBnQpWOKypgLR-1AxjWbBmb7HlU2_J5a_7fhmBLgM8EbaQiexA_UbBicRphueNgXAggbOb-_clwe-RMi_4uGmC_Wko3Y9NY1jUlY-IRtQtXhW2LLyqbcdajSut-LvMDSUi5KALTsIfB9KIPTKhLwXn20oLBgY7YIlIuaOMhlTo6fCY7fvfU7MdmoD0RRTsYdUvS1TJxuaoLsg8ezNHPV64KhvTBY1b6dxMXcsELblHwJpBvUqho4cVMnNiKLW53bFZGSAneaOiM5285q62Nu1BJXWCsuy3ZmkBu8cw-py4ms98OrGbWvCPWP_p6-W299PjkNNgAo)
---
It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=76d8224c3e564b7da0b180027bdbe6c7&_e=HfpSsbFgefiMcva4VrMbRnR2SgWBti3J9oSKTZRe2yZL2mvubxZ495G5qBnQpWOKypgLR-1AxjWbBmb7HlU2_J5a_7fhmBLgM8EbaQiexA_UbBicRphueNgXAggbOb-_clwe-RMi_4uGmC_Wko3Y9NY1jUlY-IRtQtXhW2LLyqbcdajSut-LvMDSUi5KALTsIfB9KIPTKhLwXn20oLBgY7YIlIuaOMhlTo6fCY7fvfU8f32MdT4KuQBJwa6sIaw_LX8b4R91zecjp9nEWCTZtk_mq_L2qKtcMk7PknzgjgDb24hbqQoOayX3Por9Lbft7aNy9Rdr1DfP9w_OErHOUEpRDElBMXI6W40soWYtJrdnzog7CUeZmI26zATzwYRE)
---
I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. **
[**If you 're with me, I'd be honored to have your support.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=76d8224c3e564b7da0b180027bdbe6c7&_e=HfpSsbFgefiMcva4VrMbRnR2SgWBti3J9oSKTZRe2yZL2mvubxZ495G5qBnQpWOKypgLR-1AxjWbBmb7HlU2_J5a_7fhmBLgM8EbaQiexA_UbBicRphueNgXAggbOb-_clwe-RMi_4uGmC_Wko3Y9NY1jUlY-IRtQtXhW2LLyqbcdajSut-LvMDSUi5KALTsIfB9KIPTKhLwXn20oLBgY7YIlIuaOMhlTo6fCY7fvfXO1a7ztPdMUlGwBmgba_qJA_88gfV5wTqy5En9GDRa5Wq1dNq9FaM5HrrkXVgH_DSnz7_b0Q712lgyH68Xk6SJC3ZgbsLVHw2CcXilL9MPRrmFrs6pSAW5QyGr0JrlaE8UfN70c9ZYSpMjfjGR2QgF)

## **"More than 275 bills targeting LGBTQ rights flood state legislatures" - The Hill**
Peter, The Republican attacks on the LGBTQ+ community didn't stop in 2023. Last year, they passed 80 laws in state legislatures across the country, severely limiting or even banning access to gender gender-affirming care for trans folks, targeting the rights of self-expression of LGBTQ+ adults, and contributing to the crusade against Americans they see as "different". Just in the last 21 days, they've doubled down on their efforts to chip away at the basic human rights of countless Americans and introduced over 275 bills targeting the LGBTQ+ community. [We need your help to stop this Republican attack on our human rights rights, can you help support our mission by contributing a grassroots donation of $35?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77468765/450512736/1646350971?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=urd-em-240121-legislation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTE5ODYzZjEtNzFiOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dyJbAFEUY1lp8B2J0WfL1jmA0WXvXKkImyUlYJTy8Ys=)
### **Here are the numbers:**
* ### **30 bills targeting trans athletes**
* ### **36 bills targeting school curriculums**
* ### **38 bills forcing teachers to out students to parents as LGBTQ+**
* ### **120 bills threatening healthcare access for transgender teens and adults.**

They're doing all of this instead of fighting for things we actually need. Instead of addressing the fentanyl and opioid crisis or even lifting a finger to address the 1 in 5 children living in poverty in rural America, state legislators in half the country are trying to ban teachers from using their students' preferred pronouns. It's absurd and we can do better than that. [Can we count on you to chip in $35 so we can continue fighting for common sense leadership that gets things done for small-town America, instead of legislating away the rights of millions of Americans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77468766/450512737/1646350971?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=urd-em-240121-legislation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTE5ODYzZjEtNzFiOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dyJbAFEUY1lp8B2J0WfL1jmA0WXvXKkImyUlYJTy8Ys=)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Why I’m going to war against Scholastic books. Shocking photos.
body:
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWBZQtIiNN)
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62708597:WBZQtIiNN:m:1:2627245898:ADADE510BB5934F2E6054DC3E4FC2C82:r "SkyTree Book
Fairs")

Friend,

Please forgive me for sending you these images, but you must know what we're up against.

Here's how all those morally disgusting books get into our children's schools - Scholastic Book Fairs.

Like me, you probably have fond memories of Scholastic Book Fairs. They were always a day I looked forward to as a child. It was something fun and new and different at school. And even better, I could find a new book.

**But please realize radical leftists have hijacked Scholastic.**

Here are images from the Scholastic book called _Welcome to St. Hell_ , which promotes trans ideology to kids.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62708597:WBZQtIiNN:m:1:2627245898:ADADE510BB5934F2E6054DC3E4FC2C82:r)[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62708597:WBZQtIiNN:m:1:2627245898:ADADE510BB5934F2E6054DC3E4FC2C82:r)

I have a solution. Let's get rid of Scholastic and start a new book fair organization.

SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[Please help us promote new book fairs in schools to replace Scholastic. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward SkyTree? I am hoping to raise $50,000. Click here to donate any amount today >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62708597:WBZQtIiNN:m:1:2627245898:ADADE510BB5934F2E6054DC3E4FC2C82:r)

[Donate](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62708597:WBZQtIiNN:m:1:2627245898:ADADE510BB5934F2E6054DC3E4FC2C82:r)

Here's the GOOD news!

We've already started hosting book fairs with SkyTree. We hosted a recent one at a Virginia public school, and it was a huge success! There's no reason our schools need to choose Scholastic when there's a wholesome alternative like SkyTree.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62708597:WBZQtIiNN:m:1:2627245898:ADADE510BB5934F2E6054DC3E4FC2C82:r)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

SkyTree will bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

It's not complicated!

It's what we grew up with.

Please help us host more book fairs this semester. My goal is to raise $50,000 this month to bring school fairs to more public schools across the country. It costs roughly $4,500 for SkyTree to host a book fair.

[Donate $10 >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62708598:WBZQtIiNN:m:1:2627245898:ADADE510BB5934F2E6054DC3E4FC2C82:r)

[Donate $35 >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62708599:WBZQtIiNN:m:1:2627245898:ADADE510BB5934F2E6054DC3E4FC2C82:r)

[Donate $50 >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62708600:WBZQtIiNN:m:1:2627245898:ADADE510BB5934F2E6054DC3E4FC2C82:r)

[Donate $100 >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62708601:WBZQtIiNN:m:1:2627245898:ADADE510BB5934F2E6054DC3E4FC2C82:r)

[Donate $250 >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62708602:WBZQtIiNN:m:1:2627245898:ADADE510BB5934F2E6054DC3E4FC2C82:r)

[Donate $500 >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62708603:WBZQtIiNN:m:1:2627245898:ADADE510BB5934F2E6054DC3E4FC2C82:r)

[Donate $1,000 >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62708604:WBZQtIiNN:m:1:2627245898:ADADE510BB5934F2E6054DC3E4FC2C82:r)

[Donate Any Amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62708604:WBZQtIiNN:m:1:2627245898:ADADE510BB5934F2E6054DC3E4FC2C82:r)

Thank you for your continued support as we build institutions promoting our values.

God bless you,

Kirk Cameron

name: Katie Porter
subject: A message for Jamie Dimon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I asked Chase Bank CEO how his tellers could afford to live on the low salaries his bank was paying.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=36818%2E3422442%2EVvhQgY)
Derek,
In a 2020 Congressional hearing, I asked Chase Bank CEO how his tellers could afford to live on the low salaries his bank was paying. I used my trusty whiteboard to break down the budget of a single mom living in Orange County. The Chase teller was just trying to pay rent, feed one kid, and afford after school care. **She was short the money she needed for necessities, and Jamie Dimon didn’t have answers. ⬇️**
****
**Now, this week, surrounded by the world’s wealthiest, most powerful people in Davos, Switzerland, Jamie Dimon praised Donald Trump and his economic policies:**
**_“Take a step back, be honest. He grew the economy quite well. Trade tax reform worked. He was right about some of China,” the JP Morgan Chase boss told CNBC._**
Look, when I questioned Dimon, Donald Trump was president. And at that time, the economy wasn’t working for working people all across the country. It still isn’t.
But when Republicans or Jamie Dimon say the economy was better under Trump, it’s a load of BS. The tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy and the rising inequality were nice for the people who took a private jet to ski in Switzerland, but for the rest of us—we’re still dealing with the consequences.
I’d love to question Jamie Dimon again—this time from the U.S. Senate. Whether I have my whiteboard or not, I’ll always hold these guys accountable and fight to create an economy that doesn’t just benefit CEOs.

Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. clean_body: I asked Chase Bank CEO how his tellers could afford to live on the low salaries his bank was paying. Derek, In a 2020 Congressional hearing, I asked Chase Bank CEO how his tellers could afford to live on the low salaries his bank was paying. I used my trusty whiteboard to break down the budget of a single mom living in Orange County. The Chase teller was just trying to pay rent, feed one kid, and afford after school care. She was short the money she needed for necessities, and Jamie Dimon didn’t have answers. ⬇️ ** Now, this week, surrounded by the world’s wealthiest, most powerful people in Davos, Switzerland, Jamie Dimon praised Donald Trump and his economic policies: “Take a step back, be honest. He grew the economy quite well. Trade tax reform worked. He was right about some of China,” the JP Morgan Chase boss told CNBC. Look, when I questioned Dimon, Donald Trump was president. And at that time, the economy wasn’t working for working people all across the country. It still isn’t. But when Republicans or Jamie Dimon say the economy was better under Trump, it’s a load of BS. The tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy and the rising inequality were nice for the people who took a private jet to ski in Switzerland, but for the rest of us—we’re still dealing with the consequences.
