name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Two days
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter, it’s Ruben.
In two days we’re going to celebrate the one year anniversary of the launch of this campaign. That would be an important milestone at any time, but this one is even more so.
Because that same day is the New Hampshire primary where Trump is widely expected to consolidate his lead and his lock on the Republican nomination.
And four days after that, Trump is coming to Arizona. He’s coming to rally the MAGA-right, to build support for his own re-election, and to swing more of his supporters to his own hand-picked Senate candidate — Kari Lake.
They’re going to have millions of people behind them. They’ll have billionaire backers, corporate PACs, everybody on the far-right and the GOP establishment sending donations their way.
But me, this campaign, we can’t count on anyone else but you. If we’re successful, if we beat Trump, Lake, and Sinema, it will be because of support from people like you.
So I’m relying on a surge of donations right now to help us keep pace with the massive swing that’s going to come Kari Lake’s way after Trump’s rally.
And I’m requesting your support, one more time:
[**Please make your first online donation of $3 to my campaign today. Help me defeat Kari Lake.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240121-1-90-t3&t=1&akid=1788%2E734936%2E9ZmOhb)

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: What I discovered shocked me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
In 2018, Democrats spent $98 per voter to win the Senate Race. Six years later, it is only going to get more expensive | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=0c5a3f51c2a049ddb32715e64668bdc8&_t=2pz6FzcxMr13D9qyTGvJ1QhqH7oP8AJjprbCAzZj_GCJIhuq8MLNa6458EbXrPge9Vmw2WikIvfqdKNzttzqcVg1oSe6Db_p4-dkUl342dA%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=0c5a3f51c2a049ddb32715e64668bdc8&_t=2pz6FzcxMr13D9qyTGvJ1QhqH7oP8AJjprbCAzZj_GCJIhuq8MLNa6458EbXrPge9Vmw2WikIvfqdKNzttzqcVg1oSe6Db_p4-dkUl342dA%3D)
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0c5a3f51c2a049ddb32715e64668bdc8&_e=nVaRnUutjId8bgk7H5TWRLX7lMp0QpQXd6hAWw5GbafvTRdi1sU56Ys2yP7s80ihs7YVtTUfTw49R0FJTcR-GI9HyG5kfqzCW_sB0WAxgOVIaHk-MMQyaiCrYT38zw5nsKydO5FeFF3K5Z5GbwPKiiq9amUbscBRkS-ecKrMYBdw-g_VSJii4iJI-oVy0mtEPhziBQy9xuSslOsOrqsSzjYfkth-S1lsrE2oAv3PxDfBNhoLS-olcHznRWkpjCTt-xgKmVG_teXSyLdZv-ugR0PvtWlXnwUVYvYmnPqiySWAbXlMiYC8D8lWXn1dHvusgXsy6_z42txZeAELuAciWZCHtFTCrlCCS9Esm6Hj7kH9Eg1HTVEiGoqkxJvm6v3t)

Fellow Conservative,

**$98 PER PERSON**
**As a former Navy SEAL** , I’m not intimidated by much. I’ve been around the world and fought on battlefields against enemy soldiers in hand-to-hand combat. As an aerial firefighter, **I’ve piloted planes through some of the most intense wildfires imaginable**.

While I’ve had some thrilling experiences, I’ve never feared the challenges that have been put before me - I assess each situation and determine how best to achieve the desired outcome with minimal harm to myself or to my team.

Last June 27th I declared my candidacy to be the next U.S. Senator for Montana - it was the first time in longer than I can remember that my new day job didn’t involve the risk of serious injury or even death. But just because I’m not putting myself in harm’s way at present,**I’m still in the line of fire.**

When I was deciding whether to challenge Jon Tester this spring, I did some digging to find out how much a U.S. Senate campaign costs and what I’d have to raise to be competitive against the last statewide elected Democrat. _**What I discovered shocked me. **_

**_OVER $70 MILLION WAS SPENT IN 2018 - AT THE TIME THE COSTLIEST FEDERAL RACE IN MONTANA’S HISTORY. CAMPAIGNS AND OUTSIDE SUPER PACS SPENT MORE THAN $98 PER PERSON TO INFLUENCE THEIR VOTE._ **

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0c5a3f51c2a049ddb32715e64668bdc8&_e=nVaRnUutjId8bgk7H5TWRLX7lMp0QpQXd6hAWw5GbafvTRdi1sU56Ys2yP7s80ihs7YVtTUfTw49R0FJTcR-GI9HyG5kfqzCW_sB0WAxgOVIaHk-MMQyaiCrYT38zw5nsKydO5FeFF3K5Z5GbwPKiiq9amUbscBRkS-ecKrMYBdw-g_VSJii4iJI-oVy0mtEPhziBQy9xuSslOsOrqsSzjYfkth-S1lsrE2oAv3PxDe1UmZBEaC58_0tEwOt7UhB29qYDYcE0JI1ctT7Eqvx7R4ccJN5NiJ6BwcXqN6lhUC67gXgraM1uSsL5i3UoQbbj5Rm3_70eCPp5UmDUK9Whdlf4caXxIboZ11I4EKaEyBVkhu2EbvUdZZJnQ18SvGZ)
Given that my opponent raised more than $15 million last year **the 2018 record won’t stand.**

While I’m not scared of the task ahead of me, **it is daunting to imagine raising the money I’ll need to successfully win this election.** By some estimates that sum will be more than $100 million dollars.

I know we’re not going to raise the money we need all at once - or even in a year’s time. What I do know is that we will raise it. We’re setting goals each day - and **[if we continue to hit them, we’ll eventually get to where we need to be](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0c5a3f51c2a049ddb32715e64668bdc8&_e=nVaRnUutjId8bgk7H5TWRLX7lMp0QpQXd6hAWw5GbafvTRdi1sU56Ys2yP7s80ihs7YVtTUfTw49R0FJTcR-GI9HyG5kfqzCW_sB0WAxgOVIaHk-MMQyaiCrYT38zw5nsKydO5FeFF3K5Z5GbwPKiiq9amUbscBRkS-ecKrMYBdw-g_VSJii4iJI-oVy0mtEPhziBQy9xuSslOsOrqsSzjYfkth-S1lsrE2oAv3PxDc4jFPXgHPWUg2cpC6sJNlH2wYGlR_5pF1LUf6RxrcmylOLueRh4YKKBFpfL4xFz_k5BSwIqTf7AOBeuKSWQAEwX8mEuVPNaLX6h3vZ--mn-rrFjBPIl9w-c9JilTAX3Wc_V1E6soQIWyfC1D1Kmgp-)**.

**[I’m coming to you today to let you know that we’re aiming to raise $999 today](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0c5a3f51c2a049ddb32715e64668bdc8&_e=nVaRnUutjId8bgk7H5TWRLX7lMp0QpQXd6hAWw5GbafvTRdi1sU56Ys2yP7s80ihs7YVtTUfTw49R0FJTcR-GI9HyG5kfqzCW_sB0WAxgOVIaHk-MMQyaiCrYT38zw5nsKydO5FeFF3K5Z5GbwPKiiq9amUbscBRkS-ecKrMYBdw-g_VSJii4iJI-oVy0mtEPhziBQy9xuSslOsOrqsSzjYfkth-S1lsrE2oAv3PxDc2hTiwYWtEp0tJzJO4LY_1FIOpehe_H9uZRf9ImH2rBSnMDRAxVBL9mCy3hWVyx63hOlL0aEH8pxd_mIZ5HExOahJ7m7Cq97tfPLySegCA7btsabuZn1IRJSQXUDpVHhpxGz7742JrfLgWVpLf85ad)**.

Divide that by 65 and we just need you and 64 other patriots to **chip in $15** before midnight.

[**HELP ME HIT MY $999 GOAL TODAY ->
**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0c5a3f51c2a049ddb32715e64668bdc8&_e=nVaRnUutjId8bgk7H5TWRLX7lMp0QpQXd6hAWw5GbafvTRdi1sU56Ys2yP7s80ihs7YVtTUfTw49R0FJTcR-GI9HyG5kfqzCW_sB0WAxgOVIaHk-MMQyaiCrYT38zw5nsKydO5FeFF3K5Z5GbwPKiiq9amUbscBRkS-ecKrMYBdw-g_VSJii4iJI-oVy0mtEPhziBQy9xuSslOsOrqsSzjYfkth-S1lsrE2oAv3PxDeVQGzqwzRI4DrYHpNJf1LXeTy2-bcd3Kee68hXna78vWiVCfq1_Fv2qJXa_DJ81m40hD4h_nQLd2oLlEaeXyb5o9NEcXb2g84L4KNahf6HdlQi50kPItzpSbHcJQup5xotWniDd4SzLpory1WyYrgG)

Are you able to assist?

With respect,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican for U.S. Senate

[**SEND IN THE SEAL
CHIP IN TODAY **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0c5a3f51c2a049ddb32715e64668bdc8&_e=nVaRnUutjId8bgk7H5TWRLX7lMp0QpQXd6hAWw5GbafvTRdi1sU56Ys2yP7s80ihs7YVtTUfTw49R0FJTcR-GI9HyG5kfqzCW_sB0WAxgOVIaHk-MMQyaiCrYT38zw5nsKydO5FeFF3K5Z5GbwPKiiq9amUbscBRkS-ecKrMYBdw-g_VSJii4iJI-oVy0mtEPhziBQy9xuSslOsOrqsSzjYfkth-S1lsrE2oAv3PxDeemhFgRFk2_o_V9BC1xD45u3RDjNH_quMP-AcAqKS_IKz16IbvVX6nd9ofPBemzaUVqUnZd3haNwd67e0GMBk6WFZfIoqoFEzf4InB_UIBC1WegjfwFHpEyJRb_WKhifSHnsb-CSmTvHeKn3Gll2Fq)

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

[ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0c5a3f51c2a049ddb32715e64668bdc8&_e=nVaRnUutjId8bgk7H5TWRLX7lMp0QpQXd6hAWw5GbafvTRdi1sU56Ys2yP7s80ihs7YVtTUfTw49R0FJTcR-GI9HyG5kfqzCW_sB0WAxgOVIaHk-MMQyaiCrYT38zw5nsKydO5FeFF3K5Z5GbwPKiiq9amUbscBRkS-ecKrMYBdw-g_VSJii4iJI-oVy0mtEPhziBQy9xuSslOsOrqsSzjYfkth-S1lsrE2oAv3PxDf4WLkGnvZbbGAR3uEiyoHrNr0g7Z8xMUJFQHexj_hsrk6fR_1tnIw_rUwCLelbN7VxJEmJOTAUmnSeTlRpjvKrZr5JQzpKyU7gveb7CVm4KPV_8daCm_S88UadqXecCsHhaC2e0-pBUK0kWnNA8P15)

Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
clean_body: In 2018, Democrats spent $98 per voter to win the Senate Race. Six years later, it is only going to get more expensive | | Fellow Conservative, $98 PER PERSON As a former Navy SEAL , I’m not intimidated by much. I’ve been around the world and fought on battlefields against enemy soldiers in hand-to-hand combat. As an aerial firefighter, I’ve piloted planes through some of the most intense wildfires imaginable. While I’ve had some thrilling experiences, I’ve never feared the challenges that have been put before me - I assess each situation and determine how best to achieve the desired outcome with minimal harm to myself or to my team. Last June 27th I declared my candidacy to be the next U.S. Senator for Montana - it was the first time in longer than I can remember that my new day job didn’t involve the risk of serious injury or even death. But just because I’m not putting myself in harm’s way at present,I’m still in the line of fire. When I was deciding whether to challenge Jon Tester this spring, I did some digging to find out how much a U.S. Senate campaign costs and what I’d have to raise to be competitive against the last statewide elected Democrat. What I discovered shocked me. OVER $70 MILLION WAS SPENT IN 2018 - AT THE TIME THE COSTLIEST FEDERAL RACE IN MONTANA’S HISTORY. CAMPAIGNS AND OUTSIDE SUPER PACS SPENT MORE THAN $98 PER PERSON TO INFLUENCE THEIR VOTE. Given that my opponent raised more than $15 million last year the 2018 record won’t stand. While I’m not scared of the task ahead of me, it is daunting to imagine raising the money I’ll need to successfully win this election. By some estimates that sum will be more than $100 million dollars. I know we’re not going to raise the money we need all at once - or even in a year’s time. What I do know is that we will raise it. We’re setting goals each day - and -. . Divide that by 65 and we just need you and 64 other patriots to chip in $15 before midnight. Are you able to assist? With respect, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Team,
The first presidential primaries of the 2024 election cycle are just days away, underscoring the urgent need for states to finalize maps that give every voter a chance to vote for their candidates of choice.
But anti-democracy extremists are working feverishly behind the scenes to manipulate maps in a desperate attempt to hold on to power. Let’s be clear: by trying to seize power for themselves, these folks are trying to _steal_ power from voters.
That’s what gerrymandering does. And that’s why we’re working to end it. **We believe voters — not politicians — should decide elections.**
**[That work matters a ton right now — chip in today to help All On The Line keep and return voting power to the people and ensure every American has an equal say in our government.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77473004/450521345/-438804700?refcode=20240117_AOTL_VotersDecide1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE5MTg1OTFlLTc2YjgtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ixJHXOAbFXvTqld4Ni9BZHUDvsaDDiOryBS69QLUqoY=)**

With your help, we’re building a groundswell of grassroots support for the fair maps movement, mobilizing passionate people to demand action when unfair maps threaten the rights of voters, and returning the power to decide elections to people across the nation.

Hi Derek – Tomorrow is the anniversary of the Roe v. Wade ruling, a landmark decision that guaranteed the right to an abortion. Since the decision was overturned by the Supreme Court in 2022, Republicans have outright banned abortion in 14 states and introduced anti-abortion bills across the country, including right here in Pennsylvania – affecting millions of Americans. If the extremist GOP win in 2024, they'll continue their anti-abortion crusade, pushing for abortion bans and interfering with the basic right to make our own health care decisions. Thankfully, abortion is currently protected in Pennsylvania — but without Democratic leadership in Washington, those protections are at risk across the entire country. Anti-abortion efforts have been rejected in ballot initiatives across the country, but we must come together to reject them again in 2024. We must never give up on this fight. Thankfully, abortion is currently protected in Pennsylvania — but without Democratic leadership in Washington, those protections are at risk across the entire country. Anti-abortion efforts have been rejected in ballot initiatives across the country, but we must come together to reject them again in 2024. We must never give up on this fight. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you for continuing to stand in this fight with us, Derek. – Team Deluzio HQ | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country. Will you join Chris' team and help keep PA-17 blue? = = PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS Chris Deluzio is a United States veteran. Use of rank, title, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense, Department of the Navy or the Department of the Army. Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States

Friend,
The People’s Policy Project calls my bill “by far the best child allowance proposal introduced in Congress.”1
When Congress expanded the Child Tax Credit during the pandemic to be available to all families with young kids, we cut child poverty by 40%. **This made an incredible difference in the lives of millions of families!**
Sadly, Congress allowed the expanded Child Tax Credit to expire. Now, they’re debating a tax package that would modestly improve the existing CTC, but it would still leave roughly 3 million of the poorest children behind. And it’s being combined with a corporate tax package with tens of billions of dollars in handouts to wealthy corporations. **That’s not good enough!**
My bill, the _End Child Poverty Act_ , would replace the Child Tax Credit and cover all children, including the lowest-wealth families who are traditionally left out of the tax credit system.
**This legislation would create a universal, monthly child allowance of nearly $400 per child.** Since each child will be automatically enrolled at birth when they apply for their Social Security number, there is no need for annual paperwork. This benefit will simply continue every month until a child’s 19th birthday, ensuring that families and children have an opportunity to thrive.
[**Sign now to become a grassroots co-signer of the**** _End Child Poverty Act_****, which would dramatically cut child poverty by providing families with a universal benefit from children’s birth through their teenage years.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlBNhiUhIkbX_VXVxXAv8Qe4hUUUDrFIVikoYCvH929nwsUb7XqZQUDGRQN_hpQcny1wh4izYpcl6GjRR7j9UEbPHaPzwIc0ME2SGVBAIAVhFl3NPGVPr8y7YfxlrWG1Vm0AotrNxzPtkzwoIJSO_8Rkuov0A7VwFzGYAq5JgiIvGzc0ZqJvNtivSkrL_zSQT_I6Klf6R2UJhbBhM3O_SeGNupnvF4Fhp5MJGZAr01t_l5tpgNYThBD7i2hbI84j0bKuNq_L9vH3SjnMdQYrztdJM1l_AKhlDhEBaPcUdLMunmwjAFvh8wxI9XjxJVy-RwzTd3nWGsfHelmrnl7v6pB/436/IDp44SSIRSCERJEG_04xJw/h5/5B5cP3sFg_nF0Kmkgx9-V92VvfHKKQU4hl7CBV1CIrc)
[SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlBNhiUhIkbX_VXVxXAv8Qe4hUUUDrFIVikoYCvH929nwsUb7XqZQUDGRQN_hpQcny1wh4izYpcl6GjRR7j9UEbPHaPzwIc0ME2SGVBAIAVhIx75F7NgObUylSsZvbAqYRH8WCOYXwSbdIT4jINuwKNbpe7b68wfZEqnlzk8CLtqIeE0t8DlBYdsJNgGK8lceNeb1FZEuB50tU726EcrkGAKQJYDW_tBHnc202B33jflJSx3JSvOIjzdD_70kER4ASbNgRxa1b99I0DC8FU_XZbIy-B9IbocEeckkrKM_UDZjmvtV596KAT9PWTj0bRz8m0OI7TD5xO-amApL5KwBny/436/IDp44SSIRSCERJEG_04xJw/h6/p_E0ojhTF5wCO32cOT9apSkGtOZL_kWV67BugF_uHcY)

Programs like the _End Child Poverty Act_ have been a proven success in countries like Denmark, Sweden, Norway, and Finland, which have some of the lowest childhood poverty rates in the world. **The People’s Policy Project estimates that this bill would cut child poverty by 64% and cut deep child poverty by 70%.**

Right now, we’re seeing a widening gap between the very rich and everyone else with billionaires getting wealthier as poorer people are falling further behind. We’re seeing significant rises in food and housing insecurity and instead of investing in vulnerable communities, Republicans are attempting to cut programs and services for marginalized communities
That's why we've got to demonstrate public support for this critical legislation!
[**Will you join me in fighting child poverty by becoming a grassroots co-signer of my bill, the**** _End Child Poverty Act_****, today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlBNhiUhIkbX_VXVxXAv8Qe4hUUUDrFIVikoYCvH929nwsUb7XqZQUDGRQN_hpQcny1wh4izYpcl6GjRR7j9UEbPHaPzwIc0ME2SGVBAIAVhDSbHxrAYa8EfaK19gtFcycr575bfZVwKjZrHW0XOGj_XOGJ3a3BoRNWRTdQGTfkbqzPfC15e-nkGlL0wh6P0mdWLcdkHUTS7JF2b20491hZxxDd-0p53qmw2JdOIWrZFIPajldBBatzHHvYufc2-58gzF18CUCEW4tiD4Kcg7t1KKry632eNTxVOroZKiQRQTUAyiS27uL9JTVmhU7vG2IqqPZYudlxhQJ0TaE4xOIz/436/IDp44SSIRSCERJEG_04xJw/h7/7t4AExY_wGs7Pouv7gyHOes_NfZXdGMu1-RYoglM_dA)
Together, let’s create a future where every child has the opportunity to thrive.
Thank you,
Rashida

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77473961/450523638/2020196845?refcode=WTEFHM38_20240121_CecilieRosenSplit_v1s3&sourceid=1052721&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZkOTI4ZS03NmI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FN_Lk7zyeSwZBIjynRtPoApEK0CH6MsG0VZZEvHW1Ng=) Peter,

**Tomorrow marks 51 years since safe, legal abortion became the law of the land in America.**

But instead of celebrating this landmark anniversary, we're living with the aftermath of the U.S. Supreme Court's decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_.

Since the Supreme Court took away this fundamental right, Republicans have banned and restricted abortion in states across the country, and threatened to pass a nationwide abortion ban if they regain Senate control. They've even indicated they plan to go after birth control.

In other words, there's a whole lot riding on what happens in Nevada this November. And I can tell you this: **My friend Sen. Jacky Rosen is exactly who we want in the Senate to keep fighting for reproductive freedom.**

Right now, _CNN_ analysts are calling Jacky one of the most vulnerable senators in the race that will likely decide Senate control, and an anti-choice billionaire has already poured $2 million into Nevada to flip her seat for Republicans.

Jacky's strong stance on reproductive rights is one of the reasons why the GOP has made her a top target for defeat — **and that's exactly why we need to do everything we possibly can to help her win in Nevada and defend our Democratic Senate majority this year.**

[**So please, Peter, will you join me in supporting Jacky today by making a gift of $10 or more to her and EMILYs List now to keep Nevada and the Senate blue and help restore reproductive freedom in America?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77473973/450523639/-838541466?refcode=WTEFHM38_20240121_CecilieRosenSplit_v1s3&sourceid=1052721&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZkOTI4ZS03NmI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FN_Lk7zyeSwZBIjynRtPoApEK0CH6MsG0VZZEvHW1Ng=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77473986/450523640/2020196845?expresslane=true&amount=15&refcode=WTEFHM38_20240121_CecilieRosenSplit_v1s3&sourceid=1052721&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZkOTI4ZS03NmI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FN_Lk7zyeSwZBIjynRtPoApEK0CH6MsG0VZZEvHW1Ng=) | [DONATE $35](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77473999/450523641/2020196845?expresslane=true&amount=35&refcode=WTEFHM38_20240121_CecilieRosenSplit_v1s3&sourceid=1052721&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZkOTI4ZS03NmI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FN_Lk7zyeSwZBIjynRtPoApEK0CH6MsG0VZZEvHW1Ng=)

| [ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=0798920619804136ba91b2540b9ff9af&_e=7rxhiaD1VrUrJjHGBBZOb96wg3gCb2eb2NIQQjzjpqniGCesOvwIlcACYgC44N71myA45wDNTv3I92Xf8zmRlkWkisMZ8FnYaR5pOeJQ3NLiCPY7Ew2AEiStv7IIdLGUxahJGW_wzzfEU78CdZZtWHepGyPfXfPqXzpmqgl5XP7_rUWF5bbFcHsBpehUTJ6OufnGWL4BK5HfbNrqE75p154hdGhaHFuO6wAjeGsEzrNiirGI3SVHY_3fVaxLAN5VVx1g5qkpDRff3bqegrcd9l0UzXl7JMae0sWPUwntjAbCO2liYMEeS8_zj2wffhlDNKriyjECuR_8opgmEpC1-CM2uq1qZo0H5GWObKZNUPk-GF_ILt6_F3S4UXSQxP-aAhWib98DVlbaBLZbNhKvkA%3D%3D)
---
Listen.

The Biden Administration is doing everything they can to maintain an open border. Our border crisis in America is not for lack of conservatives trying time and time again to put an end to illegal crossings, drugs and crime pouring in, and a burden on state economies. Rather than standing up to protect our nation, Biden officials are patting migrants on the back and propelling them into our communities.

**_It 's critical to understand that not only did Biden create this crisis with his executive orders, but he is doing everything he can to continue it. _**

**Border states put up their own barriers, and the Biden Administration sues.

States also passed their own laws to deport illegal crossers.

Again, the Biden Administration sued.

The Biden Administration also went to court to end Title 42, which limited crossings.

** Joe Biden has fought every legislative & legal attempt to end this crisis. He's putting DRUG CARTELS ahead of AMERICAN CITIZENS. We have the chance to fight back against our depraved leaders in Washington this November and reinstate a conservative, America First leader in the White House and in seats across the country. The responsibility to secure the border falls on us TODAY.

**[If you support closing the border and ending our national crisis, click here to show your support.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=0798920619804136ba91b2540b9ff9af&_e=7rxhiaD1VrUrJjHGBBZOb96wg3gCb2eb2NIQQjzjpqniGCesOvwIlcACYgC44N71myA45wDNTv3I92Xf8zmRlkWkisMZ8FnYaR5pOeJQ3NLiCPY7Ew2AEiStv7IIdLGUxahJGW_wzzfEU78CdZZtWHepGyPfXfPqXzpmqgl5XP7_rUWF5bbFcHsBpehUTJ6OufnGWL4BK5HfbNrqE75p154hdGhaHFuO6wAjeGsEzrNiirGI3SVHY_3fVaxLAN5VaaHlBHUDb95T39oiJ6QqtyzLH8uU0BFtGcmZra8GMou7_pUjxmeAJahGGNK63SRZj4fDzP6sscyr0oe4w5IPgf4McuUdT3H4gimoDfsWNdqluOaELuHAWnfrFCdgCE4_2AH5lW01x3_ZxPq43ph-SA%3D%3D)**

- Nicole Malliotakis

clean_body: | Listen. The Biden Administration is doing everything they can to maintain an open border. Our border crisis in America is not for lack of conservatives trying time and time again to put an end to illegal crossings, drugs and crime pouring in, and a burden on state economies. Rather than standing up to protect our nation, Biden officials are patting migrants on the back and propelling them into our communities. It 's critical to understand that not only did Biden create this crisis with his executive orders, but he is doing everything he can to continue it. Border states put up their own barriers, and the Biden Administration sues. States also passed their own laws to deport illegal crossers. Again, the Biden Administration sued. The Biden Administration also went to court to end Title 42, which limited crossings. Joe Biden has fought every legislative & legal attempt to end this crisis. He's putting DRUG CARTELS ahead of AMERICAN CITIZENS. We have the chance to fight back against our depraved leaders in Washington this November and reinstate a conservative, America First leader in the White House and in seats across the country. The responsibility to secure the border falls on us TODAY. - Nicole Malliotakis | | Paid for by Nicole for New York Nicole for New York (Federal) P.O. Box 60487 Staten Island, NY 10306 View our privacy policy

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Citizens United
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5153%2E5257348%2EN8YhnE ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

14 years ago today, the Supreme Court issued its devastating decision in
Citizens United v. FEC, which allowed for a surge of corporate spending
and dark money donations in political campaigns.

That ruling was a terrible setback in the effort to reform our campaign
finance system. In fact, it made the situation infinitely worse.

I have a long history of fighting for campaign finance reform. Indeed, the
first bill I authored in Congress was the House version of the landmark
McCain-Feingold Act.

And I am not accepting a dime from corporate PACs for my campaign to the
United States Senate.

Derek, since
the Citizens United decision, our campaign finance system has allowed the
rich and powerful to exercise enormous influence over our elections.

Super PACs and mega-corporations have been able to translate their dollars
into political influence. And recent reports allege that GOP super PACs
are bending the rules even further to disguise who their donors are.

Derek, it
is a top priority of mine to fix this broken system.

It’s why I’m the lead author of the measure to repeal Citizens United
through a Constitutional Amendment.

Dark money has weakened the voices of our people — and I’m running for the
U.S. Senate to restore those voices, give them a seat at the table, and
make sure they are heard by their elected leaders.

Because our democracy is fragile, and with leaders like Donald Trump
trying to further bend and break the rules, it’s more important than ever
that we preserve and defend our values.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240121_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=5153%2E5257348%2EN8YhnE ]If you agree with this mission — that our campaign finance system is
broken and needs true, progressive reform — I hope you’ll pitch in now to
support my campaign to serve California in the U.S. Senate. It’s more
important than ever that our senators fight for our democracy every day —
and that’s exactly what I’ll do.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240121_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1005&akid=5153%2E5257348%2EN8YhnE ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240121_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1007&akid=5153%2E5257348%2EN8YhnE ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240121_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1008&akid=5153%2E5257348%2EN8YhnE ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240121_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=1009&akid=5153%2E5257348%2EN8YhnE ]EXPRESS DONATE
$250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240121_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=5153%2E5257348%2EN8YhnE ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Together, we’re rejecting the massive corporate influence in our political
system. We will reform the system by passing my Constitutional Amendment
to overturn Citizens United.

But to do that, and to stand up to the MAGA Republican Party’s millions of
dollars in dark money donations, I need your grassroots support.

Thank you for stepping up today.

— Adam

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Exposing Sinclair’s plan to erase local news
body:
For years now, the right-wing media empire has been responsible for the shuttering of local newsrooms nationwide.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77476989/450529580/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzlmMDkxNGQtN2FiOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XLAawIrRoumiB8_X0rUMex0fNQxRPF58slHKhBHgxIc=&emci=d4f7f046-13b7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=79f0914d-7ab8-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
Earlier this month, _The Baltimore Sun_ — the largest daily newspaper in Maryland — was purchased by the Sinclair Broadcast Group, the right-wing media empire that’s been taking over local media outlets for the last decade.
In case you don’t know, _The Baltimore Sun_ is one of the highest-quality newspapers in the country. In 2020, they won the Pulitzer Prize for local reporting.
Yet despite this fact, Sinclair’s ownership of _The Sun_ is off to a disturbing start:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77476995/450529581/-927058164?refcode=em20240121&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzlmMDkxNGQtN2FiOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XLAawIrRoumiB8_X0rUMex0fNQxRPF58slHKhBHgxIc=)
As local newsrooms close or get gobbled up by the right-wing Sinclair, more and more communities are being left without reliable local news coverage, leaving “news deserts” where communities are susceptible to right-wing disinformation.
At Courier Newsroom, we're fighting back by building the largest left-leaning network of local newsrooms in the country. [**We call ourselves Democracy's Newsroom — can you chip in today to power our work?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77477008/450529582/-927058164?refcode=em20240121&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzlmMDkxNGQtN2FiOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XLAawIrRoumiB8_X0rUMex0fNQxRPF58slHKhBHgxIc=)
Just last year, Sinclair made news by ceasing most or all local news broadcasts at 10 of its stations in different cities and states across the country.
As multiple news teams were laid off, they were replaced by Sinclair’s national weekday program, _The National Desk_ — **which has a lengthy history of platforming right-wing misinformation.**
Unsurprisingly, _The National Desk_ is no substitute for real local news. The program devotes the overwhelming majority of its programming to national news stories and has aired and repeated right-wing misinformation and conspiracy theories on everything from the January 6th insurrection to immigration and much more.
But that’s not all, Peter. Sinclair has even used the program to propagate antisemitic stereotypes and conspiracy theories.
**_Needless to say, none of this is good for our democracy._**
With one of the most consequential elections in our lifetime approaching, the need for accessible, factual news to cut through right-wing BS has never been more critical.
And it’s become increasingly clear that the mainstream media aren’t up for the task.
That’s why Courier Newsroom was founded to be the antidote to right-wing misinformation. Our mission of providing local, factual news restores trust in journalism, a key institution of any healthy democracy.
But if we’re going to remain at the forefront of exposing dangerous propaganda from right-wing media empires like the Sinclair Broadcast Group, it’s _essential_ that our newsrooms have the resources they need to continue providing their communities with high-quality journalism.
**[So, can you pitch in $5 today to support Courier Newsroom's honest journalism?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77477009/450529610/-927058164?refcode=em20240121&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzlmMDkxNGQtN2FiOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XLAawIrRoumiB8_X0rUMex0fNQxRPF58slHKhBHgxIc=)**
Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77477010/450529611/-927058164?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em20240121&refcode2=79f0914d-7ab8-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzlmMDkxNGQtN2FiOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XLAawIrRoumiB8_X0rUMex0fNQxRPF58slHKhBHgxIc=) | [$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77477011/450529612/-927058164?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em20240121&refcode2=79f0914d-7ab8-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzlmMDkxNGQtN2FiOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XLAawIrRoumiB8_X0rUMex0fNQxRPF58slHKhBHgxIc=) | [$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77477012/450529613/-927058164?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em20240121&refcode2=79f0914d-7ab8-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzlmMDkxNGQtN2FiOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XLAawIrRoumiB8_X0rUMex0fNQxRPF58slHKhBHgxIc=) | [$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77477014/450529615/-927058164?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em20240121&refcode2=79f0914d-7ab8-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzlmMDkxNGQtN2FiOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XLAawIrRoumiB8_X0rUMex0fNQxRPF58slHKhBHgxIc=)

Thank you,
— Courier Newsroom

Hi Peter, it’s Tom Suozzi. Fight for Progress asked me to reach out to you with an important message.

When George Santos became a member of Congress one year ago, we knew his lies made him unqualified for office. In December, he was finally held accountable and expelled. Now, in just 23 days, we can replace him in the _toss-up_ special election on February 13.

In a time of ever-increasing polarization and division, now is our chance to make a change for the better. The eyes of the nation will be on NY-03, and it’s up to us what they see. Will we elect a unifier or a divider? Will we finally break through our crippling gridlock, or will we continue to fail to solve big problems like climate change, a broken immigration system, rising costs, and gun violence? All that and more is at stake in this election.

Peter, this is a critical moment for our nation, and I need you by my side.

[_**Will you rush a split donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress right away to help win this crucial special election?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77477084/450529720/-349024561?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-01-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlZjA5MTRkLTdhYjgtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=49oB15lXbQ7x_0LZiElnzyDpzOj6vgBgpr6yDzi4gO0=)

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Dark money in politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Citizens United is a scourge on our democracy, and today is the 14th anniversary of the disastrous Supreme Court ruling that broke open the floodgates for dark money
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77477399/450530627/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTdmMTAwNi03YmI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oocs8j1nHev3DSehjDLBFsHmn-vsa_Y8XntvSxU_sX0=&emci=6d47c356-23b7-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=d97f1006-7bb8-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=7731215)
---

| | _Citizens United_ is a scourge on our democracy, and today is the 14th anniversary of the disastrous Supreme Court ruling that broke open the floodgates for dark money – sending a deluge of anonymous campaign cash from big corporations and unaccountable billionaires crashing into our political process. The millions and millions of dollars in dark money super PACs are spewing into our elections swamp the airwaves with disinformation and impact outcomes. Every person has a right to use their voice in the democratic process – that's the beauty of the First Amendment. **But corporations are not people.** My colleagues and I are elected to work for "We the People," but with right-wing billionaires corrupting the Supreme Court, members of Congress trading stocks giving the appearance of conflicts of interest, and corporate polluters funneling dark money into Super PACs to manipulate our electoral system, the people's voice is being drowned out. We need to end these practices right now, and that's why I'm championing key bills like the _DISCLOSE Act_ to put a stop to the anti-democratic forces targeting our right to free and fair elections. **The _DISCLOSE Act_** would end the influence of dark money, shine a bright light of transparency on political spending, and make our government more accountable to voters. Dark money allows donors with special interests to hide their identities, making it impossible for Americans to know who is behind the massive flow of money to influence our elections and what motivates them. A healthy democracy can only function when peoples' voices are heard. It's long past time for Congress to pass this bill and stop billionaires with right-wing agendas from secretly buying our elections with dark money smear campaigns. clean_body: Citizens United is a scourge on our democracy, and today is the 14th anniversary of the disastrous Supreme Court ruling that broke open the floodgates for dark money | | | | Citizens United is a scourge on our democracy, and today is the 14th anniversary of the disastrous Supreme Court ruling that broke open the floodgates for dark money – sending a deluge of anonymous campaign cash from big corporations and unaccountable billionaires crashing into our political process. The millions and millions of dollars in dark money super PACs are spewing into our elections swamp the airwaves with disinformation and impact outcomes. Every person has a right to use their voice in the democratic process – that's the beauty of the First Amendment. But corporations are not people. My colleagues and I are elected to work for "We the People," but with right-wing billionaires corrupting the Supreme Court, members of Congress trading stocks giving the appearance of conflicts of interest, and corporate polluters funneling dark money into Super PACs to manipulate our electoral system, the people's voice is being drowned out. We need to end these practices right now, and that's why I'm championing key bills like the DISCLOSE Act to put a stop to the anti-democratic forces targeting our right to free and fair elections. The DISCLOSE Act would end the influence of dark money, shine a bright light of transparency on political spending, and make our government more accountable to voters. Dark money allows donors with special interests to hide their identities, making it impossible for Americans to know who is behind the massive flow of money to influence our elections and what motivates them. A healthy democracy can only function when peoples' voices are heard. It's long past time for Congress to pass this bill and stop billionaires with right-wing agendas from secretly buying our elections with dark money smear campaigns. Onward! | | Peter, Being a military spouse was hard. Hung and I stayed together through two decades of deployments to the Middle East and Africa. I’m not going to lie, it was difficult having a loved one on the front lines in some of the most dangerous places on the planet. But I knew the sacrifices were worth it because he was keeping the enemy at bay so our children would be safe at home. Today, the fight for our children’s future looks a little different. After 25 years, Hung traded his Navy uniform for a polo and jeans. Now, his travels take him across our Commonwealth, not across the world. And instead of taking command on the battlefield, he’s listening to the needs and concerns of Virginia voters. **[Hung is running for U.S. Senate because he sees the radical Left trying to make our sacrifice as a military family be in vain. ](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=e4ed2608de90428493668c5e14a897e5&_e=g1-SZREo6Q91dwGIMZ_XOfOM3M8KxTAzEfUCHw5RjqnUBWI2tvLg35ehlyJXMA8a16RVSSgSVTYkS8kU-M8HO760hH-GKqeROxtCdyIqyjCmNtPtvqWQeUhFYjNYNeOUPSNjFEWhDw5LwK-OHebtJ9H6d0g718Sy_Th1bHbnSrTX8INWf9hxe06Ie41MAfoKbB4abjwn78SXhbHAV_d0iYeLeAxAg2HV4BaSRj5aV6LxwPkRB-y0adRFOQ_T6Omq7wdLreu-MjHfA3JYeL2wRm24vIZJZJ9QaqErreTg5Q5kVw_gdzP-2Lge-8tDML8VxDNbQ4bNxA39h5luVu_adzywdaDNtUsPjysiquTp3gznrmAk549YZPEPUtrTFIK2Lm0UjMgiUF2Zq0LNxXFTkQ%3D%3D)**

They’re cheering on the same enemies he fought to protect us from. They’re trying to eradicate free speech and they’re turning our schools into institutions more focused on indoctrination than teaching them to be productive members of society through excellence in math, reading, and writing. Everything Hung, and all of our veterans, fought for is on the line and right now he needs your help. Democrats are doing everything they can to attack him because they know he is the ONLY person who can flip Virginia RED. The Left is prepared to unleash millions on him, and as a newcomer to the political scene, he can’t call on mega-donors with the push of a button. That’s where you come in.

Thank You,

April Cao

name: Team Tina
subject: How we’re helping downtown Portland
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
It’s time to help downtown Portland turn a corner, Peter. Last year, Governor Kotek announced the creation of the Portland Central City Task Force to address the challenges facing downtown Portland. The task force aimed to develop concrete next steps to strengthen the city’s economic future, improve community safety, help people experiencing homelessness, and more. Tina recently released 10 priority recommendations from the Portland Central City Task Force, and she needs your support. The plan will:
* Declare a fentanyl emergency in partnership with the City and County
* Ban public drug use
* Add more shelters and services for unhoused people
* Clean up trash and graffiti, and take down plywood and fences

Tina is committed to this plan to support a vibrant Portland. Oregonians deserve a place where everyone feels safe and can enjoy the state’s largest city. [_**We have the opportunity to make this vision a reality, and we’re asking for your support. Will you endorse Tina’s recommendations for the Portland Central City Task Force today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77478964/450533568/1705217141?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240121_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmJjNTQzZC03ZGI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-cJDvCr7fFgtmK1pKBGyNm7CIwh2Vlel-_QCvP1n2b0=&emci=841870f0-2eb6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=16bc543d-7db8-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=15353729) | [ENDORSE THE PLAN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77478966/450533570/1705217141?contactdata=re40WN37vOdMzypy/N7bLUjMihdGcih9syjzRymlhj/6mqZDXaCvBQqIjvjCP6iqKBPrGtt+vHLd9Xx/uZMaVotxxghLPrrtRu2EPNtURjqDeE5xCT8bvWb1sAYXZ+r0+ytW2dMd2HVgrjsmlk5rURz2VZ92bzfuJv79zxx6iSA=&refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240121_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmJjNTQzZC03ZGI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-cJDvCr7fFgtmK1pKBGyNm7CIwh2Vlel-_QCvP1n2b0=&emci=841870f0-2eb6-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=16bc543d-7db8-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=15353729)

name: Qasim Rashid
subject: A re-introduction
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY QASIM FOR CONGRESS]
body:
[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/9?t=1001&akid=35146%2E120265%2EW2MpvL ]Qasim for Congress

Hi There,

Now that we’re less than 9 weeks from Election Day, our team of supporters
is growing rapidly. So, I’d like to take the opportunity to re-introduce
myself!

I’m Qasim Rashid, human rights lawyer, author, and dad joke aficionado,
and I’m running for Congress here in my home district of IL-11. My family
immigrated from Pakistan to the United States when I was five years old
and settled in DuPage County, where I spent the rest of my childhood.

During high school, I ran track and cross-country at Glenbard South, then
continued my running career at North Central College, ultimately earning a
degree from UIC. With the encouragement of my wife Ayesha, I went on to
earn a law degree to advance my human rights advocacy for marginalized
communities.

As a human rights lawyer, I have seen firsthand how this country’s laws
and systems unfairly work for those who already have money and power, and
leave everyone else behind.

That’s exactly why I’m running for Congress. It’s time to demand justice
and ensure that the government works for everyone.

I want to fight for the community that raised me, and I want you and your
family to have a true advocate in your corner.

But, I can’t do this without your help. I’m running against a 16-year,
corporate-funded incumbent – and we know that winning will be an uphill
battle. [ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5200?t=1002&akid=35146%2E120265%2EW2MpvL ]We’re going to win this race with people power, and I need you
with me if we’re going to do it. With less than 9 weeks left until
Election Day, can you make a contribution right now to help power us to
victory?

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5200?t=1003&akid=35146%2E120265%2EW2MpvL ]DONATE

I’m honored you’re with me, now let’s win this race.

Sincerely,

– Qasim

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1004&akid=35146%2E120265%2EW2MpvL
Update Your Information: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/signup/update-your-info/
Unsubscribe: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=35146%2E120265%2EW2MpvL

[PAID FOR BY QASIM FOR CONGRESS]

Doctors cannot explain how [**doing this**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jjFPwzAQRn-NszU6ny92Fg-lUZAKqkB0YUKO7VBDTFInldV_jxIh1ntP9z0TpyH0d83UA0O8BDczRCb2DPH6nmO6fcWnx92Jmt1VnmK1QjwwxOU--X_z70npownDelVN4bToHVDhNVdQ1ZWUoi4uGiVUde1EB5yEsT2QV1WnhHHEqbOqCBoBCThyrkCQKgH6GiVwKSwnaTgj2HZKE30K1vB5ySalcYylHWMx6MuyTPMW1jJsc86l6QaEJX2vAsMWn18PYmXH5vxyfls90c7jLVn_ERwTjYl9yMl5h_xofpD2RdJuymEYwiwVI_jcAuwYfwMAAP__xbVeGg) after pulling on your earlobe can work better than $3,000 hearing aids.

subject: [WATCH] Jon Hamm’s message for Missouri

body:
#
Peter — Jon Hamm has a message for Missouri:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43063?refcode=em20240121-4646&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4646%2E614464%2Eez7DIi)
**_[Click here to watch this special message from Jon Hamm, then chip in $10 or more to help Lucas Kunce replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43063?refcode=em20240121-4646&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4646%2E614464%2Eez7DIi)_**
Any born-and-raised Missourian will tell you: Missouri is the Show Me State.
But the only thing Josh Hawley has shown us during his time in the U.S. Senate is how to be a fraud and a coward — from skittering away from the same mob he raised his fist for outside the Capitol on January 6th to using his own power to strip away rights for everyday people in Missouri and all across the country.
**This election is our opportunity to defeat him.** Hawley won his last race with only 51% of the vote. In the years since, he’s become the most popular GOP Senator running for re-election in 2024 — with approvals even lower than Ted Cruz and Rick Scott. Now, multiple polls even show that Hawley is already in a dead heat with Lucas.
That doesn’t mean it’s going to be easy — after all, GOP insiders at the NRSC haven’t stopped attacking Lucas since the day he got into this race — but we really can win this.
**[So Peter, will you help us defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat by adding your first donation of $10 or more toward our grassroots campaign to elect Lucas Kunce today? name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: The most corrupt government in Texas history
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

I think we can all agree that those who use their position of public trust
to enrich themselves or abuse their delegated powers are corrupt. And if
we can agree on that, there’s no denying that we currently have the most
corrupt government in Texas history.

We have Governor Abbott, who just accepted the largest bribe in the
history of Texas politics — a $6 million donation from an out-of-state
billionaire in return for pushing a private school voucher scam in our
state.

We have Attorney General Ken Paxton, who, in a civil court filing this
week, admitted to key allegations that led to his impeachment — just four
months after Senate Republicans returned him to the office of top cop and
acquitted him on a total of 16 charges of bribery, obstruction of justice,
and abuse of public office.

And if we had any doubt about whether corruption influenced Paxton’s
acquittal, we just have to look back to the summer, when Lieutenant
Governor Dan Patrick accepted $3 million from a pro-Paxton PAC just weeks
before presiding over the Senate trial.

These are the same guys who couldn’t keep the lights on or the heat
running in the energy capital of the world in 2021, causing more than 700
Texans to die because they cared more about their donors’ profits than
about fixing our broken power grid.

They’re the same failed leaders who engaged in a monumental cover-up
scheme in the aftermath of Uvalde; who in the nearly two years since that
tragedy have yet to fully hold accountable a single person who failed
those 19 children and two teachers.

Take all of this into account, and it couldn’t be more clear how dangerous
it is to keep these people in office. You know it, I know it, and now we
have to make sure every Texas voter knows it.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240121.Bu1e_N&refcode=ema20240121-238223&t=1001&akid=238223%2E444211%2ESZLUBp ]Can you help ensure we have the resources to reach, register, and turn
out the voters who will join our fight to remove corrupt politicians from
office?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240121.Bu1e_N&refcode=ema20240121-238223&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=238223%2E444211%2ESZLUBp ]DONATE

Every dollar will help us knock on doors, meet voters where they are, and
help Texans connect the dots on how this corruption has very real
consequences on our lives — from the quality of our schools to whether we
can keep the lights on and keep our kids safe.

If we all put in the work, I am confident that the voters we reach and
register will help us win a better future for our state.

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=238223%2E444211%2ESZLUBp

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

subject: The Devastating impact of Citizens United
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAPTUR FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77480870/450538381/1037629634?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=240121_team_citizens_united&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDg2YzgwNy04MGI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QmjF_jpcgNoi9tM0UwFQIMxwng46phSFRb5Ejjbi4Ew=)

Friend, Fourteen years ago today, the Supreme Court decided _Citizens United v. FEC_. The case overturned century-old campaign finance regulations, allowing corporations and special interest groups to spend unlimited amounts of money to influence our elections. It's hard to overstate what a disaster this has been for working people and for our democracy, friend. _**Our government should be for the people — not for the corporate interests that have hollowed out our Heartland.**_ Since the _Citizens United_ decision, super PACs and other dark-money groups have spent billions to influence our elections. The flood of corporate money in politics has made our democracy less transparent, more corrupt, and less responsive to the needs of working people in communities like ours. Friend, these are the forces we're up against. Marcy is leading the fight for campaign finance reform, to repeal _Citizens United_ and put the power back in the hands of working people. That's made her a top target for the national GOP and their special interest allies. [**We're building a grassroots movement that can fight back and win — but we need your support, friend. clean_body: | | = Friend, Fourteen years ago today, the Supreme Court decided Citizens United v. FEC. The case overturned century-old campaign finance regulations, allowing corporations and special interest groups to spend unlimited amounts of money to influence our elections. It's hard to overstate what a disaster this has been for working people and for our democracy, friend. Our government should be for the people — not for the corporate interests that have hollowed out our Heartland. Since the Citizens United decision, super PACs and other dark-money groups have spent billions to influence our elections. The flood of corporate money in politics has made our democracy less transparent, more corrupt, and less responsive to the needs of working people in communities like ours. Friend, these are the forces we're up against. Marcy is leading the fight for campaign finance reform, to repeal Citizens United and put the power back in the hands of working people. That's made her a top target for the national GOP and their special interest allies. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = Thank you so much for your support. — Team Kaptur | Marcy Kaptur is the longest-serving woman in Congress. # FROM THE DESK OF NEWT GINGRICH
---
| | Dear Reader,

Election season is upon us and the future of our country is at stake.

Make no mistake, this is as serious as it gets. Election integrity in America is no longer a sure thing.
**
It’s for exactly this reason that our nation needs The New York Sun.**
---

| | It’s a tenacious newspaper that pulls no punches in the battle for truth. It has been since it was founded in 1833. The Sun will watch this election like the press hawk that it is. **It will expose any and all misdeeds.****
****
** There’s no paper in this country that’s covered the prosecution by Democrats of their chief political opponent as doggedly as the Sun has. Its reporters, editors and analysts miss nothing and know exactly where the Constitution stands every step of the way.

I’ll be there too, publishing my thoughts as we go in my exclusive weekly Sun column.

I don’t have to tell you though that we’ll be up against a media machine that is many times our size. The cards will be stacked against us.

That's why we need every American to join us. If we win the battle for truth, we can take back our country. And I know that if we join together we will win.

Membership in the Sun starts at just a penny a day. Don’t delay. We need you with us.
---

subject: RE: Republican Ballot Harvesting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 - here's the gist:

| |

---
| | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here's the gist:](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=19a310ac3f8141dfbf5a2ceb7c8f64f9&_e=5mIG51OMsLFyBJdSknisAZkUiNQukYuM4BFx0ihQ2hSswRZKfLdnGUwxmoiwIN5axYxbPiTv8QcPpjGjbu_K0EzDV2qwy5N3r7ciSX2GYVpcF2kga5lBINRzMLvkQXlw2JXY2NMZSY9sgJdKB9wawpNHkhmeCBd-zFJk8H6F9vuXABL-VVR6ytiYHEQSV2ZaPnGLL_THLHj2RuwIEoEwVQgr5WK5J8D0yT1vN2x0K75vQGWqFmDRRdsabs8wAN31TsVR1eRKziToXlu2UGfFgu-51Xhuoy5FROfJwmeC37uFhOM3-RaUc3jT-uuvz1FoYu-xFmeVw-2nOwj0_xNWJ18aaoD8ThuvoKliyZgggv2nf6yFsI_HgUtmoaH1ta4dg8sfHWhgCrEEWI00t8M2OYHoPtHGkvZt0cMQF_x_Qh4%3D "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That's why I'm coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=19a310ac3f8141dfbf5a2ceb7c8f64f9&_e=5mIG51OMsLFyBJdSknisAZkUiNQukYuM4BFx0ihQ2hSswRZKfLdnGUwxmoiwIN5axYxbPiTv8QcPpjGjbu_K0EzDV2qwy5N3r7ciSX2GYVpcF2kga5lBINRzMLvkQXlw2JXY2NMZSY9sgJdKB9wawpNHkhmeCBd-zFJk8H6F9vuXABL-VVR6ytiYHEQSV2ZaPnGLL_THLHj2RuwIEoEwVQgr5WK5J8D0yT1vN2x0K75vQGWqFmDRRdsabs8wAN31TsVR1eRKziToXlu2UGfFgiy6tv7TghyDk-heNXsN4vRM5tZu3uJFTeoWHL_-JJHizQ7LSYxXCMrUpeeN0hsD2TRlke4dXJt-xgapYYqkjX4_SWtmL7KoWLNm_VU4IaS82kCbhHMbjfsdftetre59L_723VL3YTP0IytDaWyLwZA%3D "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?")**_ I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have **1)** a Conservative House Majority, **2)** a Conservative Senate, and **3)** a Conservative in the White House.

_If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in?_
---

name: Harry Dunn
subject: Is this America?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Hey team , Harry Dunn here.
This is a tough email to start – how do you talk about one of the darkest days of your life? Not to mention, an irreparable stain on this country's history.
So I guess I'll start with a question. Is this America?
Is attacking Capitol police officers – honest, good people dedicated to protecting and serving democracy – with baseball bats and spears, spraying them with WD-40, calling them hateful slurs – is that America?
Is a President of the United States emboldening a riot on the Capitol, encouraging people threatening to kill former Speaker Nancy Pelosi, former Vice President Mike Pence, who traveled to Washington ready to act on those threats – is that America?
That's not American to me. I believe in an America that protects its people, regardless of their political beliefs. An America that values democracy and those that are chosen to represent it. That's what I believed in while I served as a Capitol police officer during the January 6 insurrection.
If that's the American you believe in, I'm hoping you'll chip in a split donation of $10 or more to Seth Moulton and my campaign for US Congress. I protected this democracy as a Capitol police officer on January 6th and I'm ready to protect it as the next Congressman from MD-03. Please, rush a donation to become a Founding Donor of this campaign: [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Together,
Harry Dunn

Our movement built on grassroots support can defeat them, but it won’t be easy. **[We can’t risk losing the governorship to my extreme opponent. North Carolina is my home. It’s where my wife Anna and I grew up, and it’s where we were proud to raise our family. I’ve committed my career to making this state a better place for all of us.
Governor Roy Cooper can’t run again as he is term limited, and I’m incredibly proud to have his support in the fight to succeed him. We’ve all seen just how important it is to have a Democrat in the Governor’s Office. I plan to continue the progress my friend Roy Cooper has made over the last 7 years. From leading the transition to a clean energy economy to expanding Medicaid, we’ve made great strides under Governor Cooper’s leadership.
**But now, our future is on the line.**
Far-right politicians want to take us backward. They want a total ban on abortion, to roll back voting rights, and to defund our public schools — among other dangerous, far-right priorities.
Instead of doing the hard work to make this state better for folks like you and me, Republican extremists in Raleigh spend their time obsessing over culture wars and pandering to the far-right fringes of their party.
**[Peter, I’m ready to fight back with whatever it takes, but I need your help. Can Roy and I count on you to split a contribution now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77481945/450541676/-1609833307?refcode=ea.2f63e4ae-82b8-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.2f63e4ae-82b8-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjYzZTRhZS04MmI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U0hmdbfdMFCSRCGD9-lyExFYcoyq-zLqMFxErNBEGHk=)**

https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=30bf0e5de73801884a7ed691a9379098ca01005bd14260d5fa9822559f54746e14a3e78b585173d25ee504e0317f04323354025ec8847a04e27e51572690febf0785cac2ca9c82c8d4e4b69db85b27e8

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=209f64a0e077785bf8c045b36c2a5da2095c18375a564473c499e7227239f02fd8962cf83f501a002726fe79d663e54cf8caef6fb558826dfb70ee26ea765ce1

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=209f64a0e077785bf8c045b36c2a5da2095c18375a564473c499e7227239f02fd8962cf83f501a002726fe79d663e54cf8caef6fb558826dfb70ee26ea765ce1
Click here to listen to my message

Dear friend,

Today I am emailing you from Florida. The warmth of being home is a reminder of why I have chosen a life of public service—from joining the United States Navy and serving in Iraq—to representing the people in Congress—and now serving as governor.

And it reminds me why I decided to run for President: to fight for those who have been forgotten in this country.

This is America’s time for choosing.

We can choose to allow a border invasion or we can choose to stop it.

We can choose reckless borrowing and spending or we can choose to limit government and lower inflation.

We can choose political indoctrination, or we can choose classical education.

These choices are symptoms of the underlying struggle to ensure that constitutional government can endure and that Western Civilization can survive.

We launched this campaign to bring accountability to government, regain sovereignty at our border, and restore sanity to our society.

We cannot succeed as a country if we allow our nation to be invaded, our currency to be debased, our cities to crumble, and our kids to be indoctrinated.

The DC elites who have facilitated this mess do not work for you, they do not care about you; they work for themselves. They seek to accumulate power at your expense to pursue an agenda that is harmful to the American people.

Citizens do not serve politicians; it is the duty of politicians to serve you. Talk is cheap. Actions speak louder than words.

Reversing the decline of this nation requires leadership that delivers big results for the people we are elected to serve. I have a record of leading with conviction, championing an agenda marked by bold colors, delivering on my promises, and defeating the people who are responsible for our nation’s decline. That is the type of leadership we need for all of America.

Now over the past many months, Casey and I have traveled across the country to deliver a message of hope, that decline is a choice, and that we, in fact, can succeed again as a nation.

Nobody worked harder. And we left it all out on the field.

Now following our second-place finish in Iowa, we have prayed and deliberated on the way forward. If there was anything I could do to produce a favorable outcome — more campaign stops, more interviews — I would do it. But I can’t ask our supporters to volunteer their time and donate their resources if we don’t have a clear path to victory.

Accordingly, I am today suspending my campaign.

I am proud to have delivered on 100% of my promises and I will not stop now. It’s clear to me that a majority of Republican primary voters want to give Donald Trump another chance. They watched his presidency get stymied by relentless resistance and they see Democrats using lawfare to this day to attack him.

While I have had disagreements with Donald Trump, such as on the coronavirus pandemic and his elevation of Anthony Fauci, Trump is superior to the current incumbent, Joe Biden. That is clear.

I signed a pledge to support the Republican nominee and I will honor that pledge. He has my endorsement because we can’t go back to the old Republican guard of yesteryear —a repackaged form of warmed-over corporatism—that Nikki Haley represents.

The days of putting Americans last, of kowtowing to large corporations, of caving to woke ideology, are over.

I thank all of our passionate supporters who have stood by us through it all. That we had people volunteer to come to Iowa in the middle of a blizzard to knock on doors and make phone calls touched us dearly.

No candidate had more thrown at him, but no candidate had so many committed volunteers and staff.

Finally, I want to thank my wife Casey and our kids Madison, Mason, and Mamie. Casey has gone far above and beyond in her support for our campaign and for our cause. She is not only a great wife and mother; she is a great American, who cares deeply about the future of the country that our kids will inherit.

Our kids have seen and done a lot on the trail, from playing on the famed Field of Dreams baseball site in Iowa to making their first snowman in New Hampshire. They are one of the reasons we fight so hard for what we believe in.

Winston Churchill once remarked that “success is not final, failure is not fatal — it is the courage to continue that counts.”

While this campaign has ended, the mission continues. Down here in Florida, we will continue to show the country how to lead.

Thank you and God bless,

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=209f64a0e077785bf8c045b36c2a5da2095c18375a564473c499e7227239f02fd8962cf83f501a002726fe79d663e54cf8caef6fb558826dfb70ee26ea765ce1

Ron DeSantis

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President

PO Box 3696

Tallahassee, FL 32315

name: Andres Weller
subject: REMINDER: RYAN MACKENZIE Petition Circulation Training Tomorrow 6:00 PM
body:
[image: fe91ed33-a759-4e7d-9211-4bb4d0c6180b.jpg]

This is a reminder if you haven't signed up already to join our petition
team to circulate petitions to get Ryan Mackenzie on the ballot please sign
up today.

Ryan Mackenzie for U.S. Congress needs your help to get on the ballot and
defeat radical Susan Wild. The petition period for candidates to get on the
ballot is almost here! Join our team today and join us in circulating
petitions and our FREE New Year Campaign Kick-off Event on Monday, Jan.
22nd, at 6:00 P.M. at Big Woody's Emmaus.

*PETITION KICK-OFF EVENT: Monday, January 22nd at 6:00 P.M. to 7:30 P.M. at
Big Woody's Emmaus Location: 3941 Chestnut St. Emmaus PA 18049*. Come out
and join our growing team of volunteers and activists to get your petition
packet and help Ryan get on the ballot!

*SIGN UP TO HELP & RSVP TO THE EVENT HERE*:
https://forms.gle/yF7qMoXLPAdXPUuc6

* Petition circulation STARTS: Tuesday, January 23rd. and ENDS: Tuesday,
February 13th Ryan needs 1,000 Republican signatures to get on the ballot.*

*If you have questions about how to do petitions and want to get involved
this will be a great event to come and learn. *

Sincerely,

Andres Weller
Ryan Mackenzie For Congress
Campaign Manager
P: (484) 347-8777

Team, did you see this nonsense? 👇 [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77483723/450544911/1323804525?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.01.21_B1_Smurf_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDMyZjg3ZS04NWI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zhq-0mQv1dZB9efjzuGZ9Jo7ZBySpxEg82S2fRGSeqs=) If being called a smurf is my punishment for asking Congressman James Comer – who's leading the sham inquiry against President Biden – about his LLCs, you can paint me blue any day of the week. The truth is that I was calling Comer out on his hypocrisy. He suggested that President Biden's family members companies’ indicated corruption (ridiculous) but forgot to mention his own._How convenient!_ Banter aside, **this House needs to get to work on the issues that matter!** We ought to be fighting for common sense gun violence prevention laws, lowering the cost of living, helping our allies overseas, and fighting for working-class Floridians. James Comer and his buddies in Congress don't want to do that – instead, they'd rather see me lose my reelection because **I actually want to get sh*t done.** [**I'm counting on you to make a contribution of any amount to show Comer, Trump, and their MAGA allies that we're going to keep FL-23 blue. Banter aside, this House needs to get to work on the issues that matter! We ought to be fighting for common sense gun violence prevention laws, lowering the cost of living, helping our allies overseas, and fighting for working-class Floridians. subject: A wall of Republican money in Pennsylvania

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1763%2E552475%2Edj6NKm)
Peter, I’m going to be up against a wall of Republican money in Pennsylvania.
My opponent is the wealthiest self-funder running for Senate anywhere in the country. He already put $1 million of his personal fortune into the race, and a super PAC supporting his campaign just announced it raised nearly $18 million — that’s an astonishing amount.
On top of that, Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are all in on flipping this seat.
When you’ve got this kind of money coming in against you, you need to build a team of supporters to help you fight back. I know for a fact that folks like you who chip in $5, $10, or $15 will make the difference in this Senate race.
[**Pennsylvania could decide our Senate majority. Can you give $5, $10, or $15 to help our campaign fight back against the millions that are going to come my way?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240121-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240121-1&refcode2=1763_552475_dj6NKm&akid=1763%2E552475%2Edj6NKm)

Fellow Conservative,

**$98 PER PERSON**
**As a former Navy SEAL** , I’m not intimidated by much. I’ve been around the world and fought on battlefields against enemy soldiers in hand-to-hand combat. As an aerial firefighter, **I’ve piloted planes through some of the most intense wildfires imaginable**.

While I’ve had some thrilling experiences, I’ve never feared the challenges that have been put before me - I assess each situation and determine how best to achieve the desired outcome with minimal harm to myself or to my team.

Last June 27th I declared my candidacy to be the next U.S. Senator for Montana - it was the first time in longer than I can remember that my new day job didn’t involve the risk of serious injury or even death. But just because I’m not putting myself in harm’s way at present,**I’m still in the line of fire.**

When I was deciding whether to challenge Jon Tester this spring, I did some digging to find out how much a U.S. Senate campaign costs and what I’d have to raise to be competitive against the last statewide elected Democrat. _**What I discovered shocked me. **_

**_OVER $70 MILLION WAS SPENT IN 2018 - AT THE TIME THE COSTLIEST FEDERAL RACE IN MONTANA’S HISTORY. CAMPAIGNS AND OUTSIDE SUPER PACS SPENT MORE THAN $98 PER PERSON TO INFLUENCE THEIR VOTE._ **

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=01166386bbcb4f9cb01147f2253e25e2&_e=t2Lt4GWtzfnADVdkVgxRLmQ41PHP7oPU72O6RFEUrFz3JPmULGm7vkABuP0euIJQ47UGrA9NMEQwbfAtVdr8upRB4_bbzS_qS_p-BWeycFro1aBw-I44_ZIEZoEuC0QMNqt0DsSBA9nlL42w6OscSkf1yAtHmbkofU5YKGT2XffV8bssn24Dk0IvBVYCpPfQq39mJewOpCzRVzdnYXe2mE9zw4zyzfFxfEZ_mbo9rY5OiSnO4fjPXTbm8haWNKqWclfaMvpoju6he1lZlhK_oHy_73gogo3JGFXL147CKBBNM22xsR5C-M6Fojaj2-ftwPljchKQrvrzJclZnNfbOyhHqjgdy8PGB0NQ_Px-gWtvqNwosENoHAbwv9AMuheI)
Given that my opponent raised more than $15 million last year **the 2018 record won’t stand.**

While I’m not scared of the task ahead of me, **it is daunting to imagine raising the money I’ll need to successfully win this election.** By some estimates that sum will be more than $100 million dollars.

I know we’re not going to raise the money we need all at once - or even in a year’s time. What I do know is that we will raise it. We’re setting goals each day - and **[if we continue to hit them, we’ll eventually get to where we need to be](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=01166386bbcb4f9cb01147f2253e25e2&_e=t2Lt4GWtzfnADVdkVgxRLmQ41PHP7oPU72O6RFEUrFz3JPmULGm7vkABuP0euIJQ47UGrA9NMEQwbfAtVdr8upRB4_bbzS_qS_p-BWeycFro1aBw-I44_ZIEZoEuC0QMNqt0DsSBA9nlL42w6OscSkf1yAtHmbkofU5YKGT2XffV8bssn24Dk0IvBVYCpPfQq39mJewOpCzRVzdnYXe2mE9zw4zyzfFxfEZ_mbo9rY6_yjY7h5VHkc2RvE7Rpe5a_MC3-k6ehXSPrXBIyaW6IDhprIXUBzyJwACI93V_QjGVNWJ4FYvuYAtCnkUQHZpgfv1sH4MDJ1V64mfF55-q7LG0JPs5M3eyVlQ83bz-bLXwbtLNelNQZA45jsoTF8Mo)**.

**[I’m coming to you today to let you know that we’re aiming to raise $999 today](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=01166386bbcb4f9cb01147f2253e25e2&_e=t2Lt4GWtzfnADVdkVgxRLmQ41PHP7oPU72O6RFEUrFz3JPmULGm7vkABuP0euIJQ47UGrA9NMEQwbfAtVdr8upRB4_bbzS_qS_p-BWeycFro1aBw-I44_ZIEZoEuC0QMNqt0DsSBA9nlL42w6OscSkf1yAtHmbkofU5YKGT2XffV8bssn24Dk0IvBVYCpPfQq39mJewOpCzRVzdnYXe2mE9zw4zyzfFxfEZ_mbo9rY7wEZUScFq0MLchqJdk0-Ar6McYLIGuE5_RVH7w231UBosGSb4PEE92ZNC467v5tHeEEDY2nInqXpn-nOBpGfEDFVdd4sP3aToaMnL4e-O-ZtZtoB23Z33ImQR_1tDL6j5kveo_i5yb3cbBCRNWLky8)**.

Divide that by 65 and we just need you and 64 other patriots to **chip in $15** before midnight.

[**HELP ME HIT MY $999 GOAL TODAY ->
**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=01166386bbcb4f9cb01147f2253e25e2&_e=t2Lt4GWtzfnADVdkVgxRLmQ41PHP7oPU72O6RFEUrFz3JPmULGm7vkABuP0euIJQ47UGrA9NMEQwbfAtVdr8upRB4_bbzS_qS_p-BWeycFro1aBw-I44_ZIEZoEuC0QMNqt0DsSBA9nlL42w6OscSkf1yAtHmbkofU5YKGT2XffV8bssn24Dk0IvBVYCpPfQq39mJewOpCzRVzdnYXe2mE9zw4zyzfFxfEZ_mbo9rY7zlMGVw5_G51ZjDcZW4sggeljnt6o52R_olNZCOLXurDoDrgR4XV9MkxKsVIw1M8AEEx0iv3oFzyunmZGX5pnTF5D1Es_xbl8oV707tO1x1bzTKKC0V-fd0x8iUjEQbGfs-BKOwVn1AX7AMW9zbLML)

Tim Sheehy

Republican for U.S. Senate

name: Sam Eppler
subject: our latest survey for you!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Eppler for Congress
