|
Fellow Patriots,

Bob Good's anti-Trump candidate has dropped out of the presidential race. While Ron DeSantis has done great things in Florida and ran a spirited race it has always been clear to me that only President Trump can get America back on track.

Bob's dream of Trump losing is slipping away, and I congratulate President Trump on yet another WIN.

Bob Good has been a Never Trumper since Day 1 and has been going around telling people that Trump isn't pro-life and can't win. [In this video link released by Politico, Bob Good says Trump is "unelectable, not, pro-life, not Pro Gun, and not conservative.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c96h1R1klTrH5YI2k_6V4Fq3TXi9h0OFG51Pu7Gj4H-7uCdD--yYcezrf774-FS6SnM6xZrkMLcjrfh9pa4MDr1nY0FOuMQtdCqv06_3uTc6XQDQdDkYR9CHBTi9pOvXobebnJHPXEI_X38Ou4JwmV8LbuXrkoKZdhN4EGt-99_nOUTJba0f9rtMnr7u2odW&c=SMayoaBiSg7Ogmt1TzvYYBk5zbEAMMh_HwqSbLLnZteOC40vUuT-5w==&ch=7j4cbe3V6sDjQyqiE-tJpZLMz7WLILFU3WB44j50yRaZy5krbvwUAQ==)"

Good is wrong - Trump is pro-life and Trump will save America. Now Bob Good has come groveling back to Trump in order to save his own hide - friends, don't trust him.

Bob will stab Trump in the back AGAIN the first chance he gets. He's going to say he supports Trump for political reasons, but he has proven time and again that he's not real MAGA.

Never Trumper Bob Good is only good for Joe Biden because Bob is an ineffective legislator who has done nothing for our district. Good lacks the leadership ability to unite people and he is not good for the patriots of Virginia's 5th Congressional District.

I call on all Republicans to get behind President Trump and help Trump Save America. Desantis did the right thing by dropping out and I commend him for that. Biden has failed. Trump is the answer. It's that simple.

So let's go win it for Trump.
| America Right News Made this Meme

| I'm running because Trump needs a 100% partner in Congress. The enemy isn't at the gate -- the enemy is THROUGH the gate and in our communities. Open borders, fentanyl, lawlessness, out of control spending, and more. Our country is in big trouble. I am running to represent the people of the 5th Congressional District because I am a conservative with a record of building teams to solve problems. We can do better than Good.
I've been all over the district and I can tell you the 5th Congressional District loves Trump and the America First Agenda!
I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district!

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Democrats ignore initiatives
body:
The 2024 legislative session is underway! And, as we continue highlighting the latest news coming out of Olympia, we hope to keep you up-to-date with an item or two of interest last week from your own backyard. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62714432:sVs4XIiHN:m:1:2610672541:FD386796064F79D5218CE2BBD62C8D77:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends, The 2024 legislative session is underway! And, as we continue highlighting the latest action coming out of Olympia, we hope to keep you up-to-date with an item or two of interest last week from your own backyard. Read on... **This week 's Newsmaker Interview...** Republican State Sen. Perry Dozier (16th LD) joined us for our weekly Newsmaker Interview. Sen. Dozier shared his priorities for the 2024 legislative session, including addressing the cost of living, public safety, and supporting parental rights in education. From his perspective working in the agricultural industry for over 40 years, Sen. Dozier also emphasized the need to address significant challenges facing farmers through the "Cultivate Washington" agenda - and criticized the ongoing failure to exempt farmers from the carbon tax, as promised. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62714433:sVs4XIiHN:m:1:2610672541:FD386796064F79D5218CE2BBD62C8D77:r "https://shiftwa.org/state-sen-perry-dozier-on-the-2024-legislative-session/")**.** **This week 's top story...** Democratic legislators now have three initiatives from the people to ignore, with three more from Let's Go Washington likely on the way. By the week's end the Democrats had voted against holding immediate hearings on the first two proposals certified with enough signatures, I-2113, focused on reinstating sensible police pursuit rules, and I-2117, to repeal the carbon tax. It remains to be seen if the legislators will follow the state constitution and consider the initiatives soon.** **[**Read this story and more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62714434:sVs4XIiHN:m:1:2610672541:FD386796064F79D5218CE2BBD62C8D77:r)**.** **In case you missed it ...** Last weekend, the news of John Kerry planning to step down from his role as President Joe Biden's climate czar generated minimal interest, with many unaware the position existed. However, in Olympia, the announcement spurred political maneuvers by Gov. Inslee's team to propose him for a lucrative, yet seemingly unproductive role in D.C. Meanwhile, Lt. Governor Denny Heck likely started searching for his initial gubernatorial address draft, as he is poised to replace Washington State's environmentally focused governor if he moved on. [**Read this story and more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62714435:sVs4XIiHN:m:1:2610672541:FD386796064F79D5218CE2BBD62C8D77:r)**.** **** | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62714436:sVs4XIiHN:m:1:2610672541:FD386796064F79D5218CE2BBD62C8D77:r)
---
****
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14399541&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osVs4XIiHN).
---

subject: Let me explain

body:
It’s Dems first test for the 2024 cycle.
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60087?t=6&akid=12534%2E878179%2EGxd9Nv) [**I’m about to ask you to donate $10 to re-elect Tom Suozzi. We now have just 23 days to retake NY-03 and restore real representation back to Queens and Nassau Counties after extreme Republicans protected serial fraudster George Santos for months. Can you split a donation between his campaign and VPP right now?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60087?t=7&akid=12534%2E878179%2EGxd9Nv) | [Donate $10 now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60087?t=8&akid=12534%2E878179%2EGxd9Nv)
---
Let me explain why this is urgent:

In 2024, we have the opportunity to restore sanity and order to the People’s House. The special election in New York's Third Congressional District (NY-03) will be on February 13 and **all eyes will be on us.**

Tom puts People Over Politics to get big things done for the people he represents. Tom works with both sides of the aisle to deliver common-sense solutions for Long Island and Queens. That's who he is.

While extreme Republicans bring nothing but crisis, chaos and confusion to Congress, Tom will bring integrity, commitment and experience back to NY-03. It’s imperative that we help Tom win. We can’t do that without your help.

**Our path to victory in 2024 includes retaking New York's Third Congressional District. I know this is the team to help us defeat the odds and bring Tom Suozzi back to Congress.**

[**Will you donate $10 to Tom and the Voter Protection Project today? We can’t let extreme Republicans continue their reckless political stunts.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/60087?t=9&akid=12534%2E878179%2EGxd9Nv)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Tom Suozzi and Voter Protection Project will go through immediately:

Right now, Team Extreme is gearing up to flood the airwaves with attacks. That’s why I’m counting on your support to make sure Tom can fight back and retake NY-03.

Keep the faith,

Hakeem

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. U.S. Rep. Colin Allred joined Republicans to condemn Biden's handling of border
Hi, it’s Roland Gutierrez, the Democrat running to unseat Ted Cruz.
I don’t like criticizing other Democrats – especially ones I respect.
But this week, Colin Allred, my primary opponent in the race to take on Ted Cruz this November, sided with Ted Cruz and Donald Trump in voting with GOP extremists to condemn Joe Biden’s “open-border” policies.
I am an immigration attorney and I represent over 300 miles of the Texas Border. I can’t stay silent.
Allred broke ranks with the rest of our party and joined just 13 other House Democrats in voting with the GOP.
Democrats in Texas deserve a candidate who will speak up and fight for them, not pretend to be Republicans in the hopes they won’t be targeted by Cruz or Trump.
If you want a REAL Democrat representing you in the Senate, I hope you’ll donate to my campaign now. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

subject: On the anniversary of Citizens United…
body:
Fourteen years ago the Supreme Court made one of the worst decisions in its history in Citizens United v. FEC.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77485471/450549366/444630146?refcode=1-21-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjYTc1NmQ5LTg4YjgtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1Xb3OGYOmt4RVY8sJacZbRlGxlIcS2Jz4aydMDMOHZg=)

| | Friend, Fourteen years ago the Supreme Court made one of the worst decisions in its history in _Citizens United v. FEC._ This decision opened the floodgates to allow unlimited and undisclosed dark and corporate money into our elections, and we’ve felt the ramifications of it ever since. We see the implications of _Citizens United_ in the corruption we see on the Supreme Court, in the influx of money into our elections, and in the lack of trust in our government and democracy._Citizens United_ and the following influx of massive campaign spending by corporations, special interest groups, and wealthy individuals changed the way our elections function for the worse. The rich and powerful have an even more outsized influence on our elections than ever. Our democracy favors the select few who write big checks and leaves everyone else behind, all due to the _Citizens United_ decision fourteen years ago. [**We are fighting every single day to overturn the**** _Citizens United_****decision and to create an election system that works for every single American, not the wealthy few. If you’re ready to step up and fight with us, please contribute $10 today so we can keep fighting for free and fair elections.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77485472/450549367/444630146?refcode=1-21-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjYTc1NmQ5LTg4YjgtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1Xb3OGYOmt4RVY8sJacZbRlGxlIcS2Jz4aydMDMOHZg=) We see near-daily news of the corruption plaguing the Supreme Court, and the root of much of it is the detrimental _Citizens United_ decision. Although Leonard Leo and his cronies have been attempting to buy the Court and other politicians for decades, it wasn’t until the _Citizens United_ decision that they were able to use their billions of dollars to fully buy their influence on our elections and the Court. **[Supreme Court corruption, Dark Money spending, and declining trust in our democracy can all be traced back to the 2010 Citizens United decision and we need to work together to combat it. Please chip in $10 right now so we keep working to ensure that our elections are truly free and fair, and not bought by billionaires and huge corporations.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77485473/450549368/444630146?refcode=1-21-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjYTc1NmQ5LTg4YjgtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1Xb3OGYOmt4RVY8sJacZbRlGxlIcS2Jz4aydMDMOHZg=)** Fourteen years ago our election system changed for the worse, and we’re still learning about all of the repercussions of the _Citizens United_ decision. [**But we’re not done fighting to keep our elections working for every single American, not just the rich and powerful. We need every single person to chip in $10 today so we can work together to overturn**** _Citizens United_****and protect our precious democracy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77485474/450549369/444630146?refcode=1-21-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjYTc1NmQ5LTg4YjgtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1Xb3OGYOmt4RVY8sJacZbRlGxlIcS2Jz4aydMDMOHZg=) Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action

subject: I start each day with prayer

body:
| | | Fellow American, I start everyday with a prayer. My strong faith comes from my parents who relied on the power of prayer when they fled Cuba. I pray everyday for my daughters, our country, and for those still suffering under socialism across the world. **Right now, America is in a faith crisis. subject: The GOP’s outrageous defense of gerrymandered maps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek, did you
see Tony's message about MAGA Republicans’ outrageous defense of
gerrymandered maps that take away power from Wisconsin voters?

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2224?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231219_FR_TrumpComments_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_TrumpComments.1.1&t=1001&akid=6580%2E1827488%2EyJJfZV ]Rush a donation here to help Tony fight back and guarantee fair maps in
Wisconsin. Extreme Republicans will stop at nothing to destroy our
democracy and seize power, so any amount helps!

—Begin Forwarded Message–

Derek,

Republican extremists in the legislature are either knowingly lying or are
tragically confused about what a fair election map means.

According to them, the current maps -- which are so biased that even when
Democrats got over 50% of the vote statewide, Republicans nearly achieved
a supermajority — are fair, and new non-partisan maps would be a
"gerrymander."

Here's the bottom line: voters should pick their politicians, not the
other way around.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2224?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231219_FR_TrumpComments_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_TrumpComments.1.1&t=1002&akid=6580%2E1827488%2EyJJfZV ]Derek,
these attacks on fair voting maps are part of a larger Republican strategy
to destroy our democracy here in Wisconsin ahead of the critical 2024
election. Can I count on you to rush a donation to help us fight back?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will process immediately.

MAGA Republicans across America and here in Wisconsin will stop at nothing

clean_body: | Hello, I don’t usually like to bother you on Sunday afternoons, but my team asked me to reach out because our fundraising is not where it needs to be at this point in the month. With two Republican opponents in the race and National Republicans raking in millions to attack vulnerable Democrats like me, we can’t take any deadline for granted. We need to start making up ground now to reach our January fundraising target. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = ** = | = = | = = Thank you in advance for your support. — Nikki = Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com | Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

name: Matthew Lucci
subject: We need your help to win this election
body:
Hi,

Primary season is upon us! As you know, my team and I have been very busy with candidate forums and campaign events that will propel us to victory on March 5th. Just check our [Facebook page](https://www.facebook.com/MatthewLucciTX) to see how hard we've been working in this fight to TAKE OUR COUNTRY BACK from the Establishment.

I would like to invite you to one of our upcoming events that you can find on our website [here](https://www.luccifortexas.com/events).

**We also need folks to go door-to-door to speak with voters and hand out campaign literature in the next few weeks. Are you willing to help get your neighborhood out to vote?** Reply, and I'll get you some campaign literature to canvas your neighborhood.
**
**
We 're also running low on signs! That's a good thing, because we have more people wanting signs than we have signs for them to put out. Are you willing to [**donate $10** ](https://secure.winred.com/lucci-for-congress/donate-today)to cover the cost of a yard sign?

Thank you for your support of this movement to TAKE OUR COUNTRY BACK!

-Matthew Lucci
\--

**\--**
**Matthew Lucci for Congress TX-25**
[Matthew@LucciForTexas](mailto:Matthew@LucciForTexas.com)

(682) 220-9925
**[www.LucciForTexas.com](http://www.luccifortexas.com/)**
****

name: Briana Sewell
subject: my family
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRIANA SEWELL FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77486351/450552645/-1514006159?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzQ0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTQwYzQwNS04ZGI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FNn92r0KM8NsFDZi-9QAE6GmyTFftFbR_sLCwlzvYP0=) I’m running for Congress to be the voice that every Virginia family deserves. And today, I want to tell you about my family, because they’re the ones who inspired me to run for office in the first place. My grandmother was a foot soldier in the Civil Rights Movement. She organized in Selma, Alabama to guarantee our most fundamental rights. My mother joined the Air Force after college and worked so hard to rise to the rank of Lieutenant Colonel. My father also honorably served our nation in the Air Force for over 20 years, and held the rank of Senior Master Sergeant when he retired. **For as long as I can remember, my family instilled in me the importance of integrity and service to others.** That’s why I first ran for the House of Delegates and became one of the youngest women ever elected to state government. But today, so many of the freedoms my family fought for are at risk. And too many in Congress would rather score political points than find solutions to the issues our families and our communities face every day. We need to get Congress working again, and that starts with winning this battleground race in Virginia. If Democrats are going to have a chance of winning back the House, we need to win. [_**I’m running for Congress for all of us who want a better future, but I can’t do it alone. body:
As someone who doesn't take corporate PAC money, the contributions from folks like you are key to my successful campaigns.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77486360/450552656/-1109429436?refcode=BLU_EM_SWC_2024-01-21_Z&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODQwYzQwNS04ZGI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k4RDLuai0v9yxteMxXJB_thGNW8Wvu5U8GaAULvpjrw=)

| Peter, I hate asking for even a dollar of your hard-earned money. **But the reality is that fundraising is the price of admission for the job I love.**

[_**I’ll explain more in a moment, but if you’re short on time, you can click the button below to chip in $10 or whatever makes sense for you today:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77486361/450552657/-1109429436?refcode=BLU_EM_SWC_2024-01-21_Z&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODQwYzQwNS04ZGI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k4RDLuai0v9yxteMxXJB_thGNW8Wvu5U8GaAULvpjrw=)

---
As a member of the House of Representatives, my seat is on the ballot every two years – which means I’m almost constantly running for re-election.

As someone who doesn't take corporate PAC money, the contributions from folks like you are key to my successful campaigns.

**In 2022, my House race was one of the closest in the country, and let me tell you, contributions from folks like you were key to my success.**

Stronger fundraising allows me to spend less time dialing for dollars and more time doing what I came to Washington to do: advocate for Pennsylvania families and workers.

[_**Your $5 or $10 investment today will go a long way in ensuring we have the resources necessary to keep this seat blue and fight off Republican attacks this year:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77486363/450552659/-1109429436?refcode=BLU_EM_SWC_2024-01-21_Z&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODQwYzQwNS04ZGI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k4RDLuai0v9yxteMxXJB_thGNW8Wvu5U8GaAULvpjrw=)

name: Juanjo at United We Dream Action
subject: “The only thing we're not doing is shootingpeople” -Gov. Greg Abbott
body:
The anti-immigrant rhetoric has gone too far. | | | Peter, In an interview on a far-right radio show, Texas Governor Greg Abbott said: “The only thing we're not doing is shooting people who come across the border because the Biden administration would charge us with murder.” Yes, he really said that. Innocent migrants and refugees are seeking safety at our southern border, and Greg Abbott is casually suggesting murdering them. He recently signed a bill allowing border patrol agents to arrest migrants at the border — but now even that indignity is not enough for him. Everyone — regardless of immigration status — should be treated with humanity and respect. Gov. Abbott has proven he’s incapable of that, so it’s time for him to go. **UWDA is leading the charge to demand the impeachment of Governor Abbott and protect our communities from dangerous demagogues. This most recent comment proves he won’t stop until immigrants’ lives are at risk. clean_body: The anti-immigrant rhetoric has gone too far. | | | Peter, In an interview on a far-right radio show, Texas Governor Greg Abbott said: “The only thing we're not doing is shooting people who come across the border because the Biden administration would charge us with murder.” Yes, he really said that. Innocent migrants and refugees are seeking safety at our southern border, and Greg Abbott is casually suggesting murdering them. He recently signed a bill allowing border patrol agents to arrest migrants at the border — but now even that indignity is not enough for him. Everyone — regardless of immigration status — should be treated with humanity and respect. Gov. Abbott has proven he’s incapable of that, so it’s time for him to go. UWDA is leading the charge to demand the impeachment of Governor Abbott and protect our communities from dangerous demagogues. This most recent comment proves he won’t stop until immigrants’ lives are at risk. Will you chip in $10 now to fuel our fight to protect our communities? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | We need Texas leaders to hold Governor Greg Abbott accountable for his cruel actions toward Texans and immigrants. Otherwise, Governor Abbott will continue using his political power to sow lies, divide communities, and inflict hate and violence upon immigrants and communities of color. body:

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c681037%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OkGOqCLjgaY%2fUc9gGZfVtQ&sysid=1 Harvard Details Handling Of Claudine Gay Plagiarism Controversy In New Congressional Report

Harvard University detailed its handling of the controversy surrounding former President Claudine Gay’s alleged plagiarism in a new report submitted to Congress on Friday. Harvard’s report, which was submitted to the House Committee on Education and the Workforce, details how a university subcommittee appointed an independent panel of “three of the country’s most prominent political scientists” that found “virtually no evidence of intentional claiming

| Peter,

Do you have 30 seconds? I promise I’ll keep this short.

Already, thousands of Virginians have made clear that they support our message: protecting our rights, lowering costs, supporting our schools, and keeping our communities safe.

We know that a government can and should work to create opportunity, advance progress, and ensure the health and prosperity of its people.

I know that this moment is only the beginning. We have a long road ahead to victory, but we will do it together.

body:
Folks, tomorrow is the 51st anniversary of the landmark Supreme Court decision in Roe v. Wade. And while we should be out celebrating this important and progressive victory for women, instead we need to fight tooth and nail to win back the House majority to codify the protections that Roe v. Wade offered.

name: Rush for Congress
subject: Finally candidate that you can support
body:
Jeff Van Drew's Party Flip: A Defection We Can't Ignore

| | | [ ](https://rush.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=e968aee815e99eb2794c5f162255fab5&utm_source=rush&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tbdvandrew&n=1)
---
Dear Friend I hope this message finds you aware and engaged in the critical decisions shaping the future of New Jersey's 2nd Congressional District. Today, I want to draw your attention to a significant aspect of our current representation that demands scrutiny.____**Jeff Van Drew's Party Flip: A Defection We Can't Ignore** ____ Incumbent Jeff Van Drew's decision to switch party allegiance from Democrat to Republican is a pivotal moment that raises questions about his commitment to the values of NJ-2.____**Party Loyalty:** Van Drew's sudden shift leaves us questioning the authenticity of his party loyalty. Can we trust a representative whose allegiance appears to be more about political convenience than genuine belief in our community's values?____**Abandonment of Principles:** The flip suggests a departure from the principles he once claimed to champion. What does this say about the consistency and steadfastness of his representation?____**Disconnect from Constituents:** The move creates a disconnect from the Democratic voters who initially supported him. How can we rely on a representative who seemingly abandons the party that entrusted him with their votes?____**Why Carolyn Rush?**____ Carolyn Rush, in contrast, remains committed to the values that resonate with the diverse voices of NJ-CD2\. Her dedication to principles over political expediency is a testament to the kind of representation our district truly needs.____**Your Support for True Values:**____ By supporting Carolyn Rush, you are standing against political opportunism and advocating for a representative whose values align with the diverse needs of NJ-CD2\. Your contribution will fuel our campaign to restore genuine representation.____**Act Now for Consistent Leadership:[Contribution Link](https://rush.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=e968aee815e99eb2794c5f162255fab5&utm_source=rush&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tbdvandrew&n=2)** __ Let's reject the inconsistency of party flips and demand a representative who stays true to the values of NJ-CD2\. Your support will amplify our message and propel us towards a future where our district's principles are upheld.____ Thank you for considering Carolyn Rush as the antidote to party flip politics in our representation. Carolyn Rush
---
| [](https://rush.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=e968aee815e99eb2794c5f162255fab5&utm_source=rush&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tbdvandrew&n=3 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://rush.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=e968aee815e99eb2794c5f162255fab5&utm_source=rush&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tbdvandrew&n=3)

I will be updating you on how my campaign progresses. Thank you for all your support. If you haven't donated, please feel free to help my campaign. Lana | |

We must finally take a stand for a secure border!

| | | I've never been the type to hold my tongue so I won't start now:

**We must finally take a stand for a secure border!**

Millions of illegal criminals have invaded our country.

➔ They've killed our communities with fentanyl.
➔ They've taken over our hospitals, our schools, and our cities.
➔ And they've stolen YOUR tax dollars.

President Biden hasn't simply failed on the border.

He's INTENTIONALLY letting these criminals in and we all know why:

By bribing illegal aliens with unlawful citizenship & free healthcare, he thinks he can pick up millions of new voters and solidify the Left's power forever.

__**He 's willing to let our country burn to the ground to maintain his corrupt control.**__

And if we don't act NOW, that's exactly what will happen. | | [SECURE THE BORDER NOW!](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f6e04e536b534d09aa309efe3fc38ebc&_e=Pu-MlUMlOdOkP974fJbH7R8JAVxAYH3HDYt2b0DWJ3neOiVqUlltvTg31AGLv_UImMbasCHlycz9x1mkw6Zp4SZ3whKbOxEiyoiPaOBlgp6Yri0UHlSiZQXl5X7ChqxYWIm__L3FtH-DAbXOG16Tp4MKpVTcqvFYsPBJEK7ZfLB6maAmTZYvcmns15Xd_NmyG4oUeFySRp2rHxVBvsA4d2yxYT84KcROAwz0yFvrnfB-qsjTFyvERPmcbBGkQPzJ01ppnLIa39gOq3-bvT6VIZP801TUrwwm8y1UB8ax_BRTvrIRDmU07eF_C-0Wl0m1P4p8bf2LhaP2hLu7TBAdZEuSU1dR0B6_7pGykUKSvISNnYVkyteMFvbWlX_fNM_GDCETKQoz7iRqlNNuw_X4SspQhs75pDLieHuWy8rCuJ0%3D)
---

_This is Rep. Eli Crane - former Navy SEAL & America First Conservative._

I didn't serve alongside my brothers-in-arms overseas just so Biden could hand America over to criminals who illegally entered our country.

But we're moments away from that becoming a reality & I'm pleading for your help.

**We must secure the border IMMEDIATELY. But to pull this off, I need every freedom-loving patriot to join me.**

name: Maxwell Frost
subject: for my loved ones, and yours, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/8xfUIGwlfn-W13dGGDIJTA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnj_nNP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDEyMV9lbV9mcl9iMV9maWdodGluZ2Zvcl9lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MzEmY2RtYz0yYkJmYUVRcktzeWlRamZQUzhENEZCZkVFbEUmcmVmY29kZTI9MmJCZmFFUXJLc3lpUWpmUFM4RDRGQmZFRWxFJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJiQmZhRVFyS3N5aVFqZlBTOEQ0RkJmRUVsRVcDc3BjQgplos10rWUC_3YlUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)
---
[I’m about to ask for your help raising $3,917 before my End of Week deadline at midnight.](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/nY3QyXQlYOwFkUrPcEnDXw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnj_nNP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDEyMV9lbV9mcl9iMV9maWdodGluZ2Zvcl9lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yYkJmYUVRcktzeWlRamZQUzhENEZCZkVFbEUmcmVmY29kZTI9MmJCZmFFUXJLc3lpUWpmUFM4RDRGQmZFRWxFJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJiQmZhRVFyS3N5aVFqZlBTOEQ0RkJmRUVsRVcDc3BjQgplos10rWUC_3YlUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) But first, it is important you understand why I ran to serve one of the most diverse districts in the country, where there’s been a serious lack of investment and most people can’t afford an unexpected $300 expense. I’m fighting for the people of this country who politicians have failed time and time again. People who deserve better. **People like my mom and abuela.** My mother and grandmother came here from Cuba during the freedom flights in the late 1960s. What my family had to go through just to eat and have a roof over their heads, is a testament to the resilience and drive of immigrants. But it is also an incredibly sad story. What would it have been like if our country was committed to equity when moving here? If money wasn’t an issue? If she had not been exploited by Miami factories that had her working 70+ hours a week for almost nothing. Where would our people be? **People like my biological mother.** A victim of the system and enmeshed in trying circumstances, she turned to drugs and crime while pregnant with me. She had no access to healthcare and wasn’t able to see a doctor once during her pregnancy. In the wealthiest country in the world, she was neglected by society and left without anyone to turn to. As the mother of seven, she made the difficult decision to put me up for adoption because she lacked the resources to care for and raise another child. **People like my barber.** He was deprived of his right to vote due to a 20 year old felony. He committed a crime of desperation, served his debt to society, and became a successful businessman. Yet he still couldn’t participate in our democracy. I’m so very proud that while working at the ACLU, I organized the movement that restored voting rights to 1.6 million Floridians with previous felonies. But there is so much work to be done. **People like Josh.** A houseless man I met when I was pumping gas during my campaign. One of my campaign buttons rolled out the door when I was getting out of the car. He picked it up and asked “who is Maxwell Alejandro Frost?” I told him it was me and we got to talking about what I hoped to do if I was elected. He couldn’t conceive of the possibility of Medicare for All and healthcare as a human right, because he hadn’t been to the doctor in years. He asked me _“what do I have to do to deserve healthcare?”_ **This system that makes life more difficult for the most vulnerable among us is no accident, Peter. It is by design. And the people who want to keep it that way will spend countless sums of dark money to stop any chance of progress we have.** [I came to Congress so I could fight for my loved ones and yours, but I'll only stay here with the support of grassroots donors like you. Thank you for reading, now let’s keep fighting, together:](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/nY3QyXQlYOwFkUrPcEnDXw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnj_nNP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDEyMV9lbV9mcl9iMV9maWdodGluZ2Zvcl9lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yYkJmYUVRcktzeWlRamZQUzhENEZCZkVFbEUmcmVmY29kZTI9MmJCZmFFUXJLc3lpUWpmUFM4RDRGQmZFRWxFJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJiQmZhRVFyS3N5aVFqZlBTOEQ0RkJmRUVsRVcDc3BjQgplos10rWUC_3YlUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) | | | [Donate $10](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/MSwc8atXuNcr6XcYv6Cs4g~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnj_nNP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDEyMV9lbV9mcl9iMV9maWdodGluZ2Zvcl9lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MTAmY2RtYz0yYkJmYUVRcktzeWlRamZQUzhENEZCZkVFbEUmcmVmY29kZTI9MmJCZmFFUXJLc3lpUWpmUFM4RDRGQmZFRWxFJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJiQmZhRVFyS3N5aVFqZlBTOEQ0RkJmRUVsRVcDc3BjQgplos10rWUC_3YlUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)

clean_body: | ~~ ~~ But first, it is important you understand why I ran to serve one of the most diverse districts in the country, where there’s been a serious lack of investment and most people can’t afford an unexpected $300 expense. I’m fighting for the people of this country who politicians have failed time and time again. People who deserve better. People like my mom and abuela. My mother and grandmother came here from Cuba during the freedom flights in the late 1960s. What my family had to go through just to eat and have a roof over their heads, is a testament to the resilience and drive of immigrants. But it is also an incredibly sad story. What would it have been like if our country was committed to equity when moving here? If money wasn’t an issue? If she had not been exploited by Miami factories that had her working 70+ hours a week for almost nothing. Where would our people be? People like my biological mother. A victim of the system and enmeshed in trying circumstances, she turned to drugs and crime while pregnant with me. She had no access to healthcare and wasn’t able to see a doctor once during her pregnancy. In the wealthiest country in the world, she was neglected by society and left without anyone to turn to. As the mother of seven, she made the difficult decision to put me up for adoption because she lacked the resources to care for and raise another child. People like my barber. He was deprived of his right to vote due to a 20 year old felony. He committed a crime of desperation, served his debt to society, and became a successful businessman. Yet he still couldn’t participate in our democracy. I’m so very proud that while working at the ACLU, I organized the movement that restored voting rights to 1.6 million Floridians with previous felonies. But there is so much work to be done. People like Josh. A houseless man I met when I was pumping gas during my campaign. One of my campaign buttons rolled out the door when I was getting out of the car. He picked it up and asked “who is Maxwell Alejandro Frost?” I told him it was me and we got to talking about what I hoped to do if I was elected. He couldn’t conceive of the possibility of Medicare for All and healthcare as a human right, because he hadn’t been to the doctor in years. He asked me “what do I have to do to deserve healthcare?” This system that makes life more difficult for the most vulnerable among us is no accident, Peter. It is by design. And the people who want to keep it that way will spend countless sums of dark money to stop any chance of progress we have. ~~ | | | ~~ ~~ | ~~ ~ | ~ ~ Thank you so much for your support, Maxwell Frost ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. He isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to keep this seat for poor and working-class people. Friend,
Ohio is a purple state—nowhere near as red or as conservative as the media likes to portray. We proved that when we _overwhelmingly_ voted to protect women’s reproductive healthcare rights.
But Ohio is also home to some of the worst MAGA extremists in the country—chief among them, Jim Jordan.
Having Jim Jordan in Congress has been a total disaster for America. He consistently embarrasses us, votes against what the people want and need, and he has somehow been allowed to skate by with almost no accountability. **
****And now Jordan is meddling in Ohio’s must-win Senate race:** Jordan has endorsed GOP radical Bernie Moreno, who is running against our own Senator Sherrod Brown. **
****Ever since he failed to become Speaker of the House, Jordan has been working overtime to elect candidates who will push his extremist agenda on all Americans.**
****That’s why I am urgently asking for 500 of our BEST supporters to endorse this campaign, so I can keep winning over the voters we need to STOP Republican extremists and defeat their cherished leader: Jim Jordan.
Sherrod and I both are in the fight of our lives to help protect the America we all know and love. **[

As we gear up for Liz's Birthday Celebration and Official Campaign Launch, it's time to honor her years of commitment to our
community.

> Hey Peter,
>
>
> As we gear up for Liz's Birthday Celebration and Official Campaign Launch, it's time to honor her years of commitment to our
> community. Liz has always believed that strong communities are the backbone of our society. From supporting local businesses to
> advocating for quality education, healthcare, the rights of women and humanity. Liz’s efforts have in some way touched every
> corner of our district.
>
>
> This Milestone for Change birthday and official campaign launch is much more than a gathering; it's a movement. A movement
> towards a brighter, more inclusive future for the 12th District of Georgia. It's about taking Liz’s collective vision of
> Building Thriving Communities and turning it into a reality.

clean_body: As we gear up for Liz's Birthday Celebration and Official Campaign Launch, it's time to honor her years of commitment to our community. [] Hey Peter, As we gear up for Liz's Birthday Celebration and Official Campaign Launch, it's time to honor her years of commitment to our community. Liz has always believed that strong communities are the backbone of our society. From supporting local businesses to advocating for quality education, healthcare, the rights of women and humanity. Liz’s efforts have in some way touched every corner of our district. This Milestone for Change birthday and official campaign launch is much more than a gathering; it's a movement. A movement towards a brighter, more inclusive future for the 12th District of Georgia. It's about taking Liz’s collective vision of Building Thriving Communities and turning it into a reality. Join the Movement. Donate Now! [ ] Your support is crucial. Every donation fuels our campaign and brings us closer to a future where our community's needs are met and every voice is heard. Warm regards, Team Liz Johnson For Us 2024 Watch the Video for Highlights of Liz's Journey [] YOUR VOICE, YOUR SUPPORT, AND OUR FUTURES MATTER! THANK YOU IN ADVANCE FOR YOUR EARLY SUPPORT! [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [ ] Liz Johnson for Us 2024 P.O. BOX 1404 Statesboro, GA 30459 United States Want to change how you receive these emails? You can update your preferences [] or unsubscribe from this list []. [] []

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77489987/450564046/2105508926?refcode=ea.155f1b98-98b8-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.155f1b98-98b8-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1NWYxYjk4LTk4YjgtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5wNq3S4kyQJktuUGD2yzlQ1qiTWcILad9DunU36nekY=)

| The fossil fuel industry spends millions so politicians look the other way, but we can’t ignore the catastrophic damage to our planet.

Here are some fast facts about fossil fuel giants:

1️⃣ **The fossil fuel industry contributes to 75% of the total global greenhouse emissions and 90% of the total global carbon dioxide emissions, directly contributing to rising global temperatures and extreme weather events.**

2️⃣ **Millions of people in vulnerable communities near fossil fuel operations are experiencing heightened rates of respiratory diseases, a consequence of the polluted air in these areas.**

3️⃣ **Oil and gas companies give more than two-thirds of their political donations to Republicans.**

The fossil fuel industry’s damaging influence is undeniable, but so is the power of informed and engaged climate champions. As part of the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, your support and voice are critical in this pivotal election. **Every ounce of support fuels our mission to elect bold leaders at every level of government in 2024 and beyond.**

**_[It's time to take a stand. Join us in pushing back against the overwhelming influence of the greedy fossil fuel industry with a donation of any amount today. Together, we can make a difference for our planet.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77489988/450564074/2105508926?refcode=ea.155f1b98-98b8-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.155f1b98-98b8-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1NWYxYjk4LTk4YjgtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5wNq3S4kyQJktuUGD2yzlQ1qiTWcILad9DunU36nekY=)_**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: A break in between prep sessions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5106%2E5257348%2E7fUJNR ]Adam Schiff for Senate

I have 15 minutes of free time before my next debate prep,
Derek. It may
not sound like much — but I’ve been working long hours in Congress to
avoid a government shutdown, and any gap in my schedule is rare.

So, as I’m checking in with my wife, Eve, and catching up on some emails,
I’m reflecting on this campaign — the most competitive California has seen
in three decades — and I’ve decided I need to tell you a bit more about my
decision to run for U.S. Senate.

Throughout my time as an assistant U.S. attorney, California state
Senator, and member of Congress, I’ve always tried to do the most good for
the most people. There is a tenet I’ve carried with me that is central to
my Jewish faith — “Tikkun Olam.” Repairing the world.

Lately, there’s been a lot that has broken, and a lot to fix. It’s been my
cause. It’s why I get up in the morning.

When Speaker Nancy Pelosi tasked me with investigating and impeaching
Donald Trump. When she asked me to help investigate the Capitol
insurrection on the January 6 Committee. I’ve carried that with me.

I’ve carried it with me on this campaign, too. People struggling to afford
the cost of living and or sending their kids to daycare or college. People
struggling to afford their medications. People worrying about what our
climate will look like ten, twenty years from now as we are routinely
ravaged by drought, mudslides, and wildfires today.

Yes, there is a lot that is broken. And there’s a lot to fix.

But there’s also a lot of good in the world, too. The people I’ve met on
the campaign trail remind me why this work is so important. And the people
like you supporting this campaign a couple bucks at a time, so we can do
good work.

That’s why I’m running. And now, our primary race is within the margin of
error just about 24 hours from our first televised debate.

It’s critical that we win this race. We need to abolish the filibuster.
Expand the Supreme Court. Overturn Citizens United. And protect
reproductive freedom.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240121_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1004&akid=5106%2E5257348%2E7fUJNR ]My 15 minutes are almost up,
Derek: I
don’t take corporate PAC money, so if you believe in this campaign and
want to help me join our Democratic Senate majority and take the fight to
Republicans, will you chip in
$10 to my
campaign today?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240121_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1005&akid=5106%2E5257348%2E7fUJNR ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240121_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=1006&akid=5106%2E5257348%2E7fUJNR ]EXPRESS DONATE
$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240121_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1007&akid=5106%2E5257348%2E7fUJNR ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240121_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1008&akid=5106%2E5257348%2E7fUJNR ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240121_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=1009&akid=5106%2E5257348%2E7fUJNR ]EXPRESS DONATE
$250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240121_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=5106%2E5257348%2E7fUJNR ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you,

Adam

name: =?utf-8?q?Stop_Funding_Netanyahu=E2=80=99s_War_via_Our_Revolution?=
subject: Add your name: Stand with Bernie against $10 billion to Israel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, Bernie
forced the vote, but the Senate voted down his resolution that could’ve
ended U.S. funding for Israel’s war in Gaza last week.

The measure would’ve forced the U.S. government to first investigate
Israeli human rights abuses — but even that went too far for the
AIPAC-funded bipartisan majority in the Senate.

This is not the end of this fight. Congress is still working to pass a
supplemental funding bill that includes $10 billion of unconditional
military aid for the right-wing Netanyahu government to continue its
brutal war against the Palestinian people. Bernie has said, unequivocally,
that it’s time to end all funding for Netanyahu’s illegal, immoral,
brutal, and grossly disproportionate war in Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13585?source=email-20240121&t=1011&akid=5220%2E5885482%2ErL24ox ]Stand with Bernie: Urge Congress to oppose U.S. funding for Netanyahu’s
war in Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13585?source=email-20240121&t=1012&akid=5220%2E5885482%2ErL24ox ]ADD YOUR NAME

Bernie’s efforts to force a vote on Israeli human rights abuses was
unprecedented. And it was courageous, urgent, and necessary as Israel’s
war in Gaza has killed over 24,000 Palestinians.

Bernie did not mince words when he recently said on the Senate floor,
“Much of the destruction that has taken place in Gaza has been done with
U.S. weapons.”

We must all continue the calls to stop U.S. funding and support for
Netanyahu’s atrocities against the Palestinian people. Yet, Congressional
leaders met late last week about sending billions more in unconditional
aid to Israel. It’s unconscionable.

Our champions for peace, like Bernie, Barbara Lee, and Rashida Tlaib, have
been gaining momentum and allies throughout their calls for a ceasefire.
Now, we must ensure there’s a coalition in Congress ready to say NO to
more war funding for Israel.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13585?source=email-20240121&t=1013&akid=5220%2E5885482%2ErL24ox ]Will you add your name to stand with Bernie and urge Congress to oppose
all funding for Israel’s brutal war in Gaza?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Rashida Tlaib via Justice Democrats
subject: Add Your Name: Pushing Palestinians out of their homeland is ethnic cleansing.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In a clear example of ethnic cleansing, top Israeli officials are openly
calling to push millions of Palestinians out of Gaza—and advocating for
replacing them with Israeli settlers.

Many Israeli politicians have demanded a “second Nakba,” referring to the
catastrophe of 1948, when Zionist militias violently expelled 750,000
Palestinians from their lands, destroyed hundreds of Palestinian villages,
and massacred about 15,000 Palestinians.

A member of Prime Minister Netanyahu’s cabinet said: “We are now rolling
out the Gaza Nakba.”

Some survivors of 1948’s Nakba fled to Gaza. Along with Palestinians in
exile outside of Palestine, they were denied the right to return home. Now
they and their descendants have become refugees once more, forced to flee
multiple locations in just three months.

Dropping tens of thousands of U.S. bombs on the tiny Gaza Strip, the
Israeli military has already forcibly displaced 2 million Palestinians—90%
of Gaza’s population.

[ https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-now-to-president-biden-stop-the-ethnic-cleansing-of-palestinians-dont-allow-israels-government-to-force-the-palestinian-people-out-of-their-historic-homeland/?source=group-justice-democrats&referrer=group-justice-democrats&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-20240121?refcode=em20240121&akid=32905%2E1203867%2EcSos_P ]Sign the petition to the Biden administration: End this campaign of
ethnic cleansing now. No more forced displacement of Palestinians, and no
forced migration out of Palestine!

[ https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-now-to-president-biden-stop-the-ethnic-cleansing-of-palestinians-dont-allow-israels-government-to-force-the-palestinian-people-out-of-their-historic-homeland/?source=group-justice-democrats&referrer=group-justice-democrats&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-20240121?refcode=em20240121&akid=32905%2E1203867%2EcSos_P ]SIGN THE PETITION

Razing entire neighborhoods to the ground and destroying a majority of
buildings, Israel’s government has rapidly made much of Gaza
uninhabitable.

Meanwhile, the Israeli military continues to bomb areas it designated as
“safe” for Palestinian civilians.

Along with this brutal destruction, Israel’s government is depriving
Palestinians in Gaza of food, water, shelter, medical assistance, and
other basic needs.

What’s happening now is ethnic cleansing, which is a war crime.

But many Israeli politicians want to go even further, openly calling to
permanently expel all Palestinians from Gaza.

Prime Minister Netanyahu’s Intelligence Minister has openly recommended
the transfer of all Palestinians in Gaza to Egypt. Other senior officials
in Netanyahu’s cabinet have made it clear that forced expulsion and
resettlement is their goal.

Netanyahu has been trying to push countries to take displaced
Palestinians, calling his plan “voluntary migration.” Of course, there’s
nothing “voluntary” about bombing people to make them flee.

Biden and leaders in his administration say they reject forced
displacement of Palestinians.

But their actions show otherwise: They are continuing to arm and fund
Israel’s military as it commits these war crimes, while shielding Israel’s
government from accountability.

[ https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-now-to-president-biden-stop-the-ethnic-cleansing-of-palestinians-dont-allow-israels-government-to-force-the-palestinian-people-out-of-their-historic-homeland/?source=group-justice-democrats&referrer=group-justice-democrats&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-20240121?refcode=em20240121&akid=32905%2E1203867%2EcSos_P ]Sign to Biden and leaders in his administration: Don't let Israel’s
government expel Palestinians from their ancestral homeland or move
Israeli settlers into Gaza. Stop supporting ethnic cleansing and war
crimes!

[ https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-now-to-president-biden-stop-the-ethnic-cleansing-of-palestinians-dont-allow-israels-government-to-force-the-palestinian-people-out-of-their-historic-homeland/?source=group-justice-democrats&referrer=group-justice-democrats&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-20240121?refcode=em20240121&akid=32905%2E1203867%2EcSos_P ]SIGN NOW

We cannot allow our government to continue enabling the bombing or the
blockade on Gaza, which has already killed at least 24,000 Palestinians.
That’s more than 1 in every 100 people in Gaza!

Thank you for speaking up against our government’s complicity in
oppression. May we continue building a better world together.

In solidarity,

Rep. Rashida Tlaib

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240121-32905-footer&t=1001&refcode2=32905_1203867_cSos_P&akid=32905%2E1203867%2EcSos_P

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=32905%2E1203867%2EcSos_P

1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603

Prime Minister Netanyahu’s Intelligence Minister has openly recommended the transfer of all Palestinians in Gaza to Egypt. Other senior officials in Netanyahu’s cabinet have made it clear that forced expulsion and resettlement is their goal. Netanyahu has been trying to push countries to take displaced Palestinians, calling his plan “voluntary migration.” Of course, there’s nothing “voluntary” about bombing people to make them flee. Biden and leaders in his administration say they reject forced displacement of Palestinians. But their actions show otherwise: They are continuing to arm and fund Israel’s military as it commits these war crimes, while shielding Israel’s government from accountability. [ ]Sign to Biden and leaders in his administration: Don't let Israel’s government expel Palestinians from their ancestral homeland or move Israeli settlers into Gaza. Stop supporting ethnic cleansing and war crimes! [ ]SIGN NOW We cannot allow our government to continue enabling the bombing or the blockade on Gaza, which has already killed at least 24,000 Palestinians. That’s more than 1 in every 100 people in Gaza! Thank you for speaking up against our government’s complicity in oppression. May we continue building a better world together. In solidarity, Rep. Rashida Tlaib Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: My true self
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| From an early age, I knew I wanted to pursue a career in public service.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1883%2E35263%2E0Gu7O3)
Peter — Thanks to the support of this incredible grassroots team, in 2012, I became the first openly gay Senator elected in our nation's history. I’ll tell you more about how I got here in just a moment, but first I have to ask: **[Will you help me continue to break barriers and make a difference in peoples’ lives by pitching in toward my reelection campaign today? We have a competitive race ahead of us, and I would love to count on your support.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jan24.HgOSTk&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240121_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1883%2E35263%2E0Gu7O3)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-jan24.EnWOzU&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240121_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1883%2E35263%2E0Gu7O3)

---
[CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-jan24.Xzmx7O&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240121_AM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=1883%2E35263%2E0Gu7O3)
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-jan24.jNYT5F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240121_AM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=1883%2E35263%2E0Gu7O3)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jan24.HgOSTk&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240121_AM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=1883%2E35263%2E0Gu7O3)
---
From an early age, I knew I wanted to pursue a career in public service. But I feared that living my authentic life openly might prevent me from exploring the field of my dreams.
[](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jan24.HgOSTk&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240121_AM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=1883%2E35263%2E0Gu7O3)
When I saw how courageous others in the LGBTQ+ community were about coming out, living their truth, and being public about who they are and who they love, I knew I could do the same. I could run for office and still be true to myself.
So, that’s what I did. Then, I eventually became the first openly gay Senator in our nation’s history.
**But I didn’t run for office to make history — I ran to make a difference.** So each day, I show up ready to work hard and make a lasting impact on people’s lives — and we’ve made a lot of progress over the years, from expanding affordable health care and lowering the cost of prescription drugs, to protecting same-sex marriage with my _Respect for Marriage Act._
The progress we’ve made is on the line as far-right Republicans roll out an extreme, out-of-touch agenda and plot a Senate majority takeover by defeating vulnerable incumbents like me. That’s why I need your support today.
**[Will you pitch in any amount today to help me stay in the fight and keep making a difference?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jan24.HgOSTk&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240121_AM1_V1_S1&t=12&akid=1883%2E35263%2E0Gu7O3)**
Thank you for standing with me.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=1883%2E35263%2E0Gu7O3) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=1883%2E35263%2E0Gu7O3)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ukropina=20=28iPhone=29?=
subject: I'll be quick
body:
Don't have time. |
---
| | Peter, this is America First Republican Max Ukropina. I'm on the road today so I'll be quick.

Politicians _from both parties _have been lying to us for a long time.

That includes our own Republicans who say one thing to us during Election Season but become complacent while in Washington.

If these politicians are as alarmed as you and I are by our wide open border or skyrocketing debt crisis, they sure don't act like it! _Where's their sense of urgency?_

Here's the truth: _**Republicans who are _complacent_ are _complicit_ in the problem.**_

I'm 36 years old. I'm starting a family. _**I'm sorry, but I don't have time to be complacent.**_

I'm running for Congress not just to fight for the America First agenda, secure our border, and end our wild debt spending spree ... but because I believe Republicans need to be bold in _everything _they do and _act like every year is their last year in office._
[**That's why I'm asking you to ENDORSE my campaign for Congress in California's 47th District and be part of our movement to bring real urgent leadership to Washington.**](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=73900f1176&e=86e91e802d)
I can't promise you I'll win every fight. But here's what I do know: we can't win if we don't try.
Sincerely,

Max Ukropina

name: Harry Dunn
subject: Is this America?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77490746/450566453/1441636268?refcode=em-1.21.24-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDVkNjYwOS1hMGI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8FB2aOluUlApDAxZhkMAOhrUIYzYHrI5ivEJmeh-2z4=) Hey there, Harry Dunn here. This is a tough email to start – how do you talk about one of the darkest days of your life? Not to mention, an irreparable stain on this country's history. So I guess I'll start with a question. Is this America? Is attacking Capitol police officers – honest, good people dedicated to protecting and serving democracy – with baseball bats and spears, spraying them with WD-40, calling them hateful slurs – is that America? Is a President of the United States emboldening a riot on the Capitol, encouraging people threatening to kill former Speaker Nancy Pelosi, former Vice President Mike Pence, who traveled to Washington ready to act on those threats – is that America? That's not America to me. I believe in an America that protects its people, regardless of their political beliefs. An America that values democracy and those that are chosen to represent it. That's what I believed in while I served as a Capitol police officer during the January 6 insurrection. **[If that's the America you believe in, I'm hoping you'll chip in a split donation of $10 or more to DASS and my campaign for US Congress. I protected this democracy as a Capitol police officer on January 6th and I'm ready to protect it as the next Congressman from MD-03. Please, rush a donation to become a Founding Donor of this campaign:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77490747/450566454/1441636268?refcode=em-1.21.24-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDVkNjYwOS1hMGI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8FB2aOluUlApDAxZhkMAOhrUIYzYHrI5ivEJmeh-2z4=)**

clean_body: | = Hey there, Harry Dunn here. This is a tough email to start – how do you talk about one of the darkest days of your life? Not to mention, an irreparable stain on this country's history. So I guess I'll start with a question. Is this America? Is attacking Capitol police officers – honest, good people dedicated to protecting and serving democracy – with baseball bats and spears, spraying them with WD-40, calling them hateful slurs – is that America? Is a President of the United States emboldening a riot on the Capitol, encouraging people threatening to kill former Speaker Nancy Pelosi, former Vice President Mike Pence, who traveled to Washington ready to act on those threats – is that America? That's not America to me. I believe in an America that protects its people, regardless of their political beliefs. An America that values democracy and those that are chosen to represent it. That's what I believed in while I served as a Capitol police officer during the January 6 insurrection. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Together, Harry | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters._ Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . ---|---
Peter,

Last year, a Trump-appointed federal judge ordered the FDA to reverse its approval of mifepristone, a safe and essential abortion medication. Though the initial lawsuit was filed by an anti-choice extremist group in Texas, it threatened abortion access in _all 50 states_.

A couple weeks later, the Supreme Court issued a stay that has preserved access to mifepristone until it reaches a formal decision. **Now, the conservative-packed Court is scheduled to hear oral arguments soon and issue a decision on mifepristone's FDA status in the summer of 2024 — exactly two years after they issued their decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade._**

This is _exactly_ what Republicans were hoping would happen when they packed the Supreme Court with justices who would further a dangerous anti-choice agenda. Millions of Americans' fundamental rights depend on the whims of a Court they did not elect and do not trust.

****We're running a live poll to find out what this community thinks about the Court, and we want to hear from you, Peter. Make your voice heard by taking our short survey now:****
****Do you support access to medication abortion (mifepristone)?****

Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.

clean_body: | | | | Open to find out who... | Fellow Patriot, Yesterday, I made my endorsement for President. Use the password “PRESIDENT ” to unlock my endorsement: | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- | Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life. Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home. | | FOLLOW KAT ONLINE | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Donate by Mail Kat For Congress 5200 NW 43rd Street SUITE 102-180 Gainesville, FL, 32606 | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Kat Cammack 5200 NW 43rd st, suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 = \- =

Every contribution is a statement. A statement that you believe in Joe and Kamala’s vision for America. That campaigns should be powered by grassroots folks -- not big corporations. name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: We won’t take up too much of your time...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
But we need to ask you this today
#

Hi there, we don’t want to take up too much of your time on a weekend, but we need to ask:
[**Will you make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today, of $3 or any amount that makes sense for you?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan24.i9S2EM&refcode=em240121-1-30&t=1&akid=7448%2E3935704%2EcZHItW)
**[DONATE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan24.i9S2EM&refcode=em240121-1-30&t=2&akid=7448%2E3935704%2EcZHItW)**
When it comes to our movement to end gun violence, we believe in hope over fear.
The hope of a future where our children can feel safe at school.
The hope of a future where we can go about freely without the threat of gunfire in our public spaces.
The hope of a future where nobody in America—no matter where they live, what they look like, or who they love—has to live with the fear of being a victim of gun violence.
But change doesn’t happen overnight. We’ve worked tirelessly the past eleven years to change hearts, minds, and laws in our movement for gun safety. Now as we enter a new decade of GIFFORDS, we must keep up our momentum.
[**So please, if you can, make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today. Your support goes directly towards our lifesaving work.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan24.i9S2EM&refcode=em240121-1-30&t=3&akid=7448%2E3935704%2EcZHItW)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jan24.FODcFH&amount=3&refcode=em240121-1-30&t=4&akid=7448%2E3935704%2EcZHItW)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jan24.FODcFH&refcode=em240121-1-30&t=5&akid=7448%2E3935704%2EcZHItW)**
---
****
Thank you for your support,
The team at GIFFORDS PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=7448%2E3935704%2EcZHItW) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Let me explain, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
A lot of work is happening behind the scenes to win this Senate race.
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=954%2E52803%2EiuUhu7)

| | My team and I have set our first 2024 fundraising benchmark, and I’ve got to tell you, Peter: It’s a doozy. We need to raise $50,000 before the end of January, and if you’ll bear with me for just a minute, I’ll explain why we arrived at this number, and why it’s absolutely mission critical. **But if you’re in a hurry and don’t have time to read this whole email (_no hard feelings!_), please know that I wouldn’t be asking if this weren’t crucial to winning this race: [Would you please consider donating $25 to help us start the election year on the right foot?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9688?t=12&amount=25&akid=954%2E52803%2EiuUhu7)** | | | [Donate $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9688?t=13&amount=25&akid=954%2E52803%2EiuUhu7)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9688?t=14&amount=35&akid=954%2E52803%2EiuUhu7)
---
When we come up with fundraising goals, we’re not just pulling numbers out of a hat. There are loads of factors that go into a decision like this.
For example: We know we’re going up against a multi-millionaire opponent who doesn’t need to fundraise, so that means our campaign needs to be centered around grassroots outreach — **it’s our edge, and it’s how we will win.**
Hitting fundraising benchmarks like our $50,000 January goal means we can knock on doors, make phone calls, recruit and train volunteers — _anything and everything possible to get our Maryland-first message in front of voters._
But coming up short of our goals puts us in a tough spot, Peter, because every voter we don’t reach is a missed opportunity in a race that’s going to come down to the wire.
**[That’s why I’m committed to starting 2024 off with a surge of momentum, and it’s why I’m asking you for your support right now: Can I count on you to chip in $25 so we can outmaneuver my opponent’s outrageous spending advantage?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9688?t=15&amount=25&akid=954%2E52803%2EiuUhu7)**
_If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._

name: Mazi Pilip
subject: Breaking News: New York special election declared!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazi Pilip for Congress
body:
My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=31cabf390f1c4f32af8ecbaabc174175&_e=XaKgaiARn5recLcvk4B1RN5QnHuo8ZclsCOvOnDG9ew80Tc2i8RZeG448dTHML-uJQYagn4ojL0izN716GbGPeTaghYT2W_ZbIpz8E0iNbcqP9uGVz3UFtXAxgN1hyE6oT9aHKB330kErMulVH7kGNlfBZxXfa81TWzH-pPwpw38MFisJxQGe6w8_iuTfBDqcdyVWMqY9OvO_c1xV6CFm7Hx2Szy3l5vhivSD8r7B3PdblqzVtQJdk0n_hDJU-BZW9_IGeN24vygEXWTt5M-NRF4kcrS86Eg05Azpy-eDUNTuO80grjwtogLqZ5Bqyb4U1Wno0DUlZA_SyhujdJYKSjsHLSmgZ6SVpn5GETIg5bA2t-qG5kHtc-7Roc2qhiU6NFKrevGWHW1ESyvDkrBavFWAM_qF7nb-tEUX355w7Rtesc76hE9Mpb0tT4KPTh8)
---

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

---
| [](http://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=31cabf390f1c4f32af8ecbaabc174175&_e=XaKgaiARn5recLcvk4B1RN5QnHuo8ZclsCOvOnDG9ew80Tc2i8RZeG448dTHML-uJQYagn4ojL0izN716GbGPeTaghYT2W_ZbIpz8E0iNbcqP9uGVz3UFtXAxgN1hyE6oT9aHKB330kErMulVH7kGNlfBZxXfa81TWzH-pPwpw38MFisJxQGe6w8_iuTfBDqcdyVWMqY9OvO_c1xV6CFm7Hx2Szy3l5vhivSD8r7B3PdblqzVtQJdk0n_hDJU-BZW9_IGeN24vygEXWTt5M-NRF4kcrS86Eg05Azpy-eDUOfaTQFZfv7F8sl2m2Y1AxOEp3jXxntcaWbl5pclWtU4lpz3c_Z8qdc3tpis2V5uN9m_WszPtjayV03HTJERwpDebghpj4RsQ-vzPxZIAKQHlP7WqpRG43knLBGcaukaru2ynFGMW8t8m7JbnOGT3bk)
---

I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](http://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=31cabf390f1c4f32af8ecbaabc174175&_e=XaKgaiARn5recLcvk4B1RN5QnHuo8ZclsCOvOnDG9ew80Tc2i8RZeG448dTHML-uJQYagn4ojL0izN716GbGPeTaghYT2W_ZbIpz8E0iNbcqP9uGVz3UFtXAxgN1hyE6oT9aHKB330kErMulVH7kGNlfBZxXfa81TWzH-pPwpw38MFisJxQGe6w8_iuTfBDqcdyVWMqY9OvO_c1xV6CFm7Hx2Szy3l5vhivSD8r7B3PdblqzVtQJdk0n_hDJU-BZW9_IGeN24vygEXWTt5M-NRF4kcrS86Eg05Azpy-eDUNR_3DwbiKRsTKVsTRaaYHR2tw1Ty_og-OU3c1anbz02pE0GXakuK08a2fQTpl1ySnm1c-VRBmpc5zf8P1DBIX8VKm7C50jmhqWf1p5PE_pjTt30D7YpLkZLwi0xPeVp6lZLDFqeWzsU1Fz1rw7mcNN)
---

Early voting begins in just a few weeks. Voters are already planning to head to the polls & that makes this the most important race in the nation right now.

I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](http://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=31cabf390f1c4f32af8ecbaabc174175&_e=XaKgaiARn5recLcvk4B1RN5QnHuo8ZclsCOvOnDG9ew80Tc2i8RZeG448dTHML-uJQYagn4ojL0izN716GbGPeTaghYT2W_ZbIpz8E0iNbcqP9uGVz3UFtXAxgN1hyE6oT9aHKB330kErMulVH7kGNlfBZxXfa81TWzH-pPwpw38MFisJxQGe6w8_iuTfBDqcdyVWMqY9OvO_c1xV6CFm7Hx2Szy3l5vhivSD8r7B3PdblqzVtQJdk0n_hDJU-BZW9_IGeN24vygEXWTt5M-NRF4kcrS86Eg05Azpy-eDUPFbqItt5-ml2N_KVeHKJYMI1C7jEgK6T10bl7xTftgLSeVgIAqcvU5jrucjYzQoFTKVuvWYXLiPlJAl-v8XeAAIYnFOOxMFRAAovhk5loE4m1v8B1d5jTHR2ms0p6UKITAuWC3Li9HsatZk39b2izA)
---

And if I can ever help you the way you've helped me, please just say the word.

All the best,

Mazi Melesa Pilip
GOP Nominee
Special Election NY-03

---
| [](http://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=31cabf390f1c4f32af8ecbaabc174175&_e=XaKgaiARn5recLcvk4B1RN5QnHuo8ZclsCOvOnDG9ew80Tc2i8RZeG448dTHML-uJQYagn4ojL0izN716GbGPeTaghYT2W_ZbIpz8E0iNbcqP9uGVz3UFtXAxgN1hyE6oT9aHKB330kErMulVH7kGNlfBZxXfa81TWzH-pPwpw38MFisJxQGe6w8_iuTfBDqcdyVWMqY9OvO_c1xV6CFm7Hx2Szy3l5vhivSD8r7B3PdblqzVtQJdk0n_hDJU-BZW9_IGeN24vygEXWTt5M-NRF4kcrS86Eg05Azpy-eDUMg3mne-zZl55zlv1qPFtKy_C4FkRjOt41Lzxpn6R5g87fiRvKioYDbunMOwKSdAoNoxZOQKW4B_gowtdz1JohRzPEj2poUKDnr5mW8-_EkcXhS4p_E9GjwJchplS-hYJWEZ9CDYsYoIkJ5-YqCSP9O)

subject: $7 for 7 special elections...

body:
While one donation may not seem like a lot, the collective power of thousands of donations drives our movement forward. You can play a pivotal role in electing state Dems nationwide by donating today. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**$7.** That’s all we’re asking for to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** We have seven special elections between now and the end of February in critical states like Connecticut, New Hampshire, and Pennsylvania – $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** We’re battling Republican mega-donors who are dumping millions into races nationwide. But when enough grassroots Democrats chip in $7, it adds up and helps our candidates compete against the GOP money machine. **Reason #3:** Losing means Republicans will gain an advantage in key battleground states – so $7 can help defeat extremists who are determined to tear down abortion rights and ballot access. [So what do you say?
