name: Susan Swecker
subject: when programs work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Last November we prevented a MAGA extremist takeover of our Commonwealth. Glenn Youngkin tried to recreate ‘the Virginia model’ that helped him win two years ago, but this time we were ready for him.

|
---
Derek, Last November we prevented a MAGA extremist takeover of our Commonwealth. Glenn Youngkin tried to recreate ‘the Virginia model’ that helped him win two years ago, but this time we were ready for him. As seen in the Richmond Times Dispatch: “Thankfully, the Democratic Party of Virginia pushed back with a full-fledged voter protection program that educated voters about their rights, gathered real-time information to combat Republican election subversion, and ran a robust poll observer program aimed at deterring bad actors.” This is what it looks like when programs work, and why it’s critical that we keep them funded. name: Mondaire for Congress
subject: Missing response from dpwillis67@gmail.com
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts with Mondaire? Team—we’ve begun reviewing the response to our end-of-year priorities survey and we noticed you haven’t made your voice heard yet.

clean_body: It’s Dems first test for the 2024 cycle | = = = | = Let me explain why this is urgent: In 2024, we have the opportunity to restore sanity and order to the People’s House. The special election in New York's Third Congressional District (NY-03) will be on February 13 and all eyes will be on us. Tom puts People Over Politics to get big things done for the people he represents. Tom works with both sides of the aisle to deliver common-sense solutions for Long Island and Queens. That's who he is. While extreme Republicans bring nothing but crisis, chaos and confusion to Congress, Tom will bring integrity, commitment and experience back to NY-03. It’s imperative that we help Tom win. We can’t do that without your help, friend. Our path to victory in 2024 includes retaking New York's Third Congressional District. Team, Fourteen years ago today, the Supreme Court ruled in _Citizens United v. FEC_ — allowing corporations to spend unlimited undisclosed funds to influence elections and politics. Since that disastrous Supreme Court decision, anonymous donors have spent more than a BILLION dollars in our elections through dark money. It is only getting worse with each election. name: Jon Tester (via Mazie Hirono)
subject: They can't beat who I am.
body:
|
#
_Hi Peter, please read this message from my friend and colleague Jon Tester. His re-election race in Montana is one of the most competitive in the country this year, and if we lose his race, we will lose our Senate majority. He needs our support to protect our Senate majority, so split a donation between our campaigns if you can today. — Mazie_
* * *
Peter, I won’t beat around the bush. **[Can you pitch in three bucks to fuel my people-powered reelection campaign? Your gift will be split between Mazie and my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77492125/450571170/-1090561681?amount=3&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240121_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjM4ZDY3Zi1hYWI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AsBUd8cj9ycp_BZNKPEFKm1TsaCo-XglY2pdHDoJu-0=)** | | [DONATE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77492126/450571171/-1090561681?amount=3&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240121_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjM4ZDY3Zi1hYWI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AsBUd8cj9ycp_BZNKPEFKm1TsaCo-XglY2pdHDoJu-0=)
---
This might surprise you, but $3 goes a long way toward winning this race. That’s because we’re powered by folks just like you and I’m damn proud of that. I don’t answer to super PACs or special interests.
We’ve got what it takes to defeat Mitch McConnell and his cronies, but the truth is that they’re already pouring truckloads of money to defeat me.
They’re trying to turn me into something I’m not, **because they can’t beat who I am.**
I’m a farmer. I’m a senator. And I’m a Montanan til I die.
I’ve never let my time in Washington change me. I’m not about to start now.
**If every person reading this email chipped in $3 today, we would get ahead on our fundraising goals for the month and kick off the election year swinging.****[So I need to ask you: Will you support our grassroots-funded campaign and split a donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77492127/450571172/-1090561681?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240121_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjM4ZDY3Zi1hYWI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AsBUd8cj9ycp_BZNKPEFKm1TsaCo-XglY2pdHDoJu-0=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jon Tester and Mazie Hirono will go through immediately:_

body:
The future of reproductive freedom in our country could come down to what happens in Nevada:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77492498/450572628/-1853236879?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3351-fr-in&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTdkOWRjYi1iMGI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IbH3f_iGP0lTd-tscOiAG3bC0-LRXhzZOSzGvQh0vqc=)
Friend,
**Tomorrow marks 51 years since safe, legal abortion became the law of the land in America.**
But instead of celebrating this landmark anniversary, we're living with the aftermath of the Supreme Court's decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_.
Since the Court took away this fundamental right, Republicans have banned and restricted abortion in states across the country, and threatened to pass a nationwide abortion ban if they regain Senate control. They've even indicated they plan to go after birth control.
In other words, there's a whole lot riding on what happens in Nevada this November. And I can tell you this: **My friend Sen. Jacky Rosen is exactly who we want in the Senate to keep fighting for reproductive freedom.**
Right now, _CNN_ analysts are calling Jacky one of the most vulnerable senators in the race that will likely decide Senate control, and a shady billionaire has already poured $2 million into Nevada to flip her seat for Republicans.
Jacky's strong stance on reproductive rights is one of the reasons why the GOP has made her a top target for defeat – **and that’s exactly why we need to do everything we possibly can to help her win in Nevada and defend our Democratic Senate majority this year.**
[**So please, friend, will you join me in supporting Jacky today by making a gift of $5 or more now to keep Nevada and the Senate blue and help restore reproductive freedom in America?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77492499/450572630/-1853236879?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3351-fr-in&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTdkOWRjYi1iMGI4LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IbH3f_iGP0lTd-tscOiAG3bC0-LRXhzZOSzGvQh0vqc=)

[Private Reception](https://www.kennedy24.com/las-vegas-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_21_24_nd_1&n=7) in the heart of Las Vegas — Sunday, February, 4th, 2024, Las Vegas, NV
[Jackson Hole Happy Hour](https://www.kennedy24.com/jackson-hole?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_21_24_nd_1&n=8) at a private venue with RFK Jr. — Thursday, February 8th, Jackson Hole, WY
[Heart of Detroit Private event](https://www.kennedy24.com/detroit-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_21_24_nd_1&n=9) with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. — Saturday, February 10th, Detroit, MI
[New Jersey Private Reception](https://www.kennedy24.com/bergen-county?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_21_24_nd_1&n=10) with remarks and photo with RFK Jr. — Saturday, February 17th, Bergen County, NJ
[Special Q&A Event in Newport Beach](https://www.kennedy24.com/newport-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_21_24_nd_1&n=11) with the candidate — Saturday, February 24th, Newport Beach, CA
|
* * *
---
**I Don’t Need Billions**
Many experts are predicting that the candidates for president this year will spend $2 billion apiece to get themselves elected.
But what will it cost a genuinely likable candidate? What does it cost if you’re actually discussing the issues people care about instead of slinging mud at your opponents?
While the media focuses on the staggering sums raised by others, we know that true power lies in the people. It's not about the billions; it's about 100% participation from people just like you.
[**Join the ranks of the individuals who have already given $5, $10, or $24.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_21_24_nd_1&n=12)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/billions-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_21_24_nd_1&n=13)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/katieporteroc/p/14-years-of-citizens-united?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
Today marks 14 years since the Supreme Court's _Citizens United_ decision.
I'm sure many politicians have sent you texts or emails about how _Citizens United_ was a disastrous decision.
It's true--the decision has led to more than a decade of outrageously expensive elections, untraceable donations, and super PACs that do the bidding of powerful corporations.
**Overturning Citizens United is a necessary step to cleaning up our political system, but it 's not the only step.** **Corruption existed in Congress prior to this 2010 decision**.
We should go further and get to the root of the problem: corporate cash, in any form. Washington ignores the interests of working people because so many Members are beholden to corporate PACs and ultra-wealthy donors. **I 'm the only candidate in this race who supports banning corporate PAC money and federal lobbyist money.**
Another blatant form of corruption that we must address: Members of Congress trading stocks based on information we learn in private. **A 2022 New York Times analysis showed that nearly a fifth of Congresspeople have made a stock trade that reveals a possible conflict of interest,** including several in the earliest days of the COVID pandemic, when Congress was privy to private information about this emerging threat.
That's why just last week I joined a bipartisan group of colleagues in urging Speaker Johnson to hold a vote on the STOCK ACT 2.0. This is my bill to *effectively* ban Members of Congress and their spouses from trading stocks, and it would implement real punishment for Members who choose to break the law.
Stock trading is a problem on both sides of the aisle, and both Republican and Democratic Speakers have refused to allow a vote on this bill. It's BS.
There's much work to do to clean up Washington. It's a good thing that as a mom of three, I'm used to mess.
Onward!
Katie Porter
P.S. -- My campaigns have all been funded by supporters like you. We're proof that you don't need to do things the way they've always been done. If you'd like to chip in today, here's a link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kpsubstackq124&refcode=0121

name: Dr. Paul Gosar
subject: Biden's spying on private citizens
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | Biden administration's misuse of power extends to spying on private citizens | [](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-26-48-37-68313b555d-5g7f0c1975)
---
**Dear Fellow Patriot,**

As you know, I've always stood firm in Congress against reckless spending and government overreach. My voting record is a testament to my commitment to fiscal responsibility and protecting our freedoms. But I am facing an uphill battle.

This week, a disheartening number of Republicans joined Democrats to advance a budget crafted by Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi. This isn't just about numbers on a page; it's about the future of our country, the integrity of our borders, and the preservation of our liberties.

In an era where the federal government is increasingly weaponized, and our military is distracted by woke ideologies, we can't afford to be complacent. Congress's recent decision to pass a short-term continuing resolution, pushing critical deadlines into 2024, is a clear betrayal of fiscal conservatism.

**I stood against this irresponsible act because I believe in a government that serves its people, not one that indulges in wasteful spending. We need legislation that tackles real issues – border security, government overreach, and the encroachment of radical ideologies**.

**But here’s what’s more alarming: The Biden administration's misuse of power extends to spying on private citizens.** Recent revelations show the Department of Treasury, under Janet Yellen, flagging transactions based on political affiliations and beliefs. This is not just an overreach; it's a direct attack on our civil liberties.

**[This is where I need your support. Fighting this battle in Congress requires not just conviction, but resources. Your contribution will empower me to continue challenging these dangerous policies and to stand up for our values](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-26-48-37-68313b555d-5g7f0c1975)**.

Every donation, no matter the size, makes a difference. Let’s send a message that we will not stand for fiscal irresponsibility and government overreach. Let’s fight for a future that honors our freedoms and respects our hard-earned money.

**[Donate today to support our cause and help keep a true conservative voice in Congress. Together, we can make a difference](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-26-48-37-68313b555d-5g7f0c1975).**

Standing firm,

Congressman Paul A. Gosar, D.D.S.

P.S.**[Remember, your support goes beyond just a donation. It's a statement that you stand for fiscal responsibility, personal freedom, and a government that respects its citizens. Join our fight today](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-26-48-37-68313b555d-5g7f0c1975)**! | [ DONATE >> ](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-26-48-37-68313b555d-5g7f0c1975)

name: JoeBiden.com
subject: [INVITATION] Join Biden-Harris Campaign Manager Julie Chavez Rodriguez
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We want you to play a front-and-center role in our campaign strategy. | | |
---
Peter -- When President Biden and Vice President Harris took office, our country was facing unprecedented crises -- a raging pandemic, economic crisis, and more. The President and Vice President ran for office on the promise to move quickly to tackle these issues head-on and deliver results for working families. body:
Tomorrow marks 51 years |
---
Peter,

**Tomorrow marks 51 years since safe, legal abortion became the law of the land in America.**

But instead of celebrating this landmark anniversary, we're living with the aftermath of the Supreme Court's decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade._

Since the Court took away this fundamental right, Republicans have banned and restricted abortion in states across the country, and threatened to pass a nationwide abortion ban if they regain Senate control. They've even indicated they plan to go after birth control.

In other words, there's a whole lot riding on what happens in Nevada this November. And I can tell you this: **My friend Sen. Jacky Rosen is exactly who we want in the Senate to keep fighting for reproductive freedom.**

Right now, _CNN_ analysts are calling Jacky one of the most vulnerable senators in the race that will likely decide Senate control, and a shady billionaire has already poured $2 million into Nevada to flip her seat for Republicans.

Jacky's strong stance on reproductive rights is one of the reasons why the GOP has made her a top target for defeat **– and that’s exactly why we need to do everything we possibly can to help her win in Nevada and defend our Democratic Senate majority this year.**

body:

Marjorie Taylor Greene and MAGA extremists are threatening to oust their new GOP Speaker Mike Johnson... again. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77492962/450574063/753479076?&refcode=E6047-20240121-MTGJohnson-Image-GOP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGM0MzJlZGItYjNiOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f6yLWkLrvzM8EseDMyEvTbU8jHlyftc8mBdWwOtcl2c=)**[_**If you think this chaos is bad for America, will you donate now so we can take back the House from these MAGA extremists?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77492963/450574064/753479076?&refcode=E6047-20240121-MTGJohnson-SL-GOP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGM0MzJlZGItYjNiOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f6yLWkLrvzM8EseDMyEvTbU8jHlyftc8mBdWwOtcl2c=) [DONATE TO TAKE BACK THE HOUSE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77492964/450574065/753479076?&refcode=E6047-20240121-MTGJohnson-SB-GOP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGM0MzJlZGItYjNiOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f6yLWkLrvzM8EseDMyEvTbU8jHlyftc8mBdWwOtcl2c=) As you probably remember, it took Kevin McCarthy 15 rounds of voting to become Speaker of the House. But when it came time to pass a spending bill, MAGA revolted and Matt Gaetz led a successful effort to oust Kevin McCarthy. Then it took Republicans more than three weeks to elect a new Speaker. After Steve Scalise and Jim Jordan failed to get the votes, they finally settled on MAGA favorite Mike Johnson. clean_body: It’s like déjà vu all over again. | = | Peter, It’s like déjà vu all over again. Marjorie Taylor Greene and MAGA extremists are threatening to oust their new GOP Speaker Mike Johnson... again. = = As you probably remember, it took Kevin McCarthy 15 rounds of voting to become Speaker of the House. But when it came time to pass a spending bill, MAGA revolted and Matt Gaetz led a successful effort to oust Kevin McCarthy. Then it took Republicans more than three weeks to elect a new Speaker. After Steve Scalise and Jim Jordan failed to get the votes, they finally settled on MAGA favorite Mike Johnson. But just 2 months later, Marjorie Taylor Greene is once again threatening an uprising to throw the Speaker out if she doesn't get her way. Let's be clear - this dysfunction isn’t just normal politics. This is insane and terrible for our government’s ability to function. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- \- Team Harder *

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/migop.org/developments-regarding-mi-gop?e=a2af77507c)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Republicans,

The “political lynching” of Kristina Karamo has been orchestrated by the same elitist individuals who maintain the **_corrupt status-quo caste system_** within the Michigan Republican Party. By eliminating Chairwoman Karamo, they can uproot the grassroots foundation to recapture MIGOP and use it for their elitist endeavors. Just consider the words of Maggie Kurtzwell, “Thank heavens that this matter did not go back to the delegates; they are the ones who got us in this mess.” We reference Maggie’s comment because she is a current MIGOP State Committee member who is closely affiliated with... Malinda Pego!

Yes, the same Malinda Pego who is part of the faction of “rogue Republicans” that led the illegal and unethical January 6th gathering to try and eliminate Chairwoman Karamo. Thank God they were unsuccessful! This is the same Malinda Pego who was legally removed as Co-Chair of the Michigan Republican Party for partaking in actions that violate MIGOP bylaws regarding Conflicts of Interest.

Just recently, a lawsuit that many would categorize as malicious was filed against Chairwoman Karamo by the following individuals:

* Malinda Pego
* Ali Hossein
* Hassan Nehme
* Ann DeLisle
* Jessica Barfield
* Norm Schinkle
* Warren Carpenter

As one can see, Malinda has escalated her efforts. She is now a member of the “political lynch mob” that is using democrat lawfare tactics to carry out the “political lynching” of Chairwoman Kristina Karamo. The elitist law firm used by these individuals is Warner Norcross & Judd, LLP. It’s not a coincidence that this law firm has previously gone after grassroots individuals.

The Michigan Republican Party stands with Chairwoman Karamo. The following link provides access to a copy of the lawsuit and the answer provided by MIGOP General Counsel Dan Hartman:

[https://migop.org/articles/january-20-2024-message-from-general-counsel-dan-hartman](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=a9ace351b0&e=a2af77507c)

We can no longer sit back and allow the actions taken by the “rogue Republicans” to go without consequence. This fight is about the soul of the Michigan Republican Party. Chairwoman Karamo understands that change is difficult and has put together an administration designed to endure the trials and tribulations of transformation. The bottom line is that MIGOP will no longer be held captive by certain elitist individuals and their **_corrupt status-quo caste system_**.

You can help the Michigan Republican Party by donating here:

[https://secure.anedot.com/michigan-republican-party/general-fund](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=22b46d0eb1&e=a2af77507c)

In Liberty,

Communications Team
Michigan Republican Party

When we come up with fundraising goals, we’re not just pulling numbers out of a hat. There are loads of factors that go into a decision like this.

For example: We know we’re going up against a multi-millionaire opponent who doesn’t need to fundraise, so that means our campaign needs to be centered around grassroots outreach — **it’s our edge, and it’s how we will win.**

Hitting fundraising benchmarks like our $50,000 January goal means we can knock on doors, make phone calls, recruit and train volunteers — _anything and everything possible to get our Maryland-first message in front of voters._

But coming up short of our goals puts us in a tough spot, Peter, because every voter we don’t reach is a missed opportunity in a race that’s going to come down to the wire.

clean_body: A lot of work is happening behind the scenes to win this Senate race. | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | My team and I have set our first 2024 fundraising benchmark, and I’ve got to tell you, Peter: It’s a doozy. We need to raise $50,000 before the end of January, and if you’ll bear with me for just a minute, I’ll explain why we arrived at this number, and why it’s absolutely mission critical. But if you’re in a hurry and don’t have time to read this whole email (no hard feelings!), please know that I wouldn’t be asking if this weren’t crucial to winning this race: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Angela Alsobrooks and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | When we come up with fundraising goals, we’re not just pulling numbers out of a hat. There are loads of factors that go into a decision like this. For example: We know we’re going up against a multi-millionaire opponent who doesn’t need to fundraise, so that means our campaign needs to be centered around grassroots outreach — it’s our edge, and it’s how we will win. Hitting fundraising benchmarks like our $50,000 January goal means we can knock on doors, make phone calls, recruit and train volunteers — anything and everything possible to get our Maryland-first message in front of voters. But coming up short of our goals puts us in a tough spot, Peter, because every voter we don’t reach is a missed opportunity in a race that’s going to come down to the wire. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Angela Alsobrooks and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thank you, Angela Alsobrooks The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: Need you, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1765%2E552475%2EVv34Nb)
Peter, we’re building a team across PA to protect this seat, re-elect Bob Casey, and make sure we defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.
**[Can you help power our campaign with a grassroots contribution of $5 or any amount today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240121-2?refcode=em20240121-2&refcode2=1765_552475_Vv34Nb&akid=1765%2E552475%2EVv34Nb)**
**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240121-2?refcode=em20240121-2&refcode2=1765_552475_Vv34Nb&akid=1765%2E552475%2EVv34Nb)**
The stakes this November are high. Pennsylvania is key to the GOP’s plan to take back both the Senate and the White House, and we’re running against David McCormick, a mega-millionaire who already put $1 million of his own fortune into the race and outraised us last quarter. A super PAC supporting him also raised $18 million, and we know he has the support of the national GOP.
**The only way we’ll keep Bob fighting for Pennsylvania families in the Senate is with your help, and the sooner in 2024 the better.**
**[Rush a contribution today to help us compete.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240121-2?refcode=em20240121-2&refcode2=1765_552475_Vv34Nb&akid=1765%2E552475%2EVv34Nb)**
**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240121-2?refcode=em20240121-2&refcode2=1765_552475_Vv34Nb&akid=1765%2E552475%2EVv34Nb)**
Thank you for all you do for this team.
Together,
Bob Casey for Senate

Philadelphia, PA 19102

name: Tammy Murphy
subject: Fifty years of liberty, lost
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tammy Murphy for Senate**
body:
I fear a world in which my daughter has less freedom than I had. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77493263/450575203/1354111473?refcode=AU_TMNJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240121_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzk4MzA1NjQtYjZiOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wXXmgWwaUKq9lkXIrtq7sdAgIKnNml2eYF1du40FVzY=)
---
Friends and allies, Tomorrow would have marked 51 years of reproductive freedom under _Roe v. Wade_ , a decision that changed the world on January 22, 1973. Sadly, far-right Republicans and their conservative cronies on the court have pulled us backwards. Fifty years of liberty, lost. Nowadays, I hear stories that tear out my heart. Women probed and prosecuted for miscarrying. Girls forced to leave their home state for health care. Lives forever changed by the decisions of a select few in Washington. I feel fortunate to be raising my own family here in New Jersey, where women can still make their own health care choices. But I know that Republicans' ultimate goal is a nationwide ban, and I fear a world in which my daughter has less freedom than I had. **I’m running to defend reproductive freedom for my daughter and for yours, and I could use your support.[If you’re with me, please chip in today to win this race and fight for reproductive freedom in America.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77493264/450575204/959448484?refcode=AU_TMNJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240121_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzk4MzA1NjQtYjZiOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wXXmgWwaUKq9lkXIrtq7sdAgIKnNml2eYF1du40FVzY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77493265/450575205/959448484?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_TMNJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240121_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzk4MzA1NjQtYjZiOC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wXXmgWwaUKq9lkXIrtq7sdAgIKnNml2eYF1du40FVzY=)

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: What $3 means for our campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1044%2E135344%2ENccniZ)

We're writing today to ask if you can make a $3 contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign for Senate.
Why $3, specifically?
$3 because Michigan has the only competitive open seat in the country, so it will be one of the most expensive and competitive Senate races of the cycle.
$3 because there are now four credible Republican opponents in this race, and big-money donors are preparing to throw their full force behind the eventual nominee as they try to flip this seat red.
$3 because a GOP super PAC has already dumped almost $1 million into this race to air TV ads for one of our potential opponents – and we can bet more is on the way.
$3 because, although we’re not facing an FEC deadline this month, we closely track (like hawks!) our fundraising progress to ensure we have the resources to win down the line.
$3 because political experts are pointing to Michigan as a must-win state to win the presidency and protect the Senate majority.
It may not seem like $3 can make a huge difference in one of the most competitive and expensive Senate races in the country, but by the time you get to this point in the email, a few folks have already made their donation.
[**Now, we're asking you to do the same to help us keep pace with our internal fundraising benchmarks. Please use this link to contribute $3, or whatever you can manage today, to help Elissa Slotkin keep this Senate seat in Michigan blue for Democrats.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-jan24.--Kpen&refcode=em240121-1-I’m&akid=1044%2E135344%2ENccniZ 275K&t=2)**

clean_body: We're writing today to ask if you can make a $3 contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign for Senate. Why $3, specifically? $3 because Michigan has the only competitive open seat in the country, so it will be one of the most expensive and competitive Senate races of the cycle. $3 because there are now four credible Republican opponents in this race, and big-money donors are preparing to throw their full force behind the eventual nominee as they try to flip this seat red. $3 because a GOP super PAC has already dumped almost $1 million into this race to air TV ads for one of our potential opponents – and we can bet more is on the way. $3 because, although we’re not facing an FEC deadline this month, we closely track (like hawks!) our fundraising progress to ensure we have the resources to win down the line. $3 because political experts are pointing to Michigan as a must-win state to win the presidency and protect the Senate majority.
